### Part 011

- So, this whole tournament... It was just an elaborate ploy to get other people to capture Fungi for you! And now you're gonna make them all into your evil minions! ｜ 难不成…你大张旗鼓地举办比赛，是想鼓励人们去捕捉更多蕈兽，然后接管它们，用它们来干坏事吗！

- I don't have anything to say. You don't have to approve, but you should know I only do what's necessary. ｜ 我没什么要说的。就算再怎么不认可我，你也应该清楚我只做必须的事。
- Breeze Amidst the Forest - Ballad Selection Excerpt ｜ 林间风·故事拔萃节选
- Her Excellency handed me the General Operational Directives in three parts, and I think this is where I placed them... ｜ 上次珊瑚宫大人给我的常备锦囊有三卷，我印象里是放在了这边…
- We had an altercation with him inside Elynas once... Clarification: Recently, not "once." ｜ 我们之前在厄里那斯曾经与其发生冲突。补充订正，是最近一段时间的厄里那斯。
- Hey, hey, careful! The roads aren't very good here. ｜ 喂！小心脚下！这边的路，都破破烂烂的啦。

- Ugh, what an embarrassment... I just hope this won't affect the ceremony. ｜ 真是难堪…希望不会影响祭典。
- That's what I'm thinking, based on the last room... ｜ 我也是这样想的，从上一个房间的经验来看的话…
- Mr. Shikanoin belongs to the Tenryou Commission, just like Miss Kujou. He is very... principled, sometimes even more determinedly so than Miss Kujou. The only thing is, when it comes to the question of which matters should be governed by his principles, I believe only Mr. Shikanoin himself knows the answer... ｜ 鹿野院先生？他和九条小姐一样，是「天领奉行」的人。他…也是一个很有原则的人。对于这些「原则」的坚持，甚至比九条小姐更执着。只不过，什么事应该被算在这些「原则」之内，我想，或许只有鹿野院先生自己知道吧。
- There is no cost to using a Vision. But it's often the hidden costs that end up being the heaviest to bear when the time comes to pay. ｜ 使用「神之眼」无需代价。但不被置于明面的价格，结算时往往最为深重。
- Or, how about this: Let me live, and I'll take Loillier out and grab his money, and then we can split the cash? ｜ 或者，你们留我一条命，等我去点了卢瓦利耶，把他的钱拿过来…我们俩对半分。
- In the past, he followed Elder Aryadeva to the Akademiya, and upon returning, he was absorbed with those ancient documents. ｜ 过去他曾跟随阿亚德瓦前辈前往教令院学习，回来之后便沉迷于那些古代的文献。

- Hey, you there! Sorry, but does Tlazolli live around here? ｜ 欸！你们，不好意思…请问特拉佐莉是住在这附近吗？
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。

- Yeah, that's what he does. Those are all Ifa's catchphrases, so Cacucu picked them up after hearing them day after day. ｜ 它就这样。那几句都是伊法常说的，它天天听，也学会了。
- Hehe, and you have my apologies for that. I will not forget that you saved my life. ｜ 嘿嘿，实在是不好意思。我是不会忘记你们救我一命的。
- Is this letter yours? ｜ 这封信…
- Arapacati isn't angry anymore... ｜ 兰帕卡提不生气了…
- Hehe, yes. I—I take care of them. These are quite large and obedient... ｜ 呵呵，是的。它们都是由我、我在照顾。这几条很肥壮，很听话。
- And of course, our consultant, who's been helping out at the parlor every now and then. ｜ 还有在堂里时不时帮着干活的客卿，啊。
- Unfortunately, I've never been to Mondstadt... But could you help me take a few pictures of <color=#00E1FFFF>Mondstadt's regional specialties</color>? ｜ #可惜我不曾去过蒙德，不知道这位{M#小哥}{F#姑娘}，能否帮我拍摄一些<color=#00E1FFFF>蒙德的特产</color>？
- A Legend of Sword (Ⅴ) ｜ 沉秋拾剑录·五
- Hey! Uh... something's up with this relic! ｜ 喂！「遗物」…「遗物」的情况好像不对劲！

- It's weird to hear you say that! ｜ 你这样说就好怪！
- Well I've already signed up, so I should be able to help! ｜ 我已经报名厨王争霸赛，应该能帮到你哦！
- Why don't you just stop writing them? ｜ 那就不写？
- Gosh... ｜ 呜——
- Hehe, well, an assistant to a great doctor must be a great assistant, right? ｜ 嘿嘿，给了不起的医师做助手，也是了不起的助手嘛！
- Well, I don't actually know that much myself. Some adults say that we should believe in the Dendro Archon, and others say that we should believe in King Deshret... ｜ 说实话，这个我也有点搞不清楚。有些大人说应该相信草神，有些大人说应该相信赤王…

- An everyday Inazuman dish. The sliced Egg Roll is placed over seasoned rice. Simply made, yet full of flavor. ｜ 稻妻的家常料理之一。将切成片的鸟蛋烧放在调味过的米饭上，做法简单，美味却丝毫不打折扣。
- "Cassiodor" ｜ 「卡西奥多」
- Not so fast. ｜ 你还不能走。
- Could be tribal warfare, or some kind of internal conflict, hm? Very interesting. It's been centuries since a conflict occurred in these sands that saw an entire tribe annihilated. ｜ 部落争斗或者内讧，嗯？有意思，沙漠里几百年没有发生过能毁灭一整个部落的冲突了…
- Obtained from fishing ｜ 钓鱼获得
- Rex Lapis has brought prosperity and plenty to Liyue Harbor, and his rule and majesty have long passed into show and song, much to the delight of the people. But for someone in such proximity to a god, Keqing seems to lack the requisite respect the most.\n"Hmph. Let's be real here, but does Morax really know everything?"\nThe Liyue Qixing deal with the day-to-day happenings in the Harbor, whether great or small, while Rex Lapis only descends once a year.\nWhile history has shown that following Morax's lead has been the right call, Keqing believes that humans should have their pride and that their views deserve equal consideration.\nAs such, she often advocates different opinions from Rex Lapis, and is the first to put such views into practice.\nHer radical actions have seen stellar results, but they have also attracted murmurings of opprobrium among those devoted to Rex Lapis.\nAs Keqing sees it, such opposition are the excuses of those who have grown complacent under the aegis of their deity, and who cannot consider the future of humanity of their own accord.\nBut someone must walk on the front line of the epoch and create a new path with their own hands — and the Yuheng star is determined to do her part in this endeavor. ｜ 岩王帝君为璃月港带来繁荣昌盛，他的治世威名化作演义传记为人津津乐道。然而，身为离神最近的人之一，刻晴似乎是最缺乏敬畏心的那个。\n「哼，说句不好听的，摩拉克斯他真的什么都懂吗？」\n璃月七星随时关注着港内的大小事情，岩王帝君每年却只降临一次。\n千年历史已经证明追随帝君的脚步是正确之举，但刻晴始终认为，生而为「人」就该有「人」的骄傲，「人」的想法同样该被重视。\n因此，她经常发表与帝君不同的意见，并一马当先地将其付诸实践。\n如此激进的做法确实取得了不少杰出成果，但也引来了诸多岩王帝君虔诚信徒的反对声。\n这种反对在刻晴看来，无非是偷懒的借口——习惯于活在神明庇护之下，永不会主动思考人类的前景。\n可总有一个人要走在时代最前沿，亲手开创新的道路。玉衡星，自然当仁不让。
- Outside guests? How did you arrive at such a conclusion? Your groundless inference shames the Haravatat Darshan. ｜ 无关人士？你是如何得到这样的结论的，毫无根据的推理，真让你所在的知论派蒙羞。
- Oh! What kind souls you are! In any case, my name's Giulietta, and I sell instruments. ｜ 哦！您真好心，事情是这样，我叫茱莉耶妲，是从事乐器贸易的商人。
- I could help clean them up if I had my tools with me... I can tell you the location if you want to check it out. ｜ 要是我带着工具的话，就能去帮忙清理一下了…哎，我告诉你地点，你要不要去看看？
- Hmm... Y'know, Paimon doesn't really know all that much about flower varieties, but its color, at least, is definitely different from the ones you find in Fontaine. ｜ 这个…要说花朵的品种，我也不是很懂啦，至少颜色是和枫丹的蔷薇不太一样。
- It is rare to have such leisure time. I wonder if Mein Fräulein is also enjoying herself... ｜ 难得这么悠闲，不知道小姐玩得是否尽兴…
- Sturdy Stone Well ｜ 硬石加固的水井
- Tell me about "rocks"... ｜ 关于「石头」…
- Fearing backlash from his clients, he closed shop and shut himself away at home, trying to divine an answer to the strange readings. But after days and nights of divination, the only clue he got was: "Wangsheng Funeral Parlor." ｜ 为了避免被客人打骂，爷爷索性收摊回家，关起门来，日算夜算，最后只算出了三个字：往生堂。可他也不知道这是什么意思。
- Now that I think about it, I can leave this place soon... Huh? ｜ 算算时间，就快离开梅洛彼得堡了…嗯？
- Cold-Blooded Strike ｜ 冷血之剑
- A soft and cuddly stuffed toy that seems somewhat similar to a character in a certain fairytale... ｜ 软绵绵的布偶，似乎与某本童话中的角色有些相似…
- Have you recalled anything? ｜ 你终于想起什么来了吗？
- Has... it even lit up at all? ｜ 它…是亮了还是没亮？
- Attack! Attack! Protect the goods! ｜ 敌袭，敌袭！保护货物！保护货物！
- Origins... Wait, YOU'RE the green mushroom!? ｜ 来历…难道你就是绿蘑菇？！
- Continue this quest?\nYou can choose to continue quests from the Quest Menu. ｜ 是否继续当前任务？\n可在任务界面中选择继续进行
- Leader ｜ 头目
- However, if you're looking to buy something for a friend, maybe I can help. Just fill me in on their physical condition they're in, and I'll do the rest. ｜ 不过，要是想为朋友购买健身器械的话，我随时欢迎。只要告诉我那位朋友的身体情况就好。

- <color=#f39001>Alternate Cast</color> members can be used to replenish your Principal Cast. Complete Combat Events or choose Companion Events in order for them to join the Principal Cast.\n<color=#f39001>Special Guest Stars</color> are designated selectable characters that do not need to meet the Elemental requirements for that season. ｜ <color=#f39001>待命角色</color>是可出战角色的补充力量，通过完成战斗或选择伙伴事件，才能转变为可出战角色。\n<color=#f39001>特邀角色</color>是当期指定的部分不受元素限制的可选角色。
- #<color=#D3BC8EFF>Battle Pass Type</color>\nSojourner's Battle Pass is unlocked by default at the start of each period. In order to receive more precious rewards, Travelers can unlock the Gnostic Hymn by purchasing Gnostic Hymn or Gnostic Chorus. Daily missions are updated each day at 4:00 AM, and weekly missions are updated each Monday at 4:00 AM ({TIMEZONE}).\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>BP Level</color>\nComplete BP Missions to gain Battle Pass EP (BEP). BEP increases your BP Level, which brings rich rewards. \n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>BEP Limit</color>\nFor this BP Period, BP Missions will stop providing BEP after you reach the maximum BP Level.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Notes</color>\n1. If due to exceptional circumstances a repeat purchase of Gnostic Hymn or Gnostic Chorus is made, no further BEP will be awarded. Instead, you will receive either 750 or 1,410 Genesis Crystals, the quantity being equivalent to the sum spent.\n2. Likewise, you will receive 860 Genesis Crystals in the event of a repeat purchase of Travel Notes.\n3. Non-adults can only log in to the game on Fridays, Saturdays, Sundays, and public holidays. Thus, they may not be able to attain the highest BP level within the BP Period, and thus may not be able to receive all the rewards for the relevant bundle. Non-adults who wish to purchase Blessings of the Welkin Moon, Gnostic Hymns, and Gnostic Choruses should be aware, therefore, that no compensation will be given for any such missed rewards. ｜ #<color=#D3BC8EFF>【纪行类别】</color>\n每期纪行中，大地纪行默认解锁获取，旅行者还可通过兑换珍珠纪行或珍珠之歌，解锁珍珠纪行，获取更丰厚的奖励。每日任务将在凌晨4点刷新，每周任务将在每周一凌晨4点刷新【{TIMEZONE}】 \n \n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【纪行等级】</color>\n旅行者可通过完成纪行任务，来获取纪行经验，提高纪行等级，获取丰厚的奖励。 \n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【纪行经验上限】</color>\n本期纪行内，到达等级上限后，将不能够通过纪行任务获取经验。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【特殊说明】</color>\n1.如因特殊情况导致重复购买珍珠纪行或珍珠之歌时，纪行经验将无法进行累加，并将直接返还对应购买价格的750或1410创世结晶。\n2.同时若因特殊情况导致重复购买纪行成歌时，将直接返还860创世结晶。\n3.未成年人仅可在周五、周六、周日和法定节假日登录游戏，可能无法在纪行周期内到达最大纪行等级，无法完整领取该礼包的所有道具。购买空月祝福、珍珠纪行或珍珠之歌的未成年玩家，将不会收到以任何形式给予的补偿。
- It... It's the Shogun! ｜ 是…是将军大人！
- But in the end, I'm no researcher. I don't have a lot of theoretical knowledge, no means to conduct experiments, and I have no friends who study in Kshahrewar, and now that Akasha has been shut down... ｜ 但我毕竟不是学者，缺乏理论知识，难有实验条件，又没有在妙论派读书的朋友，现在就连虚空都关闭了…

- Head to a quiet place ｜ 前往僻静之地
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- That's what you're worried about... Paimon thought you were just scared of getting injured! ｜ 原来问题严重在这里吗…我还以为沐宁只是怕受伤而已呢！

- Our interest has been piqued. ｜ 听起来很有趣。
- What? It was thanks to a tip from Albert? Haha, Albert... ｜ 什么？多亏了艾伯特先生的消息…哈哈，艾伯特先生…
- "Gold" Rhinedottir... ｜ 「黄金」的莱茵多特…
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- Freminet's a star diver, so he should be fine, right? ｜ 菲米尼会潜水，没问题的吧？
- Perhaps... Perhaps we should just choose the most traditional style. ｜ 就选…就选最传统的样式好了。
- Okay, let's go give it a try. I've already prepared my question for the Seelie. ｜ 那我们就去试试看吧，问题我都已经准备好了。

- My dear Citrus, please tell me you're joking. We can't have you out of commission with the Tavern about to reopen! ｜ 我的好柑橘，你可别和我开玩笑，这酒馆马上就要开张了。
- #The sparkling things brought back by Aranimba were also stuffed in the "chests." Maybe Nara {NICKNAME} will like them? ｜ #兰宁巴送回了一些亮晶晶，兰弥那离也都塞进了「箱」里，也许那菈{NICKNAME}会喜欢？

- You can enter the Hyakunin Ikki Dojo by stepping through this... rather suspicious door. ｜ 只要踏入这扇看起来十分可疑的大门，就能进入百人一揆的场馆。
- Hmm? Are you running some event here as well? ｜ 咦？难道这里也在举办活动？
- "Mi muhe ye\nMeans I love you\nIn the language of the hilichurls." ｜ 「mi muhe ye\n在丘丘人的语言里\n是我爱你。」
- Uh... The three little guys haven't left yet. How about we go talk to them again? ｜ 咦…他们三个小家伙还没有离开呢，我们再去和他们说说话吧？
- (So some people are having pretty realistic dreams, big deal. What are they so worried about?) ｜ （我还真不相信做个梦能有多大的影响，这么紧张干嘛。）
- Big G (Memory) ｜ 回忆中的狼哥

- Operations stream along countless convolutions, flowing spectrum paths that shift across layered platforms.\nThe accumulated Phlogiston coalesces under immense pressure into a floating, controllable ball of heat.\n"We've done it!" Your brethren cheer all around you.\nYet the one who masterminded this feat, in no way inferior to star-forging, stands outside the experimental site, as though wholly unrelated to this momentous deed. ｜ 层叠的高台上，无数卷积的运算图形随着分光通路的变化而不断流转…\n聚流的燃素在巨大的压力下，形成了悬浮可控的高热球状体。\n「成功了！」围观的同族发出喜悦的惊呼。\n而这不亚于铸星之功的主导者，此刻却仿佛无关人士般，站在实验发生场的外围。

- Wriothesley's specialty. Soon after kicking out his subordinates with the excuse, "Feel free to leave, but I'm staying! Things are heating up in here, and it could blow!", a meatastic delicacy greets your eyes. A full-bodied sauce slathered over flaky skin brings an extraordinary double blast of deliciousness, though as you taste it, it does seem to be practically identical to a condiment that has become awfully popular recently... ｜ 莱欧斯利的特色料理。听到他以「现在离开，厨区会爆炸」为理由拒绝了部下后，不一会儿，一盘肉肴映入眼帘。丰腴的肉汁与酥松的外皮带来的非同凡响的双重享受，只是这调味尝起来，似乎和最近流行的某种调味品的味道一模一样…

- Some wealthy people there put floral fragrance in their ink as a way of injecting a little romance into their writing. ｜ 那里的一些有钱人，会将花香加入墨中。寓意每次提笔，能在纸上留下些许春意。
- I once thought that deification would allow me to get rid of all of my pointless emotions, but I've since abandoned that view. Anger, whether it be from others or myself, is too convenient and useful as a tool.\nHow can some people just never become angry? I find that impossible to even imagine. Do they just not have a single mean bone in their bodies? ｜ 我曾以为成神便可摒弃无用的情感，现在不这么觉得了。至少「愤怒」，无论来自他人还是自我，都是方便使用的工具。\n怎么会有人永远不生气呢？难以想象，这种人就没有一点脾气吗？

- With his surpassing talent, this eminent magician has created a truly amazing magic show that has fixed all of Fontaine's attention on him.\nHe's usually cheerful, wearing on confident smile on his face. Regardless of who he is speaking with, he is composed and assured, with a tendency to interweave magic tricks into conversations, delighting all those he deals with.\nOnly those closest to him know that this image he has created for others is all just a part of the enthralling "magic show." ｜ 万众瞩目的枫丹著名魔术师，凭借着超绝的天赋，编织起一场场令人惊叹的魔术演出。\n平时的他总是保持着开朗、自信的笑容，无论和谁都能侃侃而谈，再时不时穿插一个小魔术，让与他来往的人如沐春风。\n只有最亲近的人才知道，他平日里给人创造的形象，或许也是「魔术演出」的一环。

- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Paimon, have you ever seen what Kaeya looks like under that eye patch?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Nope.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> So, it would seem he never takes it off...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Actually, Paimon already knows why!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Oh?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> He must be hiding some big secret!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Really, a secret?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> See, Kaeya heads out for assignments more than anyone else.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> So the skin under that eye patch has to be way lighter than the rest of him.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> So... if he ever takes that eye patch off...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> He'll definitely become the butt of everyone's jokes. Maybe he'll even get a weird nickname!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Like, say, "Pasty Eye"!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Guess he didn't need to take it off to get a weird nickname... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙，你见过凯亚眼罩下面的样子吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>没见过呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>这么说来，凯亚似乎一年四季都不会摘下眼罩…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哼哼，机智的派蒙已经猜到为什么了！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>肯定是要隐藏什么大秘密！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>大秘密？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你看，凯亚外出的工作比较多。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>所以凯亚眼罩下的皮肤，肯定比周围的白一大圈。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那如果摘下眼罩…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>肯定会被大家笑话的吧！然后被取奇怪的绰号！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>比如说——「花脸猫」！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>唔，他还没摘下眼罩，就已经被取了奇怪的绰号呢…

- You made a discovery during your travels in Sumeru, the Land of Verdure. The collection of items within can be used to upgrade your Talents.\n\nAfter using this item, you may select one of the following rewards:\n·Guide to Admonition\n·Guide to Ingenuity\n·Guide to Praxis ｜ 在草之国土「须弥」的旅行中有所发现，内部装有可以提升技艺的典藏。\n\n使用后可从以下选项中选择一项作为奖励:\n·「诤言」的指引\n·「巧思」的指引\n·「笃行」的指引
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nYou and Paimon meet a certain strange student by the Wall of Samiel to the southwest of the rainforest. She seems to be trying to test some kind of mysterious creation...\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nDuring the first 8 days of the Brewing Developments event, one new challenge will be unlocked every 2 days. During each challenge, you can use characters provided by the event or your own to complete 3 consecutive combat rounds.\n\nThe Shock-Boiled Brew allocated for each round has 4 potential effects. The Shock-Boiling Device will automatically use the Shock-Boiled Brew and can randomly activate one or more effects for a certain period of time, providing tremendous support during combat.\n\nThe goal of the challenge is to defeat as many opponents as possible within the time limit to score points. When the challenge ends, you will receive medals based on this score.\n\nFood and other items will not be available during these challenges. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n在雨林西南的防沙壁一带，你和派蒙遇见了某位奇怪的学生，她似乎正在测试某种玄奥的研究成品…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20级。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n「合剂演进」活动的前八天，每两天会开启一个新的挑战。挑战中，可以使用活动提供的试用角色或自己拥有的角色，连续进行3轮战斗。\n\n每轮挑战中使用的「震沸合剂」都会有4种潜在的药效，战斗中「震沸装置」会自动使用「震沸合剂」，在一定时间内随机激活其中的一种或多种药效，给战斗带来巨大的助力。\n\n挑战的目标是在限制时间内，击败尽可能更多的敌人以获取评分，结束后，将依据试验评分获得相应级别的试验纹章。\n\n在「合剂演进」活动的挑战中，无法使用食物等道具。
- Watching him use his magic is all the proof you need. A true adeptus, no doubt about it. ｜ 见到那样的法术还有什么好怀疑的，当然是真真正正的仙人。

- Haha, an old lady like me can't afford to buy a place in this city. See this ceramic teapot? My entire household is in here. ｜ 呵呵，我老婆子可置办不起城里的房子——看看这个壶，我的全部家当都放在里面啦。
- So in other words, it's a kind of... protection magic? To keep people alive? ｜ 换言之，就是保护你们生命安全的魔法吧？

- Treading the Untrodden Path ｜ 我们的冒险，我们的路
- Without satisfying these two conditions, the best-case scenario is that we'd be walking away with a useless lump of stone. ｜ 缺少了这两个条件…在最好的情况下，我们拿到手的也只会是一块毫无作用的石头吧。
- Mavuika gives the impression of being a most avid outdoorswoman. When not at work or training, she can be seen in all sorts of places, throwing herself at various extreme challenges.\nBut what people often fail to realize is that she actually can also sit still for long periods of time, staying focused as she reads books and woven scrolls, as she possesses ample patience.\nHer other great indoor hobby is solving puzzles, whether these involve logical reasoning or pattern recognition, and regardless if their contents are images, numbers, or even stories. All quickly suck her into a world of her own.\nAfter enjoying time well-spent making deductions and decisions, she even scores these puzzles based on their quality, difficulty, and reasonability, so that her fellow puzzle hobbyists have a reliable standard to refer to.\nYet this hobby of hers came to pose a problem: Puzzle games are usually one-time sources of enjoyment and lack replayability, and Mavuika tends to solve them all too quickly, faster even than the ability of puzzle creators to develop new ones.\nAs such, while keeping an eye on any new puzzles that come to market, Mavuika also dusts off already-solved puzzles and adds various restrictions and limitations to increase the difficulty or complexity.\nFor example, while doing a puzzle, she might allow herself to select pieces normally, but flip the pieces when placing them, thus only being able to see if she has the puzzle right after placing every piece and flipping the whole thing back over.\nOr perhaps, if the puzzle requires separating multiple connected pieces of metal, she will affix one piece to the table, thus restricting the number of directions in which she can conveniently pull the pieces apart, requiring her to consider alternatives — a restriction that can also be applied to knot puzzles.\nOver time, she has compiled the various gameplay challenges she has come up with and puzzle ratings she has given, creating a most valuable curated catalog of puzzles.\nAt first, she published it at the Speaker's Chamber, hoping that she could help her fellow hobbyists, and also promote this relatively niche hobby while she was at it, but the quickest to seize upon the utility of the resource she created were, in fact, the sellers of puzzles.\nThey used the recommendation of the Pyro Archon herself to shamelessly peddle their puzzles, but this quickly led to numerous disputes — approval though it be, Mavuika's catalog only indicated her personal preference, while the full scope of human taste in puzzles is vast indeed.\nFollowing that incident, Mavuika no longer publicly discloses her catalog, but if one truly considers oneself a puzzle enthusiast, one can still go to the Speaker's Chamber and request to view it.\n...With the caveat that you must first prove yourself an expert by solving a random puzzle selected from Mavuika's collection by the Chamber staff, of course. ｜ 玛薇卡给人的印象是个十足的户外派，人们能够在各地见到玛薇卡的身影，除去工作和训练之外，她还很喜欢进行一些冲击极限的挑战。\n但大家往往不甚了解的是，她其实也相当坐得住，阅读书籍和织卷她都能长时间保持专注，并拥有十足的耐心。\n她的另一大室内爱好是解谜，无论是逻辑推理还是寻找规律，无论内容是图片还是数字又或者是故事，她都会快速沉浸其中，进入属于自己的世界。\n在度过一段畅快的推测与决断的时光后，她还会根据谜题的质量，难度，合理性给这些谜题定下分数，为解谜同好提供一个相对可靠的参考。\n然而这个爱好也衍生出了一个问题：谜题游戏通常都是一次性的，很难反复游玩，而玛薇卡解答谜题的速度有些过快了，已经超出了创作者们的制作速度。\n所以，在日复一日地关注市面上的新谜题的同时，玛薇卡也会拿出已经解答过的原版谜题，新增某些提高难度或复杂度的限制条件。\n比如，在拼图的时候，虽然可以正常挑选拼图块，但拼上去的时候必须翻转至背面，只有完成整块拼图才能再次翻过来确认图案是否正确。\n又比如，谜题需要将几块扣在一起的金属分离开，玛薇卡会把其中一块固定在桌上，这样某些可以轻松解开的方向便不再可用，必须思考新的破解方式。不只是金属，用在绳结谜题上同样管用。\n久而久之，玛薇卡会把这些自己想到的挑战玩法也和原谜题评分记录在一起，形成了一本含金量很高的谜题推荐册。\n起初她在「话事处」公开了这份资料，希望能够帮助爱好者挑选谜题，顺便也推广谜题这一相对小众的爱好，但最先抓到这份资料妙用的反而是谜题的销售者。\n他们利用火神玛薇卡的推荐为名义大肆宣传，然而每个人对谜题的审美都有差别，这份资料体现的也只是玛薇卡的个人口味，所以很快就引起了一些纠纷事件。\n在这之后，玛薇卡就不再公开这份资料，但如果真的是谜题爱好者，现在仍然可以在「话事处」申请查阅。\n——前提是，能够解出由工作人员在玛薇卡的收藏中随机选出的谜题，以证明自己确实是个专家。

- Countless souls have fallen prey to these hands. I too have been swallowed by the darkness — and yet you dare to drive me on. You may think of me as... your companion. You seek to find me salvation? \n...You... really are a difficult being to comprehend. ｜ 我的枪缨，早就屠戮了无尽的怨魂。连我本人，不免也被黑暗吞噬。——你却敢于驱使这样的我，将我当作…「同伴」。\n…你是想要救赎我吗？…你，真是难以理解的生物。

- A simple, large bedroom that balances warmth and sophistication. For exhausted people, the bed means a quick entry into dreamland, and those who wake in the morning will enter just as swiftly into work mode.\nMany Fontainians treat interior design as a key factor in sleep, and stable sleep is key to one's work-rest cycle. From this perspective, bedroom design is indeed critical.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Charlotte, Chevreuse ｜ 布局简单大方的卧室，平衡了温馨与干练的观感，对于疲惫之人而言，躺在这个房间的床上即可迅速入睡，而早间醒来之人则能迅速清醒，早早进入工作状态。\n许多枫丹人将房间布局视为影响睡眠的重要因素，而稳定的睡眠正是一个人规律作息的关键。这样看来，卧室的陈设的确相当重要。\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：夏洛蒂、夏沃蕾
- I'm no beetle-fighter myself, but I've heard a lot about it, and have always wanted to try it out for myself. ｜ 我并非斗虫的行家，但听说过许多与此相关的故事，早就想试试看了。

- A conch-like structure that gives off a faint glow. Despite the name, it is not a shell but something condensed from primordial elemental energy.\nNatural historians used to hold that the salt-white pattern on the conch was one of the many marks left by the Hydro Lord. However, archaeologists later discovered that it has many connections to ancient civilizations. ｜ 散发着幽光的贝状结构。似乎是更为原始的元素能量凝结而成的产物，而非某种生物的甲壳。\n过去的博物学一般认为盐白的螺纹曾经是水的主人的诸多印记之一。但后世的考古学认为它与前世代的文明有诸多关联。

- We originally came from the desert — the gods there died off long ago. Since those days, we've used our own two hands to carve out a living. We don't beg gods for their aid. ｜ 我们最早起源于沙漠，那里的神早就陨落了。在那之后，镀金旅团的人就凭自己的本事吃饭，从没寻求过神的帮助。
- I do. ｜ 嗯。
- When the patrons of Mondstadt's taverns are asked about the strongest knight of the Knights of Favonius, three names are likely to come up:\nThe highly reputable Acting Grand Master Jean, Cavalry Captain Kaeya, and the mysterious tycoon, Diluc.\nHowever, some claim to have witnessed, albeit through bleary, drunken eyes, a knight in red, leveling the entire Stormbearer Mountains.\nIf one wants to find this mysterious knight, then they need look no further than the solitary confinement cell inside the Knights of Favonius Headquarters.\nIf the cell is found vacant... then something explosively unfortunate is likely about to take place...\nKlee is well known for the danger she presents. As an official member of the Knights of Favonius, her strength in combat cannot be underestimated.\nAs a hyperactive child, meanwhile, her destructive capabilities cannot be overstated.\nAfter all, while other Mondstadt children her age are still playing with regular toys, Klee's favorite toys are... live explosives. ｜ 如果向蒙德的酒客们说起西风骑士团战力最强的成员，\n恐怕大多数人会列举大名鼎鼎的代理团长琴、骑兵队长凯亚或神秘的贵公子迪卢克。\n但也有人在醉眼朦胧间，目睹了一位红色骑士将整座望风山地夷为平地的壮举——\n若想寻访这位神秘的骑士，恐怕就要到西风骑士团的禁闭室一探究竟了。\n假如禁闭室空空如也，或许某些爆炸性的糟糕事件就快要发生了…\n可莉就是这样的「危险人物」。作为骑士团正式成员，她的战力不容小觑。\n而作为一个过于活泼的孩子，她的破坏力同样巨大。\n毕竟，与蒙德其他小孩子不同，爆炸物才是可莉最为喜爱的玩具。
- Mighty Bathysmal Vishaps that use different elements in battle to vent their great rage. After entering battle, they will use the powerful Cleansing Shower attack. Characters hit by this ability will <color=#FFE14BFF>lose a certain amount of Energy</color>. If the character lacks sufficient Energy, they will <color=#FFE14BFF>lose HP</color> instead.\nIf you are unable to <color=#FFE14BFF>defeat</color> the Frostshrieker Bathysmal Vishap and the Blitzroarer Bathysmal Vishap <color=#FFE14BFF>consecutively within a short time</color>, the Bathysmal Vishap you first defeated will be <color=#FFE14BFF>revived</color>. ｜ 强大的深海龙蜥之群，操持着不同的元素，向着来者宣泄它们的愤怒。进入战斗后，会使出威力强大的「涤魔喷吐」。命中角色后，角色将<color=#FFE14BFF>流失一定元素能量</color>。若角色的元素能量不足，将<color=#FFE14BFF>损失生命值</color>。\n若未能在<color=#FFE14BFF>短时间内连续击败</color>深海龙蜥·唳霜与深海龙蜥·啸霆，先击败的深海龙蜥会<color=#FFE14BFF>复苏</color>。

- So, uh... ten blankets, please. ｜ 给我拿十块毛毯吧。
- Wh—What kind of place is this Cave of Eerie Murmurs anyway? And why does Your Highness sound so serious? ｜ 那、那个「幽谈窟」是什么地方呀？怎么公主殿下这么严肃…
- This lovely gold-plated flower was plucked from the crown of the ruler of the forest. ｜ 从森林王的宝冠上摘下的饰金之花。
- Might I remind you that this is the Fatui? Have you completely forgotten what they did to us? ｜ 那可是愚人众，他们对我们做了什么，你们都忘了吗？
- Adjust the deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- I wonder where Xiangling's run off to this time... ｜ 香菱这孩子跑哪去了…
- Certain occasional events arranged by the Speaker's Chamber to make the Trial's battles more lifelike, by simulating how unpredictable a real battlefield can be. ｜ 由「话事处」安排的某些偶发事件，其目的是为了增加演武的真实性，毕竟战场上的风云突变总是难以预料。

- What are you selling? ｜ 有什么卖的？

- That would never fly with the Millelith — or what, did you have some contacts you were planning on hooking me up with? Not just anyone can sell that stuff, you know... ｜ 难道你帮我去千岩军那里打点关系吗？卖这种东西可不是闹着玩的…
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- I'm thinking... We should try our best to bail him out when the trial commences. ｜ 我在想…等会儿我们要竭尽全力帮沃特林开脱。
- Good morning, Navia. ｜ 早啊，娜维娅。
- Indeed. Here, we worship the Dainichi Mikoshi. ｜ 嗯，白夜国崇尚大日御舆。
- No, nothing like that. The assessment itself is complete. But let me give you a word of advice: Things are not always as they appear. ｜ 那倒没有，对他们本人的考察已经结束了。不过给你们一个忠告：眼见未必为实。
- ...Just, y'know, theoretically speaking. We're just being hypothetical here, definitely not gonna actually go commemorate him or anything... ｜ 只是假如，打个比方，绝对不是我们真的要去纪念他。
- Anyway! Enough chit-chat. I'm coming with you all. I, for one, do not believe that Grundeland will change so easily. ｜ 好了，闲话到此为止！我也要跟着去，我可不相信戈伦德兰这家伙能轻易改邪归正。
- And in the end, the entire kingdom sank beneath the waves, as though it had been smote by divine judgment... ｜ 于是最后，如同天罚一般，整个国家都坠入海渊之下…
- Intermittent tides wash over the stage, causing some areas to switch between land and water-type terrain at intervals. Take measure of the situation and dispatch the saurian whelp most suited to the task... ｜ 场地中存在间歇性涨落的潮汐。每隔一段时间，部分区域将在陆地和水域两种地形之间切换，需要观察情况，派遣合适的小龙上阵…
- I moved back to dodge him, but he was too tall... As he reached out to grab me, his hand landed right on my head. ｜ 我往后闪，但他太高了，手又在乱抓，正好就摸到了我的头。
- My name is Ann. ｜ 我叫做安。

- Yikes! Where did this big guy come from? ｜ 呜哇！这个大家伙是哪里来的！

- Tch, there's still some residual Abyss contamination... No surprises here. No doubt that explains the Mountain King's recent activity. ｜ 啧，果然还有些残留的深渊污染，山王的暴动应该和它们有关系。
- Truth be told, I used to be an ordinary merchant. I studied the promotional principles of commercial events and learned how to cater to the needs and wants of customers. ｜ 不瞒你说，我原本只是个普通生意人。研究过商业活动的宣传原则，把握用户心理之类的要点。

- I thought they were good folks when dealing with them... ｜ 平时我和他们打交道的时候，还觉得他们是好人呢…

- They say that astrologists have seen it all. So if this mirage intrigued you, that says it was a worthwhile encounter. ｜ 占星术士都是见多识广的人。能让你这样说，这片幻境也不枉存在了。

- From memory? ｜ 你全记下来了吗？
- Collect enough Violetglow Jellyfish ｜ 收集足够的「荧光紫水母」
- Escort failed, the cargo was intercepted... ｜ 护送失败，货物遭到截获...
- I already have a gliding license. ｜ 我已经有飞行执照了。
- Therefore, esteemed Master of the Jinni, I beg you, regardless of the path she has chosen, bring her back to me... ｜ 所以…尊贵的「镇灵主人」，我请求你，不论她选择了什么道路，将她带回我的面前…
- Wait, what did we do? ｜ 连我们两个也？
- The Dendro Archon's birthday sure has brought in whole fleets of new ships from abroad! Sure, we're really happy trade is flourishing, but it's also fertile ground for new problems to crop up... ｜ 草神大人的生日真是吸引了不少国外的新船队啊。经济繁荣当然让人开心，但也容易滋生新的问题…
- From that perspective, you could even say that we had an honest, profound exchange, and gained much knowledge about our respective stances in the process. ｜ 从这个角度来说，我们算是进行了坦率且深入的交流，并且在此过程中充分了解了对方的立场。
- Hehehe... Honestly, the thing I love most about running this booth is watching all the travelers come and go, and listening to all the stories they have to tell. ｜ 嘿嘿…在这开一个茶摊，最享受的莫过于看行人来来往往，再随便听听故事。
- And the route is different too... ｜ 而且路线也不一样…
- Surprise Bundle ｜ 惊喜礼包
- It brings back so many memories! That was the last Lantern Rite the five of us spent together. ｜ 真怀念啊，这是我们最后一次，五个人一起过的海灯节吧。
- #Ugh! The stench of evil here is overflowing! Be careful, my {M#brother}{F#sister}, it could be that monsters will be drawn to the area around this <color=#00E1FFFF>stone arch</color>. ｜ #唔，妖邪之气怎会如此溢盛！{M#兄台}{F#大姐}务必小心，许是有妖物要被招引到这<color=#00E1FFFF>石拱</color>附近！
- Rifthound? ｜ 兽境猎犬？
- He was quite happy at first. He seemed to think that the Fortress of Meropide would be all fun and games. ｜ 他刚来的时候还蛮开心的哦，可能错以为梅洛彼得堡是个好玩的地方吧。
- Oh! We... We heard you talking about fish, so we're wondering what we should have for dinner! ｜ 啊！我们刚刚…听哲俩阿小姐说到鱼…突然在想晚餐该吃什么！
- "As we've already told our wishes to the deity, we must try our best to make those wishes come true." ｜ 「都已经在神明面前说过愿望了，一定要认真努力才行。」

- So we're gonna eat first and bring up the book situation later? ｜ 果然还是要先吃饭，再谈书的事情吗？
- Oh, you didn't go to the hot springs? ｜ #欸？{NICKNAME}，你居然没去泡温泉吗？
- What do the people of Sumeru even, um, excrete...!? ｜ 妈呀！须弥人到底都排泄了些什么东西啊…
- Hmm. You didn't go ahead and save the world while we split up to investigate, now did you? ｜ 啊，在我们分头调查的这段时间里，你该不会顺路去拯救了一次世界吧？
- Atea ｜ 阿伽娅

- Yes! I thought that since the Geo Archon in Liyue is so diligent, and personally guards Liyue Harbor, and also helps to guide its overall development... ｜ 对啊！我想璃月的岩之神那么勤勉，又是亲自守护璃月港，又是帮大家制订发展方案的…
- #Cheers, {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, and the little lady too. Smile, and may you have a wonderful day. ｜ #干杯，{M#先生}{F#小姐}，还有小小的女士，笑一个吧。愿你们度过美好的一天。
- No problem, I'll be waiting for you here. ｜ 没关系，我会等你准备好的。
- When It Snows ｜ 下雪的时候…
- Heavy Hit Taken: I ｜ 重受击·其一
- ... ｜ ……
- Greater Lord Rukkhadevata... So the former Dendro Archon and King Deshret were never enemies at all... ｜ 大慈树王…前代草神，与赤王竟然不是敌对关系。
- ...A fully automated irrigation system. ｜ …全自动灌溉机关。
- Hah, what are you talking about? I wouldn't be here if I was afraid of the heat! ｜ 这是什么话，怕烫我就不会来这边泡啦！
- Okay... So a riddle needs to have a bait-and-switch... ｜ 原来是这样…诗谜会用其他东西来迷惑大家…
- The boss has a lot of unpleasant memories from his past, but he still manages to stay positive. I'd say that kind of resilience is pretty rare. He treats us well and his character has a good effect on everyone in the gang. Of course, it's never an excuse for him to run amok with no consideration for others. Just let me know if he ever causes you any trouble and I'll be sure to make him regret ever being rude to you. ｜ 老大有很多不算愉快的过去，却还能保持快乐阳光，挺难得的。他对我们很不错，他的纯粹也感染着荒泷派的大家。当然，这不能成为他横冲直撞影响别人的借口。如果他找你麻烦，尽管告诉我。我会好好收拾他，让他后悔对你无礼。
- Default ｜ 默认
- Yes... My apologies for worrying your friend, but only the two of you have surpassing compatibility with the local spirit veins, which is why I could only invite you in. ｜ #嗯…抱歉，因为只有{NICKNAME}和派蒙与本地的灵脉相容性极佳，我也只能将两位请过来。让你们的朋友担心了，实在是对不起。
- ...What a wonderful reunion, Mr. Edwin. ｜ …真是一场美妙的再会啊，艾德温先生。
- Back with the meat, yes. ｜ 肉已经带回来了。
- ... ｜ ……
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Reward for completing all achievements under "Inazuma: The Islands of Thunder and Eternity" ｜ 达成「稻妻·雷与永恒的群岛·其之一」下所有成就时获取。
- So what if... ｜ 是的话又…
- And you've got... a little floating girl with you too! That's awesome! I haven't seen any outlanders in soooo long! ｜ 和…白色的漂浮姐姐？妹妹？好开心！好久没看到外面来的人了！
- The Truesight Potion, which means it can "let people see the truth"... What's wrong with that? ｜ 「真视药剂」，嗯，就是「能让人看见真实」的意思…怎么了？
- That's not necessarily the case. I have a way to change his mind. Give me some time, Mr. Liu Su. ｜ 这也未必，我有办法，刘苏先生等着看吧。
- I absolutely adore the aquabus network — really, I'd take a picture of every last detail if I could. ｜ 我深爱着枫丹的水道交通，恨不得把巡轨船的每一个细节都刻在脑子里。
- Electro DMG ｜ 雷元素伤害
- Clerk Zhao told me to give this to you... ｜ 小昭让我送这个给你…
- Select any clue to view detailed information ｜ 选择任意线索，查看详细信息
- If you two help me promote my booth, I'll be able to hit my quota for sure! ｜ 如果有您帮忙宣传，那我一定能完成任务指标！
- CD|{param10:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param10:F1}秒
- #My standard of living in Inazuma before I can return to Fontaine depends on you, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #返回枫丹之前，我能在稻妻能过上什么样的生活，可都看你的了，{NICKNAME}！
- Witch's Scorching Hat ｜ 焦灼的魔女帽
- Notice ｜ 告示
- A common wooden bench. It is made of rather hard material, so sitting here for too long might cause you to injure your waist. ｜ 常见的木制长凳，质地较硬，久坐后可能对腰部造成损伤。
- Maiden's Distant Love ｜ 远方的少女之心
- Huh? It's you guys... Wait, what's Lady Furina doing here!? ｜ 嗯？是你们…为什么芙宁娜大人也在？
- (Best not to bother her.) ｜ （还是先不打扰她了。）
- Um... I've actually met Xavier in Inazuma... ｜ 呃…我在稻妻遇见泽维尔了…
- Read ｜ 阅读
- Good Night ｜ 晚安…
- Could you tell me about the Seven-Star Array? ｜ 关于「七星阵法」…
- Yumemiru "Juunen" Street Lamp ｜ 梦见木「重念」路灯
- Distributed Forward Supply Depot ｜ 分布式前进补给站
- It just so happens that I have a bag of beans right here. I was planning to use them to make some porridge, but I think you will find a better use for them. ｜ 我这里正好有一袋豆子，本来是煮粥用的，交给你们好了。
- Destroy all the Pufferfruit ｜ 击破所有胖胖果
- Attention! Please evacuate upwards and outwards, upwards and outwards! If you're already at the topmost layer, then try to move as far outwards as possible! ｜ 各位，听到广播请马上去避难！向外撤离，向外撤离！先向上，如果已经抵达最高层，就继续向外！
- Okay. ｜ 我知道了。
- Okay, I'll be rooting for you! Good luck! ｜ 姐姐会一直支持你的，加油哦。
- I didn't expect to see you here, but I have to disagree... Abandoning one's comrades is not the way of a warrior. ｜ 没想到会在这里见到你，不过很遗憾，我不认为舍弃同伴是战士应有的行为。
- A Leisurely Sip ｜ 午后闲茶
- Tell me about the Court of Fontaine. ｜ 关于枫丹廷…
- No, not at all. ｜ 不会，不用担心。
- But what happened just then? A vishap turned up to help, and Pahsiv disappeared... ｜ 不过刚刚是怎么回事？为什么会有一只龙蜥过来帮忙，珀西芙也不见了…
- Mechanical Crab ｜ 机械螃蟹
- In ancient language, trees and plants' language, the meaning of "Yajna Grass" was "the falling petals." ｜ 流传很久的语言里，草木的语言里，「谢落」的意思，「耶然草」。
- Young Iktomisaurus ｜ 年幼的暝视龙
- Yeah... Didn't she say she used it all up? ｜ 对啊，她明明说她已经耗尽了力量…

---
### Part 012

- Uh, what's that supposed to mean? ｜ 欸，这话怎么说？
- There was a border incident on Wuwang Hill about a dozen years ago. My dad tried using the Art of Homa to burn away the fetor, but he slipped up and suffered a lethal exposure to it. He died on the spot. ｜ 十多年前在无妄坡，边界异动，他用护摩秘法焚烧死气，却不慎沾染太多，当场把自己送走。
- You have no idea how long we've been waiting here! Hahaha! Let's go, Ushi!!! ｜ 哈哈哈哈哈！本大爷在此恭候多时了！阿丑！！
- Come along, then. From the look of you, you must be an experienced adventurer. ｜ 那就跟我来吧，看你的模样，想必也是位经验丰富的冒险家。
- A feather-shaped token that was brought forth from a secluded hall. The compassion of its creator led to it being left within that mansion along with a certain slumbering form. ｜ 于避世之幽馆中一同带出的箭羽状的凭证，因创造者的怜悯之情，而与某具沉睡之躯一同置于馆中。
- We reported it to the Akademiya many times, but they never sent anyone to deal with it. We didn't want anything bad happening, so we were going to cancel all the stage performances. ｜ 我们向教令院报告了好几次，可他们一直不派人来处理，那几周害怕发生事故，我们只好把剧场的演出停了。
- Appeared out of nowhere... I don't think so. ｜ 突然冒出来的…我没听说。
- Elemental Mastery Bonus|{param12:I} ｜ 元素精通提升|{param12:I}点
- Ah, this room seems to be a connected suite. My brother will be staying on the other side of the suite. ｜ 这屋子看起来是个套房，隔壁就是我弟弟的房间了。
- Uh huh. Very reasonable of you. ｜ 说得真是理直气壮…
- But ever since she got hooked on fishing, she won't play with us anymore. And she even says we'll scare the fish away! ｜ 但自从她迷上钓鱼以后，就不愿意陪我们玩了。还说我们会把鱼吓跑！

- <color=#f39001>After the above characters join your party, Max HP, ATK, and DEF are increased by 20%.</color> ｜ <color=#f39001>上述角色编入队伍后，生命值上限、攻击力与防御力提升20%。</color>
- The sole path to the Night Kingdom. Once home to ancient dragonkind, now reduced to ruins. Influenced by the Abyss, the site harbors many unforeseen dangers... ｜ 前往夜神之国的必经之路。这里曾归属于远古的龙族，而今却已成废墟。受深渊影响，遗迹内还有许多不可预料的危险…
- A dish that needs true skill to make. Eight kinds of meat and vegetables, known as the eight treasures, are stuffed into a deboned duck. This is then molded into the shape of a gourd, to represent good fortune and auspiciousness. Exquisite ingredients, superb cutting skills, and phenomenal timing are all needed, that the finished dish might be worthy of its place as the final course at any banquet. ｜ 实至名归的功夫菜。往拆骨仔鸭中填入荤素搭配的八种馅料，是为八宝。塑成葫芦形状，取其福禄吉祥之意。用料考究、刀工高超、火候精湛，三者缺一不可，故而成品足以在任何宴席上作为压轴主菜隆重登场。
- Very true... Even if Yelena's death was her own choice, I wouldn't call myself innocent either. ｜ 的确…而且就算明白了叶莲娜赴死的原因，我也不觉得自己是无辜的。

- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- Thanks so much for those amazing potions you and Paimon made!\nLynette and I have been rehearsing nonstop for a whole slew of new magic tricks lately, and we completely wore ourselves out to the point of not even being able to concentrate properly...\nLuckily, Freminet brought us a kind of invigorating potion, and it cleared our minds right up! He said a merchant from Sumeru was reselling it from another supplier.\nI found the merchant, and after exchanging a few words, I learned that the inventors of the potion were none other than you and Paimon! Bravo, no less than I'd expect!\nThanks to your help, Lynette and I successfully mastered a brand new program for the penultimate act of our show.\nWe'll send you an invitation to our next performance in advance, so be sure not to miss it! ｜ 谢谢你和派蒙的奇妙药剂啦！\n前段时间，我和琳妮特排练了太多新魔术，有些累过头了，以至于有些集中不了精力…\n好在菲米尼为我们带来了一种药剂，提神醒脑的效果很不错，说是从须弥回来的商人转卖的新产品。\n我找到那位商人，和他聊了几句才知道，原来这种药剂的发明者是你和派蒙，不愧是你们！\n多亏你们的帮助，我和琳妮特顺利排练出了新的压轴节目。\n下次演出时，我会提前给你们发邀请函的，请记得收信哦！
- #{NICKNAME}, are you ready? Paimon will wait here for you! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你准备好了吗？我会在这里乖乖等你的！

- I made this mask for myself, after visiting the Children of Echoes a few times and getting some of their craftspeople to teach me a few things. My intuition told me to base it on the mask that Fietena wore on her second time fighting in the Night Warden Wars. She wasn't yet "The Fearless Rock" that she'd go on to become, but in that battle she still managed to conquer her fears and defeat all the monsters who confronted her. I believed that that mask could become an endless source of courage for me, and based on my experience since, I was right! ｜ 我去过几次「回声之子」后，跟着那里的工匠学会了一点手艺，做出了我的面具！我凭直觉参考了菲耶蒂娜第二次参与「巡夜者战争」时的面具款式，那时的她还没有成为「无畏的山岩」，但她挺过了恐惧，战胜了所有强敌！我相信那个面具会带给我无尽的勇气，后来证明，我的直觉确实没有错！

- A sturdily-built skirmisher armed with an Electro-powered war-hammer.\nAs a Fatui soldier, one has access to munificent resources: salaries, armaments, and supplies.\nBut at the same time, it also means much time away from home and family and putting one's life in the hands of comrades one has never met. ｜ 体格健壮的先遣队士兵，装备了附有雷元素的战锤。\n成为愚人众的军人意味着优渥的资源：军饷、武装与物资。\n但与此同时，也意味着远离故土与亲眷，将余命交给过去不曾谋面的战友。

- I'm sorry, it's gonna take me some time to calm back down... ｜ 对不起，我还需要一些时间，调整心情…
- While Electrosurge is active, create a <color=#f39001>Thundercloud</color> that randomly uses one of the following attacks at intervals: \n1. <color=#b863ee>Thundercloud Strike</color>: Deals Electro DMG to opponents within the AoE, and the active character gains <color=#f39001>{1}</color> Elemental Energy;\n2. <color=#0075de>Thundercloud Rainstorm</color>: Deals Hydro DMG to opponents within the AoE, and the active character is healed for <color=#f39001>{2}%</color> HP ｜ 电涌效果持续期间，将生成<color=#f39001>雳云</color>，间歇性进行随机攻击：\n1.<color=#b863ee>雳云落雷</color>：对影响范围内的敌人造成雷元素伤害，为当前场上角色恢复<color=#f39001>{1}</color>点元素能量；\n2.<color=#0075de>雳云暴雨</color>：对影响范围内的敌人造成水元素伤害，为当前场上角色恢复<color=#f39001>{2}%</color>生命值

- Even the larger gentleman from the first time is missing. I think... they must be hiding somewhere. ｜ 甚至就连上一次那位胖胖的先生也不见了。我猜…他们躲在其他地方。
- Uh... I'm not against doing business. But what's all this about? Are you afraid that I won't honor our agreement? ｜ 那个…做生意我不排斥。但你们这是做什么？难道怕我毁约吗？
- I'll get Mamoru and Genta somewhere safe and tell them to stay put. Then... I'll go south, you go north? ｜ 等我安顿好阿守和元太，警告他们不要乱跑，就往南边查看。能麻烦你先在北边看看吗？
- This indicates that what he said is highly credible. As such, we've decided to launch an investigation based on the leads he provided. ｜ 这意味着他说的话有很高的可信度，我们决定围绕他提供的线索展开调查。
- Message ｜ 留言
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 6 consecutive spear strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to perform an upward thrust.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.\nXiao does not take DMG from performing Plunging Attacks. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多六段的连续枪击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，进行上挑攻击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。\n魈进行下落攻击时，不会承受坠落伤害。
- Um, excuse me... ｜ 那个，抱歉打扰一下…
- Does it have to do with my past experiences? ｜ 和我之前的经历有关吗？
- Tell me more about your dream. ｜ 关于你的梦想…
- Hahahaha... All right, give our son a break, you old geezer. ｜ 呵呵呵…行了，老头子，笑你亲儿子这么起劲…
- And they're in better condition than any of us are... ｜ 它们好着呢，比咱们都好。
- NO! ｜ 不是啦！
- Here they are. ｜ 拿到了。
- Pleasure to meet you. ｜ 请多指教啦。

- How could this be...? ｜ 怎么会这样…？

- Well, that's true, but this is a Gnosis we're talking about. Doesn't this seem a bit... irresponsible? ｜ 可就算这么说…那可是神之心呀？是不是还是有些草率了？

- He's just trying to butter you up! Even Paimon can tell. He's just saying whatever it takes to persuade you. ｜ 是场面话啦！连我都听出来了，欧洛伦说的都是好听的场面话。

- You traitor! This is mutiny! ｜ 真讨厌！叛徒！
- Argh! ｜ 呃！
- Ah, I see. You must be the traveler that Lady Furina mentioned. Listen, I'll be perfectly honest with you... I'd avoid getting mixed up in this whirlpool of a mess if I were you. ｜ 原来如此，你就是芙宁娜大人提到的异乡旅人。但我丑话说在先，你们还是别趟这浑水为妙。
- Of course, a big shot like you is often mentioned by the guests... But don't you worry! I'm not one to go around telling others your business. ｜ 当然啦，您这样的大人物，也经常会被客人们提起…但请您别担心！我可没有将您的任何信息白白转达给别人。
- Did you finish dealing with the Jinn matter? ｜ 怎么…？镇灵大人的事…您忙完了？
- "I once tried to make you understand... But just as it was with those of our line who sought wisdom through the pools of flame, knowledge and acceptance are two different things." ｜ 「我曾试图让你理解…但就跟通过焰池去知晓智慧的族裔一样，知晓和真正的接受是两码事。」

- Well, you should wear more layers for starters, or you might freeze. ｜ 说到这个，在这里活动一定要多穿些，可别被冻到了。

- After a character triggers a Swirl reaction, the DMG dealt by all party members is increased by <color=#f39000>{0}%</color> for <color=#f39000>{1}</color>s.\nWhen characters trigger <color=#f39000>{2}</color> Swirl reactions, you will gain Afterimaged Might:\nDMG dealt by all party members is increased by <color=#f39000>{3}%</color> for <color=#f39000>{4}</color>s, and they will drop Elemental Particle(s) that will restore <color=#f39000>{5} Energy</color> for the character. This effect can occur once every <color=#f39000>{6}</color>s. 1 Swirl reaction will be counted as part of this effect every <color=#f39000>{7}</color>s.\nYou will encounter powerful opponents after obtaining Afterimaged Might. ｜ 角色触发扩散反应后，队伍中所有角色造成的伤害提升<color=#f39000>{0}%</color>，持续<color=#f39000>{1}</color>秒；\n角色触发<color=#f39000>{2}</color>次扩散反应后，将获得「残像威能」：\n队伍中所有角色造成的伤害提升<color=#f39000>{3}%</color>，持续<color=#f39000>{4}</color>秒，并产生能恢复<color=#f39000>{5}</color>点元素能量的元素微粒。该效果每<color=#f39000>{6}</color>秒至多触发1次。每<color=#f39000>{7}</color>秒至多记录1次扩散反应。\n获得「残像威能」后，将遭遇强敌。

- Well, if that's everything, how about we call it a day? ｜ 没什么事，就先散了？
- Is Cyno alright? He didn't get injured, did he? ｜ 赛诺还好吗？有没有受伤？
- Xudong told me that he wanted to make a sweet and soft dish for dessert based on Inazuma's Tricolor Dango. But it would take several special ingredients to do so. ｜ 旭东说，他想要结合稻妻的「三彩团子」，做一道甜甜的软软的甜品，但是需要几种特别的食材。
- Some things in this world can never be brought back, and they can never be changed, which is why there is emotion in the human world. ｜ 正因为有些事不能挽回也不能改变，人间才会有情感。
- Once you've gathered the Seagrass, please bring them back to me. ｜ 采到海草之后，就拿过来给我吧。
- I'm sure that your charisma would bowl them over to the point where you'd be guaranteed another three weeks' worth of headlines — not to mention the requisite royalties. ｜ 他们一定会再次被您的魅力折服，心甘情愿地把接下来三周的头版和稿酬都留给您！

- Go to the campsite that has been occupied by Treasure Hoarders ｜ 前往被盗宝团占据的营地
- If we had taken our time from the start... Perhaps feeding them every day and trying to get closer to them might have boosted our chances! ｜ 要是一开始就多花些时间，比如说每天给它们喂食，再慢慢接近的话，说不定成功率会高很多呢！
- A classic "starry-night"-colored firework. Sure to be a magnificent, unforgettable sight. ｜ 「满天星」色的经典烟花，瑰丽的色彩令人过目难忘。
- Understood, I'll handle things from here. ｜ 明白。

- Oh yeah? Well then, I'll have to clear my schedule. ｜ 哦？那我可得早点开始预约了。
- Well, if you say so, Razor. Guess we'll have to take Tone-Deaf Bard's word on this one. We'll give it a try, and as first-time wine-makers, there's no shame if it turns out bad! ｜ 既然雷泽都这么说了，还是要相信卖唱的呀。试试吧，第一次酿酒的新手，就算失败也不可耻！
- Yakov, what did the commander say to you that's got you so down? ｜ 雅科夫，长官说了你些什么，你这么垂头丧气的。
- Anyway, I am much happier now than when I was in Gandharva Ville, and I don't get beaten... I appreciate your kindness. But right now, it'd be for the best if you left me alone... ｜ 反正我现在过得比在化城郭时开心多啦，也不会挨打…我知道你们是为我好，但是现在，不要管我才是对我最好的…
- Straight to the point, I see. Works for me. ｜ 话说的够直白了，这样也好。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Yep, it was all because of you... ｜ 好好好。
- It's a rule of the Scions of the Canopy: Only those who pass the trial have the right to draw graffiti! You've gotta be brave enough to leap from the peaks over there, but do you have the guts? ｜ 这「悬木人」有个规矩，只有突破了试炼，敢从那边最高峰一跃而下的勇者才能获得画涂鸦的资格，你敢吗？

- So, to summarize — the location of the "hazardous materials" and the second gem are a complete mystery, and now Nilou is missing as well. ｜ 总之现在的情况是——危险品和另一块宝石下落不明，妮露小姐也不见踪影。

- When Xingqiu's Elemental Skill hits opponents, they will form Rain Swords that protect him and his allies. His Elemental Burst activates Rainbow Bladework, which will immediately summon the largest possible number of Rain Swords, and launch consecutive attacks at opponents along with Xingqiu and his allies.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 行秋的元素战技击中敌人时，会生成保护自己和同伴的「雨帘剑」。而他的元素爆发则可以展开「虹剑势」，在一瞬间生成最大数量的「雨帘剑」，同时「虹剑势」也可以响应行秋和同伴的攻击，连携制敌。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

- Traveler... you seem to know this mountain well. Could I trouble you to do me a favor? ｜ 旅行者…我感觉你好像相当熟悉雪山，能拜托你帮个忙吗？
- Well, this should do the trick! Let's bring this water back to Nermin! ｜ 嗯！这一壶水应该够用了，我们把这壶水带回去给内尔敏小姐吧。
- Hold on! I'm not finished yet! ...Don't forget to search the ruins thoroughly. And if you find anything of interest, come back and let me know. ｜ 喂，听我说完再走！记住了，一定要仔细搜索遗迹，如果有什么发现，就带回来告诉我。
- Home... ｜ 回家…
- Art? Me? ...Does knitting sweaters count? ｜ 艺术吗？织毛衣算不算？
- Let me think... ｜ 我想想…
- A Mari Usque Ad Mare ｜ 从大海到大海
- Please, I'm begging you! They might still be nearby... I need to disappear as soon as possible, and you're the only one who can help make that happen! ｜ 别啊！那群家伙说不定还在附近，你就再帮我一把，让我快点离开这吧，拜托了！
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- No niceties, no holds barred, and no lofty pretenses of glory in battle. This is a raw, all-out, and honest brawl! Has the clean-cut sterility of traditional bouts left you falling asleep from boredom? Fear not! In Natlan's underground fighting ring, a new tournament is shaping up to be exactly what you're looking for! ｜ 没有极限，拒绝格调，甚至也并非荣耀之战，一切只为拳拳到肉的激斗！无聊的正规赛是否已经让你昏昏欲睡？没关系，在纳塔隐秘的地下赛场，新的格斗赛正拉开大幕——
- I... I wouldn't dare! ｜ 我…我不敢！
- Soletl ｜ 苏雷特
- Do you like it here? ｜ 在这里还习惯吗？
- Hello. ｜ 你好。
- Oh, you're so thoughtful. Why didn't I think of that? Even if I had to force it down his throat... ｜ 啊，你真好，我怎么就想不起来直接给他带点吃喝，逼他吃也是吃。
- (...Oh, wait! We're supposed to be roleplaying. I should stay in character.) ｜ （…！不对，现在是在桌团的剧本里，我应该表演才对。）
- But why did they suspect him, and not us? ｜ 但为什么怀疑的不是我们…
- Have you obtained the timber? I just need one set of Fir Wood and another of Birch Wood. ｜ 你拿到木材了吗？只要一份杉木和一份桦木就好了。
- ...You guessed it! I'm the head of the Barbara Fan Club! ｜ 你大概已经猜到了，没错，我就是芭芭拉粉丝应援会会长！
- Slow down! It's dangerous in here. ｜ 别冲这么快呀，遗迹里很危险的。

- Paimon highly doubts that... ｜ 应该不可能吧！

- This grassroots organization founded by people who love fishing has members throughout Teyvat. They are innately passionate about fishing, as if the ripples from every fish caught flood into their yearning souls.\n"Let's become fishing buddies, eh?" ｜ 钓鱼爱好者们组成的民间组织，成员遍布大陆各地，对钓鱼有着本能的热情，似乎每条鱼儿被钓出水面时的涟漪，都会漾进他们渴望的灵魂。\n「一起成为钓鱼佬吧！」
- Maiden Beloved ｜ 被怜爱的少女
- ...B—But if I do end up going overboard, you'll have to call for Estampe! He'd definitely be better at this than I am! ｜ …但、但要是我真翻了，你可得把埃斯唐普叫来！他肯定比我擅长搞定这些！
- Well, just think, little Paimon! These passes are usually given to those who can do long-term guard duty, but I'm just a tribe Courier... ｜ 你想啊，小派蒙，通行证往往给的是那些能够长时间在这里进行看守工作的人，而我则是一名悬木人的讯使…
- Hehe, even I sometimes miss the cool mountain streams, and the great rivers that would ebb and flow with the seasons. I mean, I was once a mere fish that swam... ｜ 呵呵，就连我偶尔也会怀念恣意流淌的清凉山涧、随四时起落的大河呢。毕竟，我也曾经只是一尾游鱼…
- By the way, Paimon had the most amazing Blazed Meat Stew this morning. ｜ 顺带一提，今天早上我吃了超级好吃的火焰炖肉。
- Feelings About Ascension: Climax ｜ 突破的感受·转

- I will wait for you here, at home, my friend. As I ever have. ｜ 我会在家里等你的，好朋友，一如既往。
- See you... ｜ 再见…
- Borenka ｜ 鲍连卡

- Although people may initially feel a little uncomfortable with the loss of the Akasha, they will soon understand that this life is more suitable for them. ｜ 现在人们还会为失去虚空感到不适应，但不用多久，大家就会明白，这样的生活才更好、更适合他们。
- Farewell. Remember to smell the flowers and take in the sights as you travel. ｜ 再见。旅途漫漫，不如走慢一点。
- Why do you ask? ｜ 为什么问这个呀？
- A collection of folk stories, myths, and legends from Liyue. It's quite a page-turner. This segment features the stories of Seelie living in the mountains. ｜ 璃月流传的诸多志怪传奇故事合集，收录了许多短小精悍，脍炙人口的轶事，大多为民俗题材。本篇讲述了神秘的山中仙灵的故事。

- After using Elemental Skill, increases Normal Attack and Charged Attack DMG by 30% for 15s. ｜ 施放元素战技后的15秒内，普通攻击与重击造成的伤害提高30%。
- Next thing you know, a knight on patrol passes by, completely unsuspecting, when suddenly "Waah!" A monster jumps out and clubs him over the head with a "bish" and a "bash." ｜ 巡逻的骑士毫无戒备地路过，结果「哇！」地跳出来一只魔物，「砰！」地给他一棒。
- Haha, look! Look, my clan's history is true as well. There's that same unforgeable signature again, right here! ｜ 哈，看看！我们家族的历史也是真实的。这里一样有无法伪造的签名。
- Yeah! He's sure to know what's going on. ｜ 嗯！他应该知道现在的情况。
- ...Wait, what do you mean, "either"? ｜ …你为什么要说「也」？
- May Barbatos' gentle wind be with you. ｜ 再见，愿巴巴托斯大人温柔的风与您同在。
- Given how few of us are left, I think it's time we cut our losses. This base is as good as gone. ｜ 就现在残存的战斗力来看，我觉得已经不得不放弃这个营地了。
- Until the End of the World ｜ 直至世界尽头
- Ah, you must've met my elder sister downstairs, huh? ｜ 啊，您一定是在楼下见到了我的姐姐吧！
- Suddenly, the door to the restaurant bursts open as if struck by a hurricane... ｜ 突然，餐厅的大门哗然洞开，如同被飓风冲撞了一般…
- The standard outdoor streetlight in Fontaine, commonly seen along roads in the wilds. These lights have a unique four-segmented lamp post design with a distinct arc. This is designed to withstand impacts from wildlife, such as Armored Crabs lured by the light from shallow waters. If a streetlight is damaged, its damaged components can be replaced instead of requiring an entirely new lamp post, effectively reducing maintenance costs. ｜ 标准的枫丹野外路灯，可见于野外道路侧边，采用了独特的四段式灯杆设计，并呈现出一种独特的弧形。这样的设计是为了承受某些野外生物的冲击，比如被灯光从浅滩吸引过来的重甲蟹。若是路灯不幸受损，也能更换相应的部件，而非重新制作一整根灯杆，大大降低了维护成本。
- Dreambloom: Pearbell ｜ 梦里花·棠铃
- You're, uh... freaking me out a little. ｜ 有点被吓到了…

Toss a stage firecracker to attack an opponent, which can deal <color=#FF9999>Pyro</color> DMG.\nWhen Genevieve's research hits a bottleneck, she often chops firewood to relieve stress. Her arms are far stronger than they look, so she can throw exceptionally large firecrackers that are no less dangerous than many explosives... ｜ 格内薇芙的战技，抛掷营造舞台效果的爆竹打击对手。命中后，可以造成<color=#FF9999>火元素</color>伤害。\n格内薇芙在研究遇到瓶颈时，经常去劈柴解压，臂力也远比看上去要强，所以能投出装药量格外大的重型爆竹，威力甚至不输一些炸药…

- There is nothing all that special about it, yeah. ｜ 确实没什么特别的…

- #Don't think I didn't see you! ...Following {M#him}{F#her} around and conjuring up all sorts of weird, scary stuff. ｜ #我可是看到了，你们悄悄跟在{NICKNAME}身后，变出各种奇怪的东西想要吓人。
- I don't want to know! It's knowing things that causes all my problems. ｜ 我也不想知道啊…就是因为知道的事多了，才会有问题。
- You find an old diary. ｜ 你们发现了一本旧日志。

- I've got other matters to attend to at the moment... ｜ 还有别的事…
- My favorite client! ｜ 稀客呀。

- I've actually hidden the last stone slate somewhere safe. I just wanted to guard against— ｜ 最后一块石板，其实我已经藏在了一个安全的地方，只是为了防备——
- Although Ako Domeki's fleet was also hit by the storm and was nearly wiped out as a result, the fleet that the Shogunate sent was also all but lost with all hands, with the remnants being forced to retreat to Narukami Island. It would be quite some time before the fleet was ready again. ｜ 虽然赤穗百目鬼的船队也被雷暴波及，几乎全灭…但幕府派来清籁岛的船队也几乎全军覆没，被迫退回鸣神岛，过了一段时间才重整好了船队。
- Yep. She's no stranger to rare and precious treasures, but I'd wager that, to her, the chance to relax and get a good night's sleep is rarer than any treasure in her collection. ｜ 是啊，反正奇珍异宝她也见惯了，如果能彻底放松，睡个好觉，对她来说可能更加稀罕吧。
- Also, we meditated with Canotila to get here, but we're the only two people around right now... ｜ 对了，刚才我们应该是和夏诺蒂拉一起通过「冥想」进到这里面来的，结果现在只有我们在这里…
- #Well then, allow me to share some of the adeptal energy dwelling in the mortal world with you, {NICKNAME}, to aid you in traversing the landscape and piercing the fog. ｜ #那么，请让我将行走尘世的仙力分予{NICKNAME}，帮助你们穿过山水与迷雾。
- Ugh, that door closed just like that. Guess this is how that Wolfgang guy got trapped in here... ｜ 唔…门一下子关上了，原来那个叫「沃尔夫冈」的家伙就是这样被关起来的呀…
- Uh, does that mean... we lost? Seems like we're supposed to get up before it counts down to a "ding!" or we lose... ｜ 咦，输了吗，好像在倒计时到「咚！」之前得及时站起来呢…

- But, since we're here, I still think we should go inside and explore in full. ｜ 不过既然已经走到这里，我认为，我们还是应该进去一探究竟。

- Neuvillette called it "a nation of dragons," but that description doesn't give us much to go off of... ｜ 那维莱特曾说那里是「龙」的国度，但究竟是个什么样的地方，还是挺神秘的呢。

- Fontaine's Maison Gardiennage is conducting tactical training, and the Gardes are hoping to improve their performance in the <color=#F39000>simulated pursuit</color>. ｜ 枫丹执律庭正在开展战术训练，警备队员希望能在<color=#F39000>模拟追捕战</color>中取得更好的成绩。
- Finally, the tribes' warriors and Saurians, exhausting their spirit, flesh, and blood, found a way to use the Iridescent Inscription, fashioning giant stone nails out of solid phlogiston... ｜ 最后，部族里的勇士与龙啊，耗尽自己的精神与血肉，用固态燃素雕琢出巨大的石钉，想办法利用了「镌光铭印」…

- ??? ｜ ？？？

- We seek to purchase "Kazeni's Lost Golden Statues." The price is negotiable. Please contact our shop owner. ｜ 本店诚收「卡兹尼的失落金人」，价格可与店主当面详谈。
- A dessert made of egg whites. Despite trying to froth up the egg whites until your hands were sore, and although you tried to save it by spreading the mixture over the sauce you prepared, the two melt into a total mess... Uh, how about thinking of it as a new beverage and having a sip? ｜ 蛋清制成的甜点。尽管手都酸了还是没能让蛋清在打发的时候变成固态，勉强放到准备好的酱汁上，结果两者几乎融为了一体…呃，要不当饮料喝一口试试看？
- Someone's Diary I: Yaoguang Shoal ｜ 谁人的日志·其一·瑶光滩
- Ballads of the Squire (I) ｜ 侍从骑士之歌·上篇
- Herb grower Vardan and his son Gurgen are distressed by something... ｜ 种植草药的瓦尔坦与古尔根父子正为某件麻烦事苦恼不已…
- Characters' Elemental Skill Cryo DMG increased by 75%. ｜ 角色的元素战技造成的冰元素伤害提升75%。
- But there's nothing I can do. I'm a Fatuus after all. ｜ 那也没办法，谁叫我是个愚人众呢。
- Aren't you the Treasure Hoarders...? ｜ 你们不是盗宝团吗…
- Would you like to have a chat with me? ｜ 想一起聊聊天吗？
- If you want to place an order for any drinks, let us know, and we'll take the order for you! ｜ 你想订购什么饮品，就尽管和我们说吧，我们帮你去下单！
- Historical research...? ｜ 历史研究…？
- The concept behind Kirara's outfit is really original. ｜ 绮良良衣装的概念很新颖。
- And I'm not exactly a top-tier talent. *sigh* There's nothing going for me... I guess I'll just have to go back home and take over the three jade mining facilities my old man left behind, and just try my best to get by in life. ｜ 我这人也没什么本事，只能回去继承老爷子留下的三座玉石矿，勉强过日子吧…
- Well, since we're here, why don't we take a look around the area? ｜ 既然来到这里了，我们也在附近逛逛吧。
- Activates Constellation ｜ 命之座激活
- A mistake... ｜ 错漏…
- #Paimon's name is Paimon, and {M#he's}{F#she's} {NICKNAME}, who also happens to be a member of the Adventurers' Guild! ｜ #我叫派蒙，{M#他}{F#她}是{NICKNAME}。其实{M#他}{F#她}也是冒险家协会的成员哦。
- Yeah, it's time to get this over with. We've still got a long journey ahead of us! ｜ 是啊，赶紧解决，赶紧继续我们的旅程，还有好多事没干呢！
- Mmhmm, I talked to Katheryne, but she's really strange. All she said was "ad astra abyssosque," and she never told me which member was behind this... ｜ 嗯，我有去找凯瑟琳说这件事，可是她好怪，除了会说「向着星辰与深渊」，都不告诉我到底是哪个成员干了这些坏事…
- A traditional snack from Liyue. The fresh dough is turned out into a round, rested, and then placed inside a cage to steam. The meat and vegetables are then washed and diced, before being fried quickly in an oiled wok. When eaten, the fried condiments must be placed into the empty space in the middle of the buns before they are eaten together. Between the crisp vegetables and the flavorful meat, this is solid, great flavor. ｜ 璃月民间流传的小菜。将新鲜面团转动塑形，醒面后放入笼屉蒸熟，再将蔬菜与肉洗净切丁，下油锅爆炒。食用时，需将炒好的馅料填进中空的面团一同品尝。菜脆肉香，风味相宜。
- I see. Huh... I should visit my maintenance personnel sometime. Oh, I'm fine. I better go. Thank you. ｜ 是这样啊，嗯…有空该找找维护人员了。啊，我没事，一会儿我就回去了，谢谢你们。
- Still, my researcher's intuition is telling me that the danger ahead is incomparable to the dangers we've faced so far! ｜ 但是学者的直觉告诉我，前面的危险和此前的危险根本不可同日而语！
- This can't be... There's no sign of Benben here either. Do we have to go even further? ｜ 怎么会这样…这里也没有奔奔的线索，还要再往前吗？
- Vana never forgets. Aranara never forget. But Aranara leave behind memories that can be seen. Since the bad guys arrived, there have been bad seeds everywhere... ｜ 桓那不会忘记，兰那罗不会忘记，但是兰那罗留下看得到的记忆。坏家伙来了以后，四处都是坏种子…
- A gaze from the dark Abyss controls your actions... ｜ 来自黑渊的凝视控制了你的行动…
- Go to the Fatui stronghold ｜ 前往愚人众的据点
- Quicksand Treasure Hunter (II) ｜ 流沙的寻宝者·其二
- Complete 2 Heated Battle Mode matches ｜ 完成2场热斗模式对局
- Whoa! That one looks ultra strong! ｜ 呜哇，这只鬼兜虫，好厉害！
- I don't know how to explain it, but I like her, and that's that! ｜ 道理，我不会讲，但喜欢就是喜欢！
- Use <color=#FFE14BFF>Cryo Skills</color> to temporarily disable flamethrowers' cores and stop them from shooting fire. ｜ 利用<color=#FFE14BFF>冰元素</color>停止核心运转，可以使喷火机关暂时瘫痪
- That's true, it really is. Very suspicious... ｜ 啊！确实很丑！太可疑了！
- Any recommendations? ｜ 有什么推荐…
- #Good morning, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #早，{NICKNAME}。
- Why use your hands when a machine can do the work? It would be a waste not to use the latest technology, and wasting is a kind of crime. ｜ 能用机器的话，谁还用手啊，放着最前沿的科技不好好利用，就是一种浪费，而浪费就是一种犯罪。
- Plunge DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param9:F1P}
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Some scoundrels are plotting ill, threatening the safety of the surrounding area. If you can sneak into their encampment and filch their supplies, you are sure to greatly reduce their strength. ｜ 一群不怀好意的家伙出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全。如果能潜入营地，取走他们的物资，想必就能大大削弱他们的力量。
- Oh! Traveler, Paimon! I have something amazing to tell you! ｜ 哦~！旅行者，小派蒙！你们听我说哦！
- Traveling Merchant ｜ 旅行商人
- That's why I opened this place. Got to make a living somehow. ｜ 所以我就开了这么个店，没办法，要生活的嘛。
- You're welcome! ...But, have you been waiting for us here this whole time? ｜ 哼哼，不用客气——对了，安柏是在这里等我们吗？
- Xiao Lanterns that are <color=#FFCC33>the same color as the fireworks</color> contain <color=#FFCC33>Challenge Coins</color>... ｜ <color=#FFCC33>与烟花颜色相同</color>的霄灯中藏有<color=#FFCC33>「挑战币」</color>…
- Good morning, Fischl. ｜ 早啊，菲谢尔。
- Something to Share: Lantern Rite ｜ 有什么想要分享·海灯节
- In the Fontaine Research Institute, you encounter Heinry, a member of the Fonta development team, and he seems to be quite busy with something... ｜ 在枫丹科学院，你遇见了枫达开发组的成员安里，他似乎正在为某事而忙碌着…
- Yep, I'm talking to you. Now, why don't you follow my lead and take a deep breath, before letting everything out like this? ｜ 没错，像我一样，深呼吸，然后把所有的声音都放出来。
- Using an Elemental Burst grants a <color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color> increase in ATK and Movement SPD for 15s. ｜ 施放元素爆发后，提高<color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>攻击力和移动速度，持续15秒。
- Collei's Constellation Activation Material ｜ 柯莱的命之座激活素材
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- "Bidii" — all may be sacrificed for the beloved land. ｜ 为了所爱之地，「庇笛」甘愿献出一切。
- Photography Target ｜ 留影目标
- Anything? ｜ 有反应了吗？
- But it's a confidential matter. Why would you read about it in The Steambird? ｜ 明明是秘密事务，为什么你会在《蒸汽鸟报》上看到呀？
- Transfigured Dreams ｜ 异梦转化
- Seven-Day Tour ｜ 七日巡礼
- Ugh... Where did all that deep stuff suddenly come from... ｜ 唔…你们怎么突然正经聊起天来啦…

- Talk to the Treasure Hoarders ｜ 与盗宝团对话
- Weapon Ascension Material.\nIn the era when the ignorant Lord of Deserts ruled, his power descended upon every inch of the land like the scorching sun.\nAncient stone tablets record that he turned his power into seven rays of blinding light or seven pillars, which he granted equally and mercifully to everyone. No one was neglected, nor was anyone discontented.\nThat was a forgotten golden era, an era when the Lord of Flowers had faded into the sands and the Lord of Verdure was determined to leave. Only the descendants in the yellow sand chose to follow their god. Even as the grim shadow of calamity loomed, the power in which they had faith shone brightly like amber and gold.\nYet calamity befell nonetheless, and the golden insectoid insignias were buried beneath the depths of shrine and palace, under collapsed pillars engraved with images of eagles and bulls. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n愚痴的黄沙之王统治的年代里，烈日般黄金的权力遍洒大地。\n古旧的石碑记录，王的威权化作七道烈光或七座柱梁；王的慈悲平均地赐予每一个人手中，没有人受到忽视，亦没有人心怀不满。\n那是一个被遗忘的黄金时代，彼时花的女王已谢落尘沙，草木的主人也决定离去。但只有黄沙的子嗣选择与他们的神祇同在，即使灾祸的阴影渐行渐近，他们所信赖的威权依旧如琥珀与黄金那般闪耀着不灭的光芒。\n但灾祸终究还是降临了，黄金的虫印也被葬在了神殿与宫阙深处、曾雕着鹫兽与牛头的破碎柱基之下。
- Hi, Ahes! Paimon's Paimon! ｜ 你好呀，艾伊丝！我是派蒙！
- Wait... You say these creatures are formed from Elemental Sedimentation, but why are there so many of them!? ｜ 呜啊…虽说是元素沉积物，但这个数量也太多了吧！
- Ningguang ｜ 凝光
- A tricky patient... ｜ 麻烦的病患…
- All this walking around working up your appetite? Why not curb your hunger with a freshly grilled Tiger Fish? ｜ 逛了半天也饿了吧，刚烤好的吃虎鱼，要吃吗？
- That's true... We just kinda waltzed in here. And it didn't seem like the lock had been broken or anything... ｜ 也是哦。刚才我们很普通地就进来了，也不像是门锁坏掉了…
- Sounds like some kind of Natlan National Games. ｜ 更像是全民运动会。
- We send takeout and play with children. ｜ 也会送餐和陪孩子们玩。
- Search the area with Elemental Sight! ｜ 赶快用元素视野看看周围的情况吧！
- Really? Wonderful, you have my most sincere gratitude. ｜ 真的？太好了，我从心底感谢你们！
- Well, let's go give Tejima his stuff back and take it from there. ｜ 总之，先把这些东西交还给手岛先生吧。
- Message ｜ 留言
- Feast of the Departed Warriors ｜ 离垢者肃心旅宴
- Bring me the processed widgets and I'll give you some Credit Coupons in exchange. ｜ 你把加工好的工件带给我，就能拿来换特许券了。
- Alright, that's enough about the Akademiya... ｜ 好了好了，不要再说教令院了…
- Purchased at the Card Shop ｜ 卡牌商店购买获得
- ...Feels wrong just leaving it there. Just a moment, Paimon'll be right back! ｜ …总觉得就这么放着不管，心里有些怪怪的。那我去去就来！

- Purification... ｜ 净化…
- But if you take a closer look, there may be something you mistook. A candle flickers to and fro, yet there is no wind to make it so. What is its secret, what could it mean, in this wood where mystery screams... ｜ 再看门口点红烛，没风照样闪忽忽…
- Let's take heart from this, and keep going. ｜ 放轻松，继续加油。
- Content does not exist ｜ 不存在的内容
- The Way of Sunfire ｜ 阳炎古道
- Defeat as many opponents as possible within the time limit ｜ 在限定时间内击败更多敌人
- An insignia in the shape of a lovely little flower that was once worn by pilgrims in times long bygone. ｜ 久远的朝圣者曾佩戴的徽记，是一朵华丽的小花。
- The Windblume Festival... ｜ 风花节…
- Then, let's go. We're all with you! ｜ 那就走吧，让我们都成为你的助力！
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Unfortunately, we don't have the manpower to split into two teams. Can we ask you to keep them occupied? ｜ 可惜我们人数不够，无法做到兵分两路…能拜托你帮忙牵制一下吗？
- Well, not exactly... ｜ 这倒不太好说…
- It's true. ｜ 是真的。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- I'll play a tune... ｜ 弹首曲子吧…
- It is a pleasant and leisurely atmosphere, not unfit for a festival. ｜ 清闲，却也有节日氛围。
- Complete "The Morn a Thousand Roses Brings." ｜ 完成「千朵玫瑰带来的黎明」剧情
- (TEST) Cocktail 25 ｜ (test)酒25
- Spreading Evil ｜ 邪恶的扩张
- Hello there. You're... ｜ 你是…
- I've seen the caliber of the other Akademiya students, they're all geniuses and fast learners. I'm nowhere near as gifted as they are... ｜ 再看看周围的同学，天才数不胜数。他们学得快，领悟得也快，而我就没有那么好的天分…
- But the commander still gave me an earful and ordered our squad to do signal reception tests. I mean, ugh, that's the toughest job around... ｜ 但是长官还是训话说，要让我们小队去各个岛上做装置的信号接收测试，那可是最辛苦的任务…
- About Shenhe ｜ 关于申鹤…
- Plunge DMG|{param8:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param8:F1P}
- Haha, you don't even know who the Dark Lord is!? ... Alright, I get it. I suppose it is up to me to educate you, O ignorant outlanders! ｜ 哈哈，连魔王都不知道吗…好吧，你们像是没见过世面的异邦人，倒也情有可原。那就让我好好给你们讲讲！
- Who knows, maybe we'll get that "sound of someone playing along" that Kazuha was talking about! ｜ 也许会有万叶说的那种跟人合奏的奇妙感觉呢！
- Food ｜ 食物
- "Where merchants flock and all ships dock"... Now I understand what that saying was trying to describe. Still, nothing beats seeing it with your own eyes! ｜ 「千船继至，万商云来」，说的就是这样一幅景象吗？嗯，还真是百闻不如一见。
- If our daughter knew how much you worry about her every day, she would be troubled, too. ｜ 要是知道你成天这么担心，女儿也不会好受的。
- I'll be taking some time for myself now. Goodbye. ｜ 接下来就是私人时间了。再见。
- What about the rumors on the road? ｜ 关于商路传闻…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Well then... If the contract is not agreed upon, I will no longer serve as your consultant on this expedition. ｜ 那么…若「契约」不能成立，我就不能继续担当顾问了。
- How about we let the Traveler attempt to make that unique dish? ｜ #不如，就让{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}来试试做这道奇菜。
- Uh, would they though... ｜ 唔…真的是这样吗…
- Actually, could I ask who Hibiki was? ｜ 对了，「阿响」是…
- You as well. It's all thanks to the help I've received from Mr. Roialte and Mr. Semaine. ｜ 您也好。这都是多亏了洛耶茨先生和瑟米安先生帮忙。
- Hello ｜ 初次见面…
- It's not quite what I expected... ｜ 和预想得好像不太一样…
- In fact, I came specifically to deliver Adepti Sigils. Master heard that Ningguang was planning to rebuild the Jade Chamber, so she sent me to deliver some Adepti Sigils to her. ｜ 其实我本就是来送仙家符箓的。师父听说了凝光重修群玉阁的事情，便叫我来送符箓给她。
- Seymour's Story: Prologue ｜ 西摩尔的故事·序章
- Duelist's Dance ｜ 决斗之舞
- Well, they seem to be getting along swimmingly. Let's not disturb them. ｜ 嘿嘿，她俩感情真好，我们还是不要去打扰她们了吧。
- I'm not sure that's the kind of feedback she had in mind... ｜ 这可不是什么有用的感想…
- Hah! So they would all say, those treacherous louts from the Akademiya. And when my guard is down, you would stab me in the back! ｜ 那些教令院派来的家伙都这么说，说不定等我放下戒备你们就会突然从背后袭击我呢。
- Still, our work wasn't in vain. ｜ 不过，努力总算没白费。

- Eh, you can thank your Mirage experiments, or whatever that was. ｜ 啊，这就是因为受到你们那个什么幻境实验的影响导致的啦。

- Why don't you head on down and check things out for yourself? Feel free to ask the staff for more details. ｜ 具体情况，你们可以直接下去看看？也可以问问在场的工作人员。
- A portion of shell removed from a Furnace Shell Mountain Weasel's back after its defeat.\nFurnace Shell Mountain Weasels accumulate Phlogiston in their shells from feeding to be used in emergencies. The sight of them blazing fiery trails over the Sacred Mountain has not been seen since ancient times. ｜ 击败炉壳山鼬后，从其背上取得的背壳的部分结构。\n炉壳山鼬会在背壳之后蕴积进食所得的燃素，以备不时之需，燃火的鼬兽在圣山中腾跃时的一抹焰色，或许是长久以来都未曾被人窥得的风景吧。
- Nope. ｜ 不能。
- Just one minute there, bro, I'm going to ask you to slow your roll. Motives and capabilities are one thing, but doing it is a whole different ball game. ｜ 停一停，我说老弟，你先停一停。有动机和条件是一回事，真要去做又是另一回事。
- Hey, since you're the famous Traveler, could you do us a favor and look for Tanger in Gandharva Ville? ｜ 对了，既然你是那位旅行者，能不能帮帮我们，去化城郭找到丹吉尔先生？
- When a Swirl Reaction is triggered on a Mechanicus, decreases its corresponding Elemental RES. ｜ 对「棋阵机关」触发扩散反应时，将使该「棋阵机关」的对应元素抗性降低。
- What? The cart's broken down? Those dastardly monsters. And here I was, wondering why my goods hadn't arrived yet! ｜ 什么！货车坏掉了？这群讨厌的怪物，我说为什么货一直没运过来！
- Would you like to have a chat with me? ｜ 想一起聊聊天吗？
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- But it's just a quick thought... It's not long before Paimon's thinking about other things... like Sticky Honey Roast. ｜ 但也只会这么想想，马上就抛到脑后去了。
- The Abyssal incursions have grown worse lately, and I've noticed that her appetite for fun has decreased considerably. Though we People of the Springs have emerged relatively unscathed, there are always others who need our help. ｜ 最近深渊入侵严重，我看她的玩心也收了不少。流泉之众算是受损较小的地方，但总有其他需要帮助的伙伴嘛。
- This great researcher and I will go look over there. You two search this place, alright? ｜ 我和这位大学者去那边看看，这里就交给二位了。
- (Now she's done it...) ｜ （就这么说出去了…）
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- That's also why I haven't been able to take action despite the urgency of the situation. ｜ 这就是为什么情况迫在眉睫，但我依然无法采取行动。

- Since it's the Windblume Festival, would you like to come to The Cat's Tail and have a few drinks? ｜ 风花节到了，要来「猫尾」酒馆小酌几杯吗？
- Smooth Wooden Bench ｜ 平整的木制长凳
- Laid-back ｜ 慵懒
- 25 Points ｜ 25分
- Very good, that is for the best. No need to pay her any more attention, we may now enjoy the show. ｜ 嗯，这样就好了，我们不用管她，看自己的演出就好。
- Fuufuu Windwheel Elemental DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 风风轮附带元素伤害|{param2:F1P}
- It's all hearsay, so it's hard to confirm. But still, they all say this happened on Erinnyes! That's no laughing matter if you ask me. ｜ 也是小道消息，所以还不能确认…但我又想到，事发地可是伊黎耶岛呢，那可是个很厉害的地方！
- A common bird feather. Experts use it to practice strength control, while rookies use it to make fans. ｜ 随处可见的鸟类落毛，高手用来练习力道，新手则用来制成扇子。
- Aradanish found! Play with me, Golden Nara? ｜ 兰陀尼什找到了！金色的那菈！来玩吗？
- Qiaoying Village ｜ 翘英庄
- Try... another way. ｜ 换…方法。
- What does Marjorie think? ｜ 问问玛乔丽。
- It's really mysterious and fascinating! Before I switched jobs, there were always surprises every time I went there! ｜ 「灰河」特别神秘，超级有趣！以前我没换工作时，每次去「灰河」都能找到新的惊喜！
- About Klee ｜ 关于可莉…
- Oh, Paimon gets it now! But according to Arama, the problems we solved were outside the dream. Was that even helpful? Helpful to Ma... Mahavana... ｜ 原来如此原来如此。不过，依照兰罗摩的说法，我们解决的是梦境之外的问题，有帮助吗？对于玛…玛哈桓那…
- She just needs time to work through it. ｜ 我们不要打扰她了。
- Due to some unknown reason, some monsters will also grow stronger when within this dark mud. ｜ 出于不明的原因，某些魔物身处「黑泥」当中时会变得更加凶暴…
- Yanfei: Friendly ｜ 烟绯·友好
- Of course, you don't have to send anything like that Semi-Automatic Tea Grinder... or whatever it was called, alright? ｜ 当然，这次不用再费尽心思送什么…「半自动茶粉研磨机」之类的礼物了。
- Why, someone's in a hurry! Then it's my turn to attack, prepare yourself! ｜ 真是急性子！那我也要快攻了，接招吧！
- I just hope he doesn't end up wrecking Cheven's store... There's no way I'll be able to reimburse her if he smashes up those gemstones. ｜ 只希望它别拱翻夏温的店面…不然我可赔不起那些宝石啊。
- Fortune Stick: Scorched Earth ｜ 灵签·燎原
- Record playback complete. ｜ 记录播放完毕。
- Talk to Qingzhou ｜ 与清昼对话
- A sundial carved from a single, large piece of jade. Its lined with a pattern that silently records the passage of time. ｜ 以整块圭璧雕琢而成的日晷，纹路层叠星罗，沉默地记录着失去的时间。
- Character Hydro RES +35% ｜ 角色水元素抗性提升35%。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Score {param2} points ｜ 得分达到{param2}
- I have a certain charm about me. ｜ 我人见人爱。
- Supposedly, she met an herb gatherer sometime during her travels and decided to settle down with him. That must have been Jialiang. ｜ 听说她在游历期间，跟一名采药人成了家，看来就是嘉良那小子了。
- If Paimon's willing... ｜ 如果派蒙本人愿意的话…
- Yep, looks like it's time for us to make a decision, too... ｜ 嗯，看来我们也是时候做出决定了。
- We have a wind glider. ｜ 有风之翼。
- Over time, those cards became the basis for Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 渐渐地，就变成了「七圣召唤」。
- Increases all party members' Max HP by <color=#3399CCFF>20–25%</color> for 300s. ｜ 队伍中所有角色生命值上限提升<color=#3399CCFF>20%-25%</color>，持续300秒。
- There's no stopping you once you're concerned about someone, huh! Come on then, let's see how she's doing! ｜ 诺艾尔一旦关心起别人来，就怎么劝也没用了呢。那就一起去看看吧！
- Why's there a Kamera here? ｜ 留影机怎么会放在这里？
- A feathered accessory that carries the longing for a certain someone, like a migratory bird on the wind. ｜ 寄托谁人的思念的羽饰，就如与风一同去往远方的候鸟。
- You're right, finding a way out together is what's most important right now. Any other complaints can be addressed once we're somewhere safe. ｜ 嗯，说得也是。现在最重要的是大家一起找到出去的路，有什么不满，等回到安全的地方了再计较也不迟嘛。
- A Magical Mix ｜ 魔术特调
- I'm curious about the giant machine, actually. ｜ 我对大机器人的情况也挺好奇的。
- You need to go out and find the original scenery? ｜ 还要取景？
- Doing Paperwork Sure Is Tough! ｜ 手续难办
- (The two people talk about various things regarding the Irodori Festival while they wait for Thoma. You can hear snatches of their conversation: "Brother, even if Thoma is here, you cannot simply forget to bring your purse"...) ｜ （两人一边等候托马，一边讨论着容彩祭的种种趣事。似乎听到了「哥哥，就算有托马在，但钱包怎么说都不该忘了带呀」什么的…）
- You spend too much time focusing on your muscles. If you took a break every now and then to chat with the couriers from the Scions of the Canopy, you might have a better idea who we're talking to... ｜ 妮扎娅的精力啊，每天只放在锻炼肌肉上，还是多和「悬木人」的讯使聊聊天会比较好哦…
- Really!? Haha, that's great! If I had gone looking for it myself, I'm sure I would've missed it. ｜ 真的吗？！哈哈，那太好了，要是我自己去找，肯定就错过了。
- As the first shikigami, I was constantly absorbing the knowledge and experiences of the replicas. I was able to improve the structure of the Domain, and provide better training for the samurai. ｜ 我作为「式神」的统筹者，会不断吸收「拓本」们的见闻与经验，调整秘境的架构，为武士们提供更有效的训练。
- Barbara-sama... Where are you? ｜ 芭芭拉小姐——你在吗——
- Me too. Good on Kazuha for coming up with the Casket of Tomes idea. ｜ 也多亏这位万叶兄，想到了用「秘典之盒」来寻人的办法。

- My dear friend, sometimes you may encounter difficulties in life that you cannot overcome by yourself. I believe Monsieur Havisham and Monsieur Jingle have found themselves in such a pickle. ｜ 好心的朋友，生活中总有些困境是仅靠自己的力量难以克服的，我相信哈维沙姆先生和金格尔先生现在就在这样的困境中。
- Recipe: Konda Cuisine ｜ 食谱：绀田煮
- I say we go for it! If something happens, we'll just turn the whole place upside down! ｜ 走吧走吧，出了事也可以把王宫搅个天翻地覆嘛！
- Yey! Wait moment! ｜ 耶！再等等！
- Starglitter Exchange ｜ 星辉兑换
- Talochard, are you gonna give up just when Curve is showing signs of improvement? ｜ 托萝莎，你真的要在曲线进步的时候放弃吗？
- When energy is routed to the control device, you can activate and use the corresponding facilities. ｜ 当能量通过线路被连通到控制装置上时，便可以启动并使用与之对应的机关设施。
- Domain of Chaos ｜ 混沌之境
- I don't quite understand what you are all talking about. I'll go rest on the bench over there. ｜ 我有些听不懂你们说的，我先去那边的长椅上休息了。
- Want to try my new skincare product? It's a face cream. ｜ 想试试我新调制的护肤品吗？这次是一种面部软膏。
- True, but you'd end up spending all your money on books regardless. If I hadn't confiscated your wallet, we'd have gone hungry for sure... ｜ 嗯，但你最终还是会把所有钱都用来买书。如果不是我把你的钱包拿走，我们就要饿肚子了。

- Bright orange blooms occasionally found in the Sumeru wilderness, and also bred in the Pardis Dhyai laboratories. Apart from being an ornamental species, a special dye can be extracted from the petals to add color to luminescent extracts. Indoor light sources usually prefer warm shades. However, luminescent extracts with large yields are often pure white or blueish purple in color, necessitating the utilization of this plant to balance out their natural hue. ｜ 明丽的橘红色花卉，偶尔可见于须弥的野外，禅那园的研究室中亦有培育。除了作为观赏花卉外，从这种植物的花瓣中还能萃取出特别的染剂，为荧光材料调色。大多情况下，室内光源以偏暖的色调为宜，而产量较大的荧光物质多为纯白和冷色系，正需要这种花卉的调和。

They were mutated lifeforms, and the mutations were caused by powers from beyond this world. The black serpentine dragon Durin that attacked Mondstadt was one such mutated being. ｜ 坎瑞亚覆灭的时代，某位大罪人制造了无数的魔兽。它们流淌着与此世不容的黑血，在大陆上践踏众生、破坏一切。它们的生命是变质的，由世界外的力量赐予的。硬要说的话，袭击蒙德的「杜林」也是此类。

- Bluish, juicy berries that grow in large amounts near the Scions of the Canopy. Their shape is similar to that of Flamegranates.\nThe Quenepa Berry's unique color can serve as a reference point when mixing paints, facilitating the creation of the kind of bright, contrasting blocks of color that work so well in graffiti art... ｜ 青蓝色的，汁液丰富的莓果。其果树大片生长在「悬木人」部族附近，是形态与火榴果相近的植物。\n青蜜莓的独特色彩，能为调配颜料方向提供参照，从而画出明艳而通透的涂鸦色块…
- Sure, can't say no to that! ｜ 好呀，那我就恭敬不如从命啦！
- Following the information on the mural, you discover a hidden location on Twinning Isle and the journal left there. The journal states that if you want to break through the fog around the island, you need to set out from a certain point on the island's northeasterly section at noon and follow the wind... ｜ 根据壁画上的信息，你在「双双岛」岛上找了一个隐藏的空间，在那里，还有一本笔记。 笔记中记载，如果想突破岛周的迷雾，似乎要在正午的时候，从东北面的某个地点出发，然后顺风前行…
- Domain of Forgery: Sunken Sands II ｜ 炼武秘境：沉沙之渊 II
- Make sure you listen to Grandpa Almond, Padisarah. Don't go running off on your own! ｜ 帕蒂沙兰也要乖乖听杏仁爷爷的话，不要乱跑哟。
- Camp Raider ｜ 敌营拾荒者
- Well, you always team up with the one you are familiar with. ｜ 哎呀…挑合作伙伴，当然要挑自己最熟悉的人。
- That's dangerous. ｜ 很危险。
- Do you know its name? ｜ 你知道它的名字吗？
- When you left, I was still in the middle of restoring everyone's minds. Thankfully, when The Doctor mentioned "depositing information into the subconscious," he didn't mean engraving information into their minds... ｜ 你们离开的时候我正在全力修复所有民众的意识，好在「博士」所说的「将信息投放到潜意识」并非是刻写进大脑…
- Hahahahahaha! That's what I'm talkin' about! Just follow my lead and give your all in battle. Grandmaster Hanakado's about to get more than he bargained for! ｜ 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！这才像话嘛！只要好好听本大爷指挥，拿出全力应战，绝对能把「花角玉将」打得落花流水！
- He reminded me of a younger version of myself. So I started out giving him a few words of advice when we were out fishing, and noticed how quickly he caught on. ｜ 看到他，我就想到年轻时的自己。于是经常在钓鱼的时候指点他几句，他也会很快领悟。

- Kin of Ioroi, these three little tanuki were once sealed alongside him in stone. They emerged together with him after breaking free from the seal.\nMischievous and lively, they are able to perform some basic spells and love playing Hide-and-Seek with people. ｜ 五百藏同族的三只小狸子，曾经和五百藏一同被封印在了石头里。后来挣脱封印跑了出来。\n性格顽皮活泼，会一点法术，喜欢与人捉迷藏。
