### Part 018

- Wines of Mondstadt ｜ 蒙德城的酒
- Indeed, I view Klee as my younger sister. Whenever she gets herself into some explosive sort of trouble, I can only console myself with the fact that her current destructiveness is nothing compared to that of Miss Alice. ｜ 我的确把可莉当作亲妹妹一样看，所以每次当这位妹妹惹出麻烦的时候，我都只能安慰自己，至少她现在的破坏力，还不及艾莉丝女士的零头。

- As for the Travel Permit... As it's Ms. Hiiragi's personal request, I will naturally see it through. ｜ 「通行凭证」的事…既然是柊小姐亲自委托，我自然会办周全。
- He probably suspected that I tampered with it, but here's the catch — the trick is on the bag. The moment he touched it, a portion of his memories were copied onto the old gem, which he no longer needed. ｜ 他一定会防着那块宝石，但他想错了，花招在袋子上。一旦触碰到袋子，他的一部分记忆就会被复制到替换下来的老旧宝石里。

- Key of the Moon-Bathed Deep. ｜ 「月浴渊之钥」。

- ...I really don't know just what kind of magical powers the old lady has! Babbling, chanting, singing and reciting, reciting and crying, I haven't got a clue what she's saying, but it's amazing! Little Mao, can you understand? ｜ …我也不知这老旦有什么魔力，咿咿呀呀、念念叨叨，连唱带念，连念带哭，我听不懂，就是觉得厉害！小茂，你能听明白吗？
- Says the one who only made it because I was there to get you! ｜ 最危险的不就是你吗！还好有我在！

- So you guys should know, while they do still have an autonomous system, they are mainly operated by people. ｜ 那么你们应该知道的，遗迹巨像虽然也装载了自律系统，但主要还是由人类操纵的。
- ...The barrels we found were wet around the base, but the top half was dry... As if they'd been standing upright in the water. ｜ …在周围发现的木桶，下半部分浸过水，上半部分却很干燥…就像一直「立」在水里一样。
- You're a real lover of learning. ｜ 万叶真好学。
- Flaming Cannon ｜ 猛火铁铳
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启

- Recipe ｜ 食谱
- Edwin, Raimondo, Choiseul... None of them can surpass our fame! ｜ 什么艾德温、雷蒙多、舒瓦瑟尔…没人能再压我们一头！
- And this lady over here... My family tells me that only the wisest scholars wear pointed hats like this one. Guessing that applies to you, too? ｜ 还有这位戴帽子的小姐，我听家里人说，最富有智慧的学者通常都会准备一顶尖头帽，你也是这样吗？
- As you dine, you tell Shinobu and Yanfei about Itto and Hanakado's run-in with Crystal Tornado, and the plan to hold a beetle-fighting boot camp... ｜ 在此期间，你们向烟绯和久岐忍讲述了荒泷一斗、「花角玉将」和「水晶岛梆梆旋风」之间的较量，以及「荒泷甲光烈烈斗虫大修行」的计划…
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- So, how do I use this pot of yours? ｜ 这口锅的用法…
- You have a sharp eye. I'm from Liyue, and currently working here part-time while I prepare for an exam. ｜ 客人真是好眼力，我是从璃月来的，现在正一边打工一边备考。
- Ei ｜ 影
- First, we construct the keel of the Jade Chamber. The keel is the part that holds the Plaustrite, so once that arrives, it goes straight in... ｜ 眼下第一步，是修建群玉阁的底座。等浮生石到了，就可以将浮生石安放在底座中…
- Foolish question. There are only two kinds of foods — those that must be consumed to nourish the body and those that harm it. ｜ 愚问。只有维持身体营养必须吃的，和会损害身体的。
- Well, I don't know either... I only snuck in here recently, and only because I was looking for clues concerning the Altar of Primal Flame. ｜ 这个嘛，我也不知道…就是为了寻找源火祭坛的线索，我最近才会偷偷溜进这里来的。
- I will keep waiting for that sneaky kitsune to come back and apologize to me. Hmph, actually, there's a lot she needs to apologize for! I'll have her know that I'm keeping score! ｜ 吾辈会一直等下去，等那个臭狐狸回来，然后，对吾辈道歉。呶，那家伙要道歉的东西太多了，吾辈天天都在算这笔账呢。
- Unfortunately, my husband is really lazy, and I couldn't get him out the door. I ended up traveling by myself... ｜ 只可惜我丈夫实在是有些懒散，说什么都不肯出门，我只能一个人出来逛逛…
- After listening to her this whole time, even Paimon's getting kinda scared... ｜ 听她说了一路，连我都有点害怕了…
- We Pari are different, for our power and that of the Khvarena hail from the same source. It's like how you humans don't need to recite incantations to walk. ｜ 我们花灵就不同了，毕竟我们和灵光的力量是同源的，就像你们走路也不需要念咒语吧。
- Come on, why isn't it here yet? ｜ 怎么还不来？
- Sounds good. I'll mark the location down on your map... Oh, and by the way! I suggest you head straight to the roof and talk to Mr. Nacker. ｜ 那好，我把位置标在您的地图上…对了！在那之前，我建议您先到楼顶，找到一位名为纳克的先生。
- Mmhaha! Fish are silly. Get tricked by food! ｜ 呶哈哈，鱼儿好笨哦。会被吃的东西骗。
- As for my father, well, he's got a nasty temper — don't take it personally. And as for Tirzad, he's basically been throwing a tantrum since things stopped going smoothly. ｜ 老爹嘛，就是那个臭脾气，你们别往心里去。提尔扎德么，跟小孩子似的，因为路途不顺，现在正使性子呢。
- Lightning attacks will occur around the Bounty target (Large Overgrown Breacher Primus), dealing Electro DMG to characters who are hit. ｜ 讨伐目标「大型狂蔓隙境原体」周围会降下落雷，对命中的角色造成雷元素伤害。
- I'm going to rest for a while, and then... then I'll be going. ｜ 我要再休息一会，再休息一会我…我就走了。
- Paimon's also tempted to try doing some graffiti herself... ｜ 而且我也有点想试试涂鸦了…
- Is there anything you'd like to do? ｜ 有什么想做的吗？
- Everything will be fine... ｜ 一定会没事的…
- Photography Target ｜ 留影目标
- This will work much better for Noelle! ｜ 既然是诺艾尔的话…果然还是这样比较合适！
- We meet again, Witness of a Thousand Stories and the perfectly balanced sour, sweet and salty White Cream Sauce Fairy! ｜ 又见面了，万千故事的见证者，还有酸味、甜味和咸香味都无比到位的白酱精灵！
- The way I see it, housekeeping is a unique skillset that empowers you to set your life in order. ｜ 在我看来，家政是一项特别的技能，可以帮助每个人更好地管理自己的生活。
- Possess a key figure in the Akademiya? ｜ 直接「附身」关键人物？
- You tell Yun Jin about everything that happened... ｜ 将情况一五一十地告知云堇…
- Even though your fighting style differs greatly from mine, I resonate strongly with the passion you imbue into your Onikabuto. ｜ 尽管斗虫的风格与我不同，但你倾注在鬼兜虫身上的一腔热血，让我找到了强烈的共鸣。
- Monsieur Os ｜ 呜斯先生
- Hey there! A guy called Meng Dan told us that we could get a nice and shiny box from your store... ｜ 你好，有个叫孟丹的人说，我们可以来店里领一个漂亮盒子…
- A metal pillar with an elaborate structure, the crown of which is adorned with stars and rings. It is of the same design as the metal pillar in the Astral Garden.\nIt is said that the interior of these pillars is filled with complex and intricate mechanisms, and when they were still functional, the pillars could not only rotate but also simultaneously produce pleasant sounds of various pitches, hence their nickname of "musical pillars." But it seems none know the exact purpose of such a unique design... ｜ 结构精巧的金属立柱，柱顶设有星星与圆环的装饰，与星间庭园内的金属立柱形制相同。\n据说，这些立柱内嵌有精密复杂的机械机构，在它们的功能尚且完好时，立柱上的曲柄不仅能够旋转，而且在旋转的过程中，能够发出各种特定音高的悦耳声响，因而被称为「乐柱」。但关于这种独特设计的具体用途，似乎并无人知晓…
- I'm sure it's "lemon-squeezy," Paimon... ｜ 是「举手之劳」…
- You can talk to your friends around the venue ｜ 可在会场四周与伙伴们交谈
- This is it! One of the lost antiques! Unscathed. No aquatic creature has gotten inside... ｜ 就是这个！这是落水的文物之一！结构完好，也没有水生生物钻进去…
- Yes, if she hadn't remembered the story and the pond... ｜ 没错，如果不是妹妹还记得那个故事，还记得那片水潭…
- Infusion Duration|{param5:F1}s ｜ 附魔持续时间|{param5:F1}秒
- That's quite an exhilarating story! ｜ 是个大快人心的故事呢。
- Ugh, this is killing me. The terrain here in Sumeru is so complex, and there are so many roads and caves too. Sometimes, I wonder if the entire mountain is hollow... ｜ 哎，真是快把我给难死了，须弥这里地势复杂，通路和山洞很多，有时甚至让人怀疑是不是整个山都是空的…
- That's so weird! Did anything like this ever happen before? ｜ 好奇怪，以前发生过这样的事吗？
- *sigh* Yes, I'm well aware of that. But since Chisato had the courage to ask me to marry her in spite of everything, how can I disappoint her? ｜ 唉，您说的我都明白，可千里鼓起勇气向我提出成婚的事，我怎么能让她失望呢…
- Pseudo-Stamens ｜ 苍砾蕊羽
- Never slow down, and never hold back. Spread your wings and fly free, like the fiercest qucusaur in the sky. Show the world who the bravest Flower-Feather warrior is... ｜ 越快越好，越高越好，像最强壮的绒翼龙，像最勇猛的花羽会战士…
- The Sabzeruz Festival is coming up... ｜ 最近是「花神诞祭」…
- Um, do we, uh, want anything else...? ｜ 她，她在问我别的需要欸…
- (I saw a dagger, but it was Tricolor Dango the whole time... So, it was all just a nightmare?) ｜ （匕首…变回三彩团子了…？刚刚的…是一场「噩梦」？）
- (These two look very suspicious, but... Meh, whatever, they aren't scholars anyway.) ｜ （这俩人好可疑，不过反正也不是学者，无所谓了…）
- It's rare to hear such comforting words from you. I graciously accept them. ｜ 难得从你这里听到安慰的话，我也收下了。
- I was reading up on the game's inventors before I came to Mondstadt. I was originally hoping to arrange an interview with them. ｜ 来之前我看了很多资料，想对那两位做个专题采访。
- Didn't you give me a ton of suggestions after your previous round of play-testing? They were great ideas, too. I've taken just about all of them on board. ｜ 您上次帮我试玩了过后，不是也给我提出了很多意见吗？那都是好主意，我基本上都采纳了。
- Vision ｜ 神之眼
- Ema ｜ 绘真
- And secondly is the consideration of the unique nature of the Fortress of Meropide... ｜ 其次，考虑到梅洛彼得堡的特殊性…
- Talk to the children ｜ 与孩子们对话
- Y'know, growing up, even if I insisted on doing something, it never gave you any trouble. I'm not sure you can say the same... ｜ 从小到大，我坚持要做的事从来没给你添过麻烦吧，反倒是你…
- Feels like we'll be there soon! ｜ 感觉很快就到了！
- You mean the gentleman from Wangsheng Funeral Parlor? My men sometimes speak of the rumors surrounding him — he sounds interesting. Yes, if I get the chance I'd like to meet him someday. ｜ 你说「往生堂」的那位先生吗？兄弟们有时会聊起他的传言，听上去是个很有意思的人啊。嗯，有机会去结交一下吧。
- A Gorgeous, Lovely, Endless Journey! ｜ 华丽盛美的无尽旅程！
- Finished. ｜ 清洗好了。
- No, not at all. Thankfully, the young man in the hat was kind enough to lend me a hand. ｜ 没有没有，还好那位戴帽子的好心人出手相救。
- Hmm. Y'know, Paimon's kinda sure she remembers playing this game somewhere before! ｜ 嗯！我也想起来了，好像以前在什么地方玩到过这种桌上游戏！
- Practice makes the professional. As such, no matter how busy work gets at the transport agency, Gaming will take time to train.\nAt meals, Gaming may be found tussling cheekily with his colleagues over dishes, wielding his chopsticks like a seasoned duelist, while under the table his knees are bent in a low horse stance, sturdy as a mountain. After the cargo is packed, he will rarely get a cart to move it to a warehouse but instead will lift it all himself, box by box, to train his arm strength.\nThe lead guard knew that their work was hard and laborious, and so from time to time would call for suggestions on items that might be added to the office for relaxation purposes.\nSoft beds, comfortable pillows, Genius Invokation TCG decks...\nAt that moment, Gaming cleared his throat and said: "If possible, could we have some Plum Blossom Poles installed in the front yard so we can train better? Bet if we firm up our fundamentals, it'll make our work a whole lot easier!"\nHis words were met with silence. Everyone was just discussing where to go after work, and here was someone saying that overtime was the best break. Why, this was a crime most heinous, and "punishment" was in order! So they gathered about him like bees in a hive, some "screeching," others "pleading," still others pretending to "advise" him, laughing and cavorting.\n"Have mercy on me and accept my apologies, brothers, and thank you for giving me my minute of glory. How about this, then? How about I treat you all to some dim sum? Will that make amends?"\nThis sort of horsing about happened every so often among the guards, of course. Everyone knew that Gaming wanted the Plum Blossom Pillars for Wushou Dance practice, and everyone was just playing along with him, wagging their tongues and fingers and feigning their reactions so his birthday surprise wouldn't be spoiled. In truth, they had already stacked those pillars up outside — all that remained was for them to put them up together.\nDuring their downtime, Gaming also often invites his fellow guards to take up Wushou Dance, and everyone has indeed tried it at least once on account of it "looking totally dope," though almost none have persevered for long, with one of them even joking that:\n"If we put suffering on a podium, we guards would get bronze, Wushou Dance masters silver, and Gaming would get gold, since he does both!"\nNot wrong, in truth. ｜ 业精于勤，无论镖局的工作有多忙，嘉明每日都会抽出时间来练习基本功。\n平日吃饭，嘉明在桌上用筷子跟兄弟们抢菜玩闹，桌下却一边扎着马步，稳如泰山。打包完货物后，嘉明很少用推车运回仓库，一般都会亲手一箱箱地举起，一趟趟来回练习臂力。\n镖头知道大家的工作辛劳枯燥，时不时会征集大家意见，添置一些物品放在镖局供大家放松休闲。\n松软的床垫、舒服的枕头、七圣召唤的卡组…\n而嘉明此时起身清清嗓子：「咳！可以的话，我想在前院装一些梅花桩，这样练功就更加就手就脚咯，打好基础，运镖也更效率嘛对不对？」\n话音刚落，立即引来嘘声一片。大家都在讨论下班去哪里玩时，竟有人高声呼喊加班就是最好的休息，实在是性质恶劣，论罪当诛！少不了挨一顿「教训」，于是兄弟们蜂拥而上抱成一团，有人「尖叫」、有人「求饶」、有人装模作样地「劝告」…大家一边笑一边闹。\n「各位好哥哥手下留情，多谢你们让我过了一把威风瘾，嗱，这样，我请大家喝早茶赔罪怎么样？」\n镖局兄弟间这样的相互调侃时有发生，很显然，大家都知道嘉明这小子分明是为了方便练习舞兽才想要梅花桩，大家不过是为了给他生日惊喜才配合着耍贫嘴，其实兄弟们早就把木桩子准备好垒在外头，正等着和他一起安装呢。\n得空时，嘉明也常常游说兄弟们来学习舞兽，大家因为「看上去很帅」基本都踊跃尝试过，不过几乎没几个能坚持下来，有个镖局兄弟曾经开过一个玩笑：\n「辛苦程度排名：第三是镖师，第二是舞兽师傅，第一是嘉明，因为他两样都干。」\n仔细想来，确实。

- From the way that the woven scrolls describe it, a Vision appears at a pivotal moment in your life and slowly descends into your hand, glowing with a brilliant light that seems to say "This has been ordained by Fate"... But I guess I must have forgotten all of that stuff, because all I remember is... I was having this awful nightmare, where I was fighting off monsters at the entrance to my tribe for what felt like an eternity, and I nearly died... Then, when I woke up, there was a Vision just lying on my forehead. Maybe I was... blessed by a hero in my dream, or something? ｜ 织卷里的说法是，「神之眼」会在非常重要的时刻，带着命运注定般的光芒，慢慢降临到特别之人的手中，可我完全不记得拿到神之眼的细节了…好像，有天做了个特别可怕的噩梦…梦里我一直在部族的正门和魔物战斗，差点死掉，醒来的时候，神之眼就放在我的额头上了…难道我在梦里被哪一位英雄祝福了吗？

- The legendary freshwater amphibian that can spit out pearls. They are found mostly where the water is clear and the reeds grow long, such as in Liyue's Dihua Marsh.\nThey say that Golden Loaches are the spoiled children of the river itself. It is also said that they can smile so innocently because of the river's warm and gentle caress.\nThey will combine elements that can neither be absorbed nor digested, gravel and ores within their bodies to create sparkling, shining pearls, and will spit them out when threatened to confuse and distract predators. \nAlthough the loaches don't have to fend of predators in the Realm Within, the shining pearls help them make new friends. They sometimes admire their own creations alongside the Unagi. ｜ 传说中能够吐出宝玉的淡水两栖动物，多分布在水源清澈、苇草高耸的地方，譬如璃月的荻花洲。\n传说金色鳅鳅是河流的宠儿。或许也正是因为受着河流温柔的爱抚摇荡，它们才总是保持着天真的笑容吧。\n会将无法吸收、消化的元素、砂砾、矿物质在体内凝结成闪闪发亮的珠子，并在遇到天敌时吐出，以迷惑掠食者。\n虽说壶中洞天里的鳅鳅无需对抗天敌，但发亮的珠子有助于它们「结交好友」，有时它们会和陆鳗鳗一同欣赏自己的杰作。

- Uh-huh... Spoken like a true drunkard... ｜ 唔唔唔…酒鬼…

- Sylvain ｜ 席尔万
- "Monster"? ｜ 「野兽」？
- Come on, it wasn't magic! We just happened to go there by chance previously! ｜ 不，哪有什么魔术啦！只是我们之前凑巧去过了而已吧！
- He's most likely trying to circumvent the rules and conduct his experiment in secret. ｜ 多半是想在不被允许的情况下，私自进行实验。
- C'mon now, do you really think I'd try to pull anything under Cyno's watch? Seriously, what can I even do? ｜ 你也太抬举我了…被那位眼光毒辣的赛诺盯着，我哪有什么花招可以耍？
- Eh? That's... ｜ 欸？那个是…
- Fatui Skirmishers that manipulate Anemo energy to support fellow Fatui in battle. They use restorative Anemo powers on weakened allied skirmishers who've lost their <color=#FFE14BFF>elemental buffs</color>, allowing them to quickly jump back into the fray. ｜ 能操纵风元素，辅助战友的愚人众士兵。当其他先遣队士兵的<color=#FFE14BFF>元素增幅</color>状态被破除并陷入虚弱状态时，会释放复苏的风之力，让战友能再度投身战斗。
- Energy Regenerated|{param4:F1} per Electro Sigil Absorbed ｜ 雷之印吸收恢复能量|每个{param4:F1}点
- ...Oh, they're drinking tea in silence. That's not a good sign... Did Xianyun's plan not work after all? ｜ …呃，两个人都闷着声喝茶，感觉不太妙…闲云的计策没起到效果吗？
- That name caught on quick. ｜ 你居然已经接受这个名字了吗？
- The Claw Convoy animal rescue society's gift-swapping event has ended. Zhenchen is sorting through the gifts that the society has received... ｜ 「伴爪同行」动物救助会的礼物交换活动已经结束了，振尘正在整理救助会收到的礼物…
- #(That's not the code we're going for, {NICKNAME}. Look, she's ignoring us now.) ｜ #（{NICKNAME}，暗语应该不是这句，你看她变得对我们爱答不理了。）
- The great shaman from the Masters of the Night-Wind, the universally-revered Granny Itztli. ｜ 烟谜主的大萨满，令所有族人敬畏的黑曜石奶奶。
- Blazed Meat Stew ｜ 火焰炖肉
- You're not eating with us? ｜ 你不坐着一起吃吗？
- <color=#00E1FFFF>Just so, just so... Outlander warrior...</color> ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>正是如此…正是如此，异邦的勇者啊…</color>
- Ah! You've come at just the right time. Thanks again for last time... Now it's time for round two. ｜ 您来得正好。上次谢谢您了，然后…这次还得麻烦您。
- Hang on a minute. What about the pay Henri was supposed to give us!? ｜ 等等！恩里说好的，给我们的报酬呢？！
- Tianshu Meat, Black-Back Perch Stew, Cured Pork Dry Hotpot... Oh, I just want them all! Unfortunately, I basically never get to eat such things, but... um, if you don't mind me asking... Can you cook any of those dishes? ｜ 天枢肉、水煮黑背鲈、干锅腊肉…我都想吃。可惜平时基本吃不了，那个…我就随便问一问，你…会做这几道菜吗？
- Kachina... Teyvat to Kachina! I made Saurus Crackers, come have some! ｜ 卡齐娜——别发呆了，我做了「龙龙饼干」，一起来吃吧？
- Just a couple more crates... ｜ 再搬两箱…
- Return to the Beret Society's gathering place ｜ 再次返回「檐帽会」的休息处
- Eh!? ｜ 欸！
- Performance Announcement ｜ 演出广告
- Follow 20 Electro Seelie on Narukami Island, Kannazuka, and Yashiori Island in Inazuma. ｜ 在稻妻的鸣神岛、神无冢与八酝岛，追上20个雷灵。

- CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Such strong Abyssal power! What is that thing? ｜ 好浓厚的深渊力量！那是什么？！
- No, those were all real, although they were all things that happened before the young master left us for good. Madame's time has just never moved forward since his passing. ｜ 不，那些事都是真的，只不过是少爷离开之前发生的事，而夫人的时间也停留在了那一刻。
- According to my friend Fischl in the Guild, a mysterious and dangerous ruin has recently been discovered... ｜ 根据我在协会里的朋友菲谢尔所说，最近发现了一处又神秘又危险的遗迹…

- Catalyst ｜ 法器
- No, Chasca, I genuinely hoped I could win you over. ｜ 不，恰斯卡，我确实希望你们能理解我。

- We need to do something before the students' lives are ruined even further. ｜ 我们得想办法做点什么，避免那些学员的人生滑向更深的沼泽。
- Point Mavuika! ｜ 有道理呢。
- We should prepare while we can, then make a preemptive strike against the enemy. ｜ 提前做好准备，先于对方进攻吧。
- Wasn't she just passing on a message? Does she really need this much time? ｜ 只是去通知，需要那么久的时间吗？
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Maple Wood Bookcase: Inkheart.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「枫木书柜-『墨染书心』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- An artist? Oh, that means he has two jobs... One as an alchemy-ist, teaching Sucrose alchemy, and the other as an artist, doing paintings for people. ｜ 画师？画画的…老师。原来阿贝多哥哥不仅是砂糖姐姐的老师，还是画画的老师。
- Go to the wind current location ｜ 前往乘风之处
- Magicians generally do not reveal the core secrets behind their tricks, but if you don't mind becoming my apprentice and calling me "Master Lyney," then that would be different. I'm curious how much of it you'd understand, and how long you'd last, hehe. ｜ 魔术师一般不会透露魔术的核心秘密…但如果你愿意喊我「林尼老师」，成为我的学生，那么「原则」就产生了变化。也不知道你的领悟力和耐心到底能有几分呢？真让人期待。
- Yeah, as long as you have the deity's blessings, your dreams will come true! ｜ 对，只要神明大人护佑的话，这些肯定能顺利成功的！
- Oh, come on, Duniya, why do you always have to interrupt my story!? ｜ 啊…什么嘛，度尼娅，为什么要抢我的话！
- Before long, Hautemontagne finishes the examination... ｜ 沃特蒙泰涅小姐身手轻盈地完成了检查…
- "Good Stuff Is for Sharing!" ｜ 「好东西就要分享！」
- Esteem for the Innocent ｜ 予无罪者以念抚
- ...Xi... ｜ 汐哥哥…
- I get the feeling you're more popular than the average sister... ｜ 总感觉，芭芭拉的受欢迎程度已经不在教会成员应有的范围内了…
- You continue to amble around the area. Who knows whether you might meet some pleasant surprise? ｜ 继续在附近转转，没准会有什么惊喜？
- "Listen! When I was out on a field investigation a few days ago, I saw a huge beast, it was beautiful, absolutely stunning!" ｜ 「听我说！前些日子，我在野外考察的时候，看到了一只好大好漂亮的野兽！」
- No, no thanks! Much appreciated, though. ｜ 不必不必！我心领了。

This can be triggered once every <color=#f39000>{2}</color>s. ｜ 队伍登场后的<color=#f39000>{0}</color>秒内，当前场上角色的普通攻击造成伤害时，恢复<color=#f39000>{1}</color>点能量，每<color=#f39000>{2}</color>秒最多触发一次。
- Hydro Slime ｜ 水史莱姆
- Blanche ｜ 布兰琪
- I'm okay. But I don't see the other two. I'm afraid... the avalanche may have pushed them off the cliff. ｜ 我没事。那两个人不在周围，恐怕…是被雪崩砸到断崖下面去了。
- Wicked Dragon ｜ 恶龙
- According to experts, there are many caves and mining tunnels in The Chasm. It would be a constant disturbance to people there if Azhdaha really was sealed there. Would Rex Lapis not have considered that? ｜ 据专家称，层岩巨渊地下满是洞穴与矿道，若陀龙王封在那处，定会三天两头遭人打扰。如此场面，莫非，也是岩王帝君的考量？
- Hold up, are those... Treasure Hoarders!? ｜ 等等，前面那是…盗宝团？！
- Could you please kindly help me take a look? ｜ 您行行好，帮我看看呗？
- Ooh! Great shot! ｜ 哦！好球！
- However, I am curious... What do you need him for, exactly? ｜ 不过顺便问下，您留下他的理由是？
- But anyway, we should go together. It'll be more convenient that way... right? ｜ 唔…总之，我们还是一起去吧？不管怎么说，也会方便一些…对吧？
- I don't know their language... ｜ 我不会和仙灵说话…
- A thousand Mora to each person each year — that's what goes into training up new members of our Alliance. ｜ 每人每年一千摩拉而已，这笔经费是「涂鸦联盟」用来培养新人的。
- Seeing her healthy like this... How do I say this? I just can't get angry. ｜ 现在看见她这么健康的样子，怎么说呢，我反而生气不起来了。
- Finisher Frame Cast CD|{param10:F1}s ｜ 最大画幅施放冷却时间|{param10:F1}秒
- You can only form a team out of companions who meet the eligibility requirements for the current season.\nHowever, there are also special guests who are not subject to these restrictions. They may freely participate. ｜ 只能选择满足当期参演条件的伙伴组成队伍。\n但也有一些特邀参演的伙伴不受此限制。
- Because you are me, and I am you. ｜ 因为你就是我，我就是你。
- Fortunes Shared ｜ 有福同享
- Hmm, seems we won't need to be visiting the Komore Teahouse for a while. Why don't we go explore some other places! ｜ 旅行者，看来暂时不需要再来木漏茶室了，我们去其他地方看看吧。

- He's a bit of a special case... ｜ 其实一般来说没那么威风的…
- #That's a decision for {NICKNAME}. ｜ #知道了，这个就让{M#他}{F#她}来决定吧。
- I can't think of anyone better for the honor. ｜ 非你莫属。
- ...Ahem, that's what I might have said about the issue of flooding if I lacked both patriotism and a sense of civic responsibility! Pretty abominable! ｜ …咳咳，假定我是缺乏社会责任感，对我们枫丹也不抱自豪感的人，在提及水的问题的时候，或许会这样说吧！真是面目可憎！
- Use Razor's attacks to break the <color=#FFCC33FF>Explosive Rocks</color> to score points.\nDuring the challenge, all party members will constantly recover Elemental Energy. ｜ 利用雷泽的攻击击碎<color=#FFCC33FF>「轰轰岩块」</color>获得积分。\n挑战中，队伍中所有角色将持续恢复元素能量。
- Golden Night's Bustle ｜ 黄金之夜的喧嚣
- It's so much bigger in here than Paimon thought! ｜ 这里面出乎意料的大啊！
- ♪~ ｜ ♪~
- It seems like they're looking for a dragon relic called the "Source Mechanism." ｜ 看样子，他们在找的是龙留下来的「秘源机关」。
- Do what you want. What use is it being as strong as me, anyway? ｜ 学成什么样都无所谓啦，像我一样厉害又能怎么样？
- Haha, how humble of you. Actually, I have a little suggestion... ｜ 哈哈，真谦虚呢。其实，我有一个小建议…
- It is as if we have returned to the moment when the laws of eternity were first established. Your will today is as strong as it was back then. ｜ 仿佛回到了永恒的法则刚刚订立之时，你如今这份意志，竟堪比那时。
- Though he dislikes the Knights of Favonius, he protects Mondstadt in his own way. ｜ 虽然讨厌骑士团，但会用自己的方式来守护蒙德呢。
- Koholasaurs are the sensitive sort, so let's not get too close. I'll get some professionals from our tribe to gather what I need afterward — if anyone can pull this off, it'd be them. ｜ …它很敏感，咱们不能靠近。之后我会请部族里的专业人士来帮我取材。他们肯定能搞定这件事。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Make sure all the runes are pointing in the direction indicated by the light. That should unlock the mechanism. ｜ 将所有「符文」转动到光线指示的区域，就可以解开这里的机关了。
- Not this time, no. We're looking for a researcher, do you know where we might find Mr. Rawat? ｜ 不不，我们是想找一位研究员问些事情，你知道拉瓦特先生现在在哪里吗？
- I'll keep watch. Be careful. ｜ 警戒就交给我吧。你们也要多加小心。
- Character Card ｜ 角色牌
- And where's that place? ｜ 那里是哪里？
- I'm ready. ｜ 准备好了。
- To be frank, not really. But sadly, that hasn't stopped this prophecy from proving all too accurate. ｜ 非要说的话，我不太信。但很可惜，一切正在与预言重合。
- Eh-he~ let's work together to make this park even more beautiful! ｜ 欸嘿，我来和你一起，把这座公园建造得更漂亮吧。
- Well, of course Paimon can! It'd be much harder for you guys. ｜ 和我肯定不一样啦！听起来要难很多。
- Whether she is alive or dead, whether she can or cannot be resurrected... As long as the Eternal Oasis is under my control, all such things will be mine to decide. ｜ 她「活着」，或是「死了」，她还能否、或如何「复活」…只要「永恒绿洲」归我控制，就都取决于我。
- About Lantern Rite... ｜ 关于海灯节…
- I'm sorry, who are you? ｜ 对不起，你是哪位？
- You'll get to see all these things for yourself after you leave this place, whether it's volcanos, or anything else. ｜ 离开这里之后，你也有机会去见识这些的，不管是火山还是别的。
- Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Things are pretty murky right now. Take extra care. ｜ 现在一切都不明朗，你们要多加小心啊。
- Floating Jade, Treasure of Chenyu ｜ 采撷掇拾，沉玉浮琼
- Have a pleasant journey! ｜ 也祝你们旅途愉快！
- Achieve victory within 5 Rounds ｜ 5回合内胜利
- W—We actually beat a legend... ｜ 我们真的打赢了传奇选手…
- Holy smokes! My mind can think faster, my body has more energy... There's not a news story out there that can escape me now! But first things first — let's take a photo to commemorate this beautiful moment. ｜ 喔！我能感觉到，思考的速度变快了，身体里也全是劲…我一定能抓住更多独家新闻！但在那之前，我们先合张影吧，给这个美好时刻留下点纪念。
- I think I must be feeling the effects myself. Must've stayed here too long while thinking about how to move the Pursina's Spike towards the Ley Line rupture. ｜ 之前在矿道处为了想出将「普尔希娜光钉」搬运到地脉喷口的办法，在矿道逗留了太久，受到了一些影响。
- The expedition to investigate Osial in the Guyun Stone Forest came away with slim pickings. Kliment and Wanyan also clashed vociferously over their differing perspectives, which has greatly displeased the former. During the argument, he heard Wanyan mention the tale of the God of Salt, and decided to take the party there to try their luck, lest he finishes this venture empty-handed. ｜ 孤云阁一行，关于「漩涡之魔神」奥赛尔的收获寥寥，克列门特和宛烟还因为观念不同发生了激烈的争吵，这都让克列门特很不开心。他在争吵中听到宛烟提起了「盐之魔神」的故事，为了不让此行一无所获，他决定带队前往地中之盐碰碰运气。
- Serpent Spine ｜ 螭骨剑
- Enter the Weary Inn ｜ 进入倦意之屋
- Mr. Bai ｜ 「白老先生」
- A <color=#d27e35ff>gold-glowing Multiplier Marvelfish</color> will appear in the fishing zone. Catching this fish will grant you <color=#d27e35ff>5x the amount of action points you would get for catching an ordinary fish of the same size</color>. ｜ 捕鱼区将出现有着<color=#d27e35ff>金色光效的倍增奇效鱼</color>，捕捉该鱼后，将获得<color=#d27e35ff>同类体型普通鱼类5倍</color>的行动点。
- Obtained from Limited-Time Event ｜ 限时活动获取
- A lively, energetic fish famous for its petal-shaped tail.\nIt might be because this fish has a sweet tooth, but every bone in its body seems to serve as an antenna to seek out sweet treats. Following this absolute ideology, they swim through every creek and river in Teyvat in search of tasty sweets. True egalitarians, they will never reject any morsel, and certainly not because there's a hook attached. Have bait, will bite, as they say.\nBeginner friendly. ｜ 活泼好动的小型鳉鱼，以优美的花瓣型鱼尾闻名。\n可能是最爱甜食的一种鳉鱼，身体的每个部分都是一种甜味搜索器，循着甜蜜主义的指引，它们巡游到了提瓦特每条溪流，恪守绝对公正的教旨，对所有甜食一视同仁，绝不因为某些甜味饵料裹挟着鱼钩就将其拒之门外。你肯下饵，它们就肯上钩。\n钓鱼新手友好。
- On festive occasions, one should offer words of blessing. ｜ 佳节应赠吉语。
- A wild flower that was once a ubiquitous sight in its homeland. It was picked by a hunter who wore it on their chest. ｜ 曾经遍布某地的野花。离开了大地，被猎人佩在胸前。
- Anyway, enough about them — back to you two. Per the terms of the VIP pass, you're entitled to free use of all our services: so the spa, the fine dining, and psychological consultancy. ｜ 那言归正传，按照约定，两位可以免费享受秋沙钱汤的全套服务，温泉、美食还有心理诊疗。
- Lower Level: #2 ｜ 下层-2号
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启
- Fragility Potion ｜ 易碎配方
- Whew, today's work sure is off to a great start. No sooner do I get the package than I run into its recipient. Praised be the Pyro Archon! ｜ 嗯，真是火神保佑，刚拿到的快件就找到了收货人，今天的工作有了个好的开头啊。
- Charged Attack DMG|{param7:F1P}+{param8:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param7:F1P}+{param8:F1P}
- Dustblind ｜ 飞尘迷眼
- Being stripped of your ambition is something that's never happened to me, so I can't claim to understand it. But I do know what it feels like to have your ambitions crushed... that's what happened on the day that you so effortlessly defeated me. ｜ 「愿望被夺走」这种事，我没有经历过，也不懂。但当初被你轻松击败的时候，我也感受过愿望破裂的声音。
- The lonely isle appeared in silence through the dark fog of night. Wherever shall it lead you... ｜ 黑夜的迷雾之中，孤岛悄然而现。它究竟会将你们引向何处…
- A soup dish that's been stewed for a good long while. The inexpert heat control has caused the fresh meat to be a bit tough, and the salty ham has covered the expected taste. The bamboo shoots, which have absorbed the flavors of both meats, are probably the only acceptable part of this dish. ｜ 久经炖煮的汤羹。火候的掌握不当让鲜肉嚼起来有些柴硬，火腿的咸味也掩盖了应有的鲜味。这样看来，吸收了二者肉香的竹笋，算是勉强能被接受的一味食材了。
- Then that indicates... ｜ 这说明…
- So naturally, the Kujou Clan saw him as a potential threat. Kujou Takayuki must have been planning it all along, that rascal. ｜ 九条家当然也不是吃素的，九条孝行那个老狐狸，肯定早就想过日后的事啊。
- Keqing ｜ 刻晴
- We have the other ingredients, but we usually don't stock up on Cheese... ｜ 其余的材料店里倒是有，可是这个奶酪，店里平时也没储备多少…
- Okay. Grab the Kamera, and I'll give you a scenario. ｜ 拿好留影机，我要出题了。
- No. ｜ 否。
- Guest Challenge: Yoimiya ｜ 来客挑战：宵宫
- Star course deviations... ｜ 星轨偏移的影响…
- I've hidden food that can attract Qucusaurs in the pond beneath the waterfall. It's just that... *sigh* Well, they haven't come down at the right angle yet. ｜ 为了做准备，我在瀑布下的水潭里隐藏了能吸引绒翼龙的食物。只是…唉，到现在我还没有等到它们以合适的角度俯冲下去。
- Another proud researcher, huh? But... He seems really different from Khedive. ｜ 虽然都是很为各自门派自豪的学者…但他和海迪夫的样子完全不一样呢。
- Eek! Ghost incoming! ｜ 呜哇！不会真有鬼吧？！

- Whoa... This looks like really tough work. ｜ 呜哇，这么忙，看起来工作就很辛苦。
- Careful, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙。
- There's no need to worry. ｜ 不用担心。
- As a result, she could hardly sleep all the way here. It appears she's even more excited now that we've arrived. ｜ 结果她不仅一路上都没怎么睡觉，现在到了地方，也还是精神得不行。
- What? That can't be right... This is supposed to be a safe place... ｜ 怎，怎么会…我睡觉的地方也不安全了…
- Perhaps the most important thing is that audiences expect conflict and twists! And, unfortunately, this probably does not meet those expectations. Such a shame. ｜ 唯一重要的可能是，观众想要看到的是接连不断的冲突和反转，所以这样的普通故事大概不能满足观众的需求吧，真可惜呀。
- "No river awaits, and the lotus leaves do not exist for us." That makes it sound like Rainsong Pond is already... ｜ 「没有河流在等待，荷叶并非为我们而存在。」这简直就像是在说，我们雨歌塘已经…
- Mm-hmm, they're a group of lovely little creatures. They're just a bit timid around strangers. ｜ 一群很可爱的小家伙，只是有点怕陌生人而已。

- What!? Lutong! How did you know!? ｜ 什么？！你…路通！你是怎么知道的？！

- ...Part of me wonders whether he'd already stopped being my father by that point. Perhaps the man we called "Sachin" was a demon from the desert who was wearing his skin. ｜ 现在想想，或许当时的他已经不是我的父亲了，而是披着萨齐因外皮的…从沙漠回来的魔鬼。

- ...One cannot help but be reminded of old acquaintances. ｜ 难免对那些故人，心生怀念了。

- Haha! I knew we'd meet again! Your timing is impeccable, too — you are about to witness my second masterpiece! ｜ 哈哈！我就知道我们会再次见面！瞧瞧你们来得多巧！你们即将见证我拍下人生中第二件杰作！

- As expected of you! ｜ 不愧是你们！
- She means that she has never seen such an extravagant mirage before, and even she is enthralled by it. ｜ 小姐的意思是，从没见过这么夸张的幻境，即使是她本人也叹为观止。

- This is it! This is the view! ｜ 正是！正是此处风光！
- While this round seems to be about how quickly you can shut down the devices, it's also testing your ability to survive in tough conditions. ｜ 这一轮比赛，表面上是比拼关停机器的速度，其实也是在考验恶劣条件下的生存能力。

- Our current plan is to fertilize the soil with a special fertilizer. ｜ 所以我们计划，总之先用特制的肥料给土壤增肥…
- Tell me. Aren't you and Lynette actually from the House of the Hearth? ｜ 你和琳妮特，其实是「壁炉之家」的人，没错吧。
- A very low desk built using Athel Wood with a very thin finish. It is beautiful and affordable, and can often be found adorning special interior areas in the desert regions. In the eyes of some visiting outsiders, this is no different from having a table atop your bed. Some do not like to have such objects around when they are sitting down cross-legged, but others see the friendly and casual atmosphere it creates as an important thing. ｜ 极为低矮的桌案，使用了涂有纤薄漆面的「柽木」板材，物美价廉，通常搭配沙漠地区特殊的室内结构使用。在一些外来的客人看来，似乎「与放在床上的桌板没什么差别」。有人不喜欢盘腿坐时取用这种桌板上的物件，有人则很看重这样的桌案带来的随意、亲切的氛围。
- Hey! Stop that! Who would want to go there after hearing that!? ｜ 喂！你这么说了还有谁会想去啊！
- Hmph! The gray market is not the same as the black market... I'm not a parasite like Loillier. ｜ 哼，灰色生意不等于黑色生意…我可不是卢瓦利耶这种蛀虫。
- Eh? Okay. Ahem... Well, Iotham was supposed to go missing next, but we and Rana ran into him and brought him back. ｜ 欸？好的…咳咳，应该这么说，接下来要走丢的，本来是优丹。但我们和拉娜碰巧遇到他，所以把他救回来了。

- But when we got to the festival, the staff wouldn't let us in because of our unusual outfits. ｜ 结果来祭典时，因为大家打扮的造型太别具一格，被工作人员拦下来了。

- I will protect you. ｜ 一定会保护你。
- I want to see it again. ｜ 想再看一次。
- Hu Tao's outfit. Styled in a palette lighter than the dark ceremonial wear favored by the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor, the dress is a special gift from her good friend Xiangling. The sunglasses, for their part, are from Hu Tao's personal collection. ｜ 胡桃的装扮款式。有别于往生堂深色仪服的素色连衣裙，是好友香菱为胡桃特别准备的礼物，墨镜则是她自己的收藏。
- No need! No need! Master is waiting for me right over there. ｜ 不用不用！师父就在附近。

- Thinking about it that way, this special outfit can indeed be called a surprise. ｜ 这样想的话，这件特别的衣服，的确可以被称作惊喜。
- Well... alright then. But be quick! ｜ 唔…那好吧。不过你要快点哦！

- The best way to understand someone is by spending time with them, whether they're an old friend or a new acquaintance... ｜ 无论是相识已久的好友，还是初次邂逅的某人，了解他们的最好方法，或许就是与之共同度过一段时光…

- #{NICKNAME}, just like before, don't forget to touch that... ｜ #{NICKNAME}，就跟之前一样，别忘了触碰那个…
- Because I'm a pirate... ｜ 我是海盗。
- Well... I wouldn't go quite that far. I actually have no idea what this place is like on the inside. ｜ 其实…也不算做过功课吧，这座「研究所」的内部究竟是什么样，我还完全不了解。

- They disgrace those who love photography and painting alike! They truly are... *cough*... *cough* ｜ 他们同时侮辱了爱好留影的人，和爱好绘画的人！他们真是…咳咳…咳…
- Who... are you? ｜ 你们。是谁？
- It's a slow day today, so I decided to go for a little stroll. Even if your work space isn't cramped, it's still good to get some air. ｜ 今天没什么事，就到处巡视一下。我办公的地方虽然宽敞，但待久了也难免觉得闷。
- ...Who art thou to stop us... We shall cleanse the tainted things from the skies... with sacred blood...! ｜ …汝乃何人，竟敢阻止吾等…以神圣之血…净化天空的污秽之物…！

- Hehe, now there's a turn of phrase I could get used to. ｜ 这句说得还不赖。

- Even if all other life disappears into the sea, he will survive alone. He will remember all those lives that were lost. ｜ 就算所有生命消失了，他也可以独自活着。就算这样，他仍然挂念着众生。
- Uh, what do you mean by that? ｜ 呃，什么意思？
- That is a very dangerous thing. And today, I did something even more dangerous. ｜ 这是非常危险的。而今天，我做了一件更加危险的事情。
- Like a ball? ｜ 就像球一样？

- Oh! The ball's rolling! Let me see what you've got this time! ｜ 喔！气势很强嘛！那就让我看看你们这次的觉悟吧！
- The prospects are still positive. ｜ 尚有胜机。
- I heard your footsteps and thought: Who in Teyvat would set foot in such a dangerous Domain...? ｜ 刚才听见脚步声我还在想，什么样的人才敢闯进如此危险的秘境。
- While I was wandering around looking for inspiration, I noticed something shiny out of the corner of my eye. To me, it looked like Crystal Ore... ｜ 我在附近找灵感的时候，似乎瞥见了些亮闪闪的东西来着，稍微有点像是水晶矿…
- You helped me a lot here, and I do apologize for having put you through so much trouble... But I do hope I will have the pleasure of working with you again in the future. ｜ 先前麻烦了你们那么多，实在不好意思。有机会还希望能够一起合作。
- Sappan and Vermilion Enjoined ｜ 「片叶苏芳缀银朱」
- That's true... ｜ 确实如此…

- Head to the dock in Ritou ｜ 前往离岛港口
- The memories of our culinary duel are still fresh in my mind. ｜ 上次的对决真是让人印象深刻，我现在还记忆犹新呢。
- I used to think I could hold the troupe together just by putting on a good performance. But now, I have to make sure I concentrate on my actions offstage, too. *sigh*... ｜ 本以为只要唱好了戏，就能撑起这班子，如今却也不得不分出精力到舞台之外，唉…
- Lisa's literally trying to extort Master Diluc! ｜ 丽莎…摆明了是想讹诈迪卢克老爷！
- Our recommendations for today are... ｜ 今天的推荐菜…
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Well, let's fire away, then... ｜ 那就随便问问吧…
- Ah, I understand. The meals you and Hibiki made were all good things. The stone that the stone human will make must then also be a good thing. ｜ 原来如此，奴家明白了。汝做的饭和阿响做的饭，都是好东西。所以，石头人类做的石头，也是好东西。
- Pahsiv reaches out to stroke the vishap's head and the furious beast obediently lies down.\nIt opens its mouth, coughs up a glittering drop of water, then jumps back into the water. ｜ 珀西芙伸出手抚摸着龙蜥的脑袋，暴怒的龙蜥乖乖低下了身子。\n它张开嘴，吐出了一颗晶莹的水珠，然后转身跳进了水中。
- Touch the paper charm hangers ｜ 触碰「纸垂」
- As the Khvarena's Light Shows: Nirodha ｜ 如是灵光悉示现·灭
- What detail... did I miss... ｜ 我…看漏了什么…
- See you later, Yunyun! ｜ 回见喔，云云！
- He'll be waiting for you in the cave where the moon falls. He'll guide you to the dead Nara's old home. The walking Shroom-Kin now live there. Be careful. ｜ 他就在月亮落下的洞穴等你，他会指引你走过死去那菈过去的家。会走的蕈类住在那里，一定要小心哦。
- Who knows, perhaps that friend of mine might even have a change of heart once she sees this... Haha. ｜ 说不定我那分道扬镳的朋友看过这部作品后也会回心转意呢，哈哈。

- Talk to Nahida ｜ 与纳西妲对话
- I heard from Sedene that you received a threatening letter. ｜ 听塞德娜说，你收到了一封威胁信。
- Also... Meddling in the affairs of the Abyss usually doesn't end well for anyone. ｜ 而且…不论是谁，触碰了与「深渊」有关的因果，一般也不会有太好的结局。
- There's a lot that goes into shooting a film. Although the trickiest tasks of finalizing the script and casting the actors have already been taken care of, we'll still need to reserve filming locations, not to say set up lighting and props... ｜ 映影的准备工作可是很漫长的，虽说最困难的剧本和选角已经定下来了，但之后还有场地预约、灯光道具…
- He wouldn't be leading that many people if he didn't have the necessary strength and courage for it. He's not the kind of person you need to worry about. ｜ 如果他拿不出足够的勇气和实力，就不配带领那么多人。这样的人，不需要我们太过操心。
- Wow, look at all the lanterns here! It's so beautiful! ｜ 欸——这里这么多灯笼呀，真漂亮！
- When I was learning my crafting skills from the Children of Echoes, Muhuru's Gemporium is where I went to study. The craftspeople there talked about Xilonen all the time! I actually only saw her around once or twice, and I never got the chance to talk to her — but boy, did I get familiar with her music taste! She put together the playlist they have on in the shop, and all the tracks are super catchy. Really good beats — perfect for running, too. I swear, I can go for way longer on my shuttle runs when that stuff's playing! ｜ 我在「回声之子」学手艺的地方叫「穆胡鲁宝石铺」，那里的工匠们经常提起希诺宁女士的名字！不过，我只见过她一两次，没和她说上过话…倒是听过她推荐给店里的音乐！那些音乐很有意思，咚咚锵锵的，适合跑步的时候听，听着听着，比平常多跑几个来回都不累了！
- Enjou ｜ 渊上
- You got the box back. It's alright now. ｜ 已经没事了。
- ...Why are you acting so strange all of a sudden? ｜ …你这是突然怎么了？

- A bronze bell that was carried by a warrior who walked through the dark abyss. Its peal can be heard on pitch-black nights. ｜ 漫步黑渊的战士所携带的铜铃，在无光的夜里常常能听到它的哀鸣。
- Wow! The Plaustrite's position changed after we got the hairpin with our adeptal energy! Paimon wonders if we can adjust the rest of the Plaustrite the same way? ｜ 哇啊，用仙力取下发簪以后，浮空石的位置好像也变了！不知道其他浮空石能不能也这样调整呢？

- You could try doing something for once, Paimon. ｜ 可以出点力了派蒙！
- Their only flaw is that they tend to work rather... slowly. You might have to wait a while before you can be reunited again. ｜ 他们唯一的缺点…大概是性子比较慢吧。你得耐心点，才能等来重逢的那天。
- A spacious Liyue-style domicile with a separate kitchen and chimney. It is said that recluses particularly like this sort of house.\nThe seaside areas of Liyue enjoy a rather gentle climate and those who live there need no hearths with which to withstand the bitter winter. However, cooking a steaming-hot meal in a fully-furnished kitchen rather than setting some simple stove up to make one's three meals is an arguably more fitting way for your Liyue resident to live. ｜ 宽敞的璃月住宅，设有单独的厨房和烟囱，传说隐居人士对这种房屋尤为中意。\n靠海的璃月气候温和，无需炉炕抵御严冬。但在设施完备的厨房内烹饪热腾腾的饭菜，而非架起简易炉灶应付三餐，才更符合璃月居民的生活习惯。
- Uh, hello... ｜ 你…你们好。
- Fiery Passion Rush DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 炽热激情状态突进伤害|{param2:F1P}
- I do believe that those who read this letter, surrounded by as pleasant a scent as it is, might at least be put in a better mood. ｜ 我想，读信的时候被甜甜花的香气环绕…读信人的心情说不定也会好一些吧。
- It's a standard remedy, but a dependable one. More importantly, thanks for the fresh dressing — much appreciated. ｜ 虽然这种药比较常见，但药效却很不错。最主要的是，多谢你们帮忙换药了。
- But people won't give us a hard time if we stick together. ｜ 只有抱起团来，才不会受到欺负。
- And I'm a child, too. ｜ 我也是小孩，嗯。
- #{NICKNAME}, Paimon, didn't I tell you not to come here anymore...? ｜ #{NICKNAME}{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SISTERA]}、派蒙，我不是说了，不要再来了…
- You describe the condition of the roots to Yasmin... ｜ 向雅丝敏叙述了根系的情况…
- Blessing 1 ｜ 吉语·之一
- CRIT DMG increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>. Increasing the value of a Bond of Life increases the DMG the equipping character deals by <color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color> for 6s. Max 3 stacks. ｜ 暴击伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>；生命之契的数值增加时，装备者造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>。该效果持续6秒，至多叠加3次。
- Thirsty Night Raven ｜ 口渴夜鸦
- Whether it's human avarice lurking in the shadows or a conspiracy from outside the human world... ｜ 无论是人的暗中觊觎，还是非人集团的秘密谋划。
- A stone chair with armrests and backrests that can be found in the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. At first, these chairs were designed to provide temporary rest for competitors, commentators, and judges. As such, artisans specially selected stones with excellent heat dissipation properties to provide a cooling sensation to those exhausted after their labors. However, people would incidentally discover that this unique "cool sitting sensation" could also alleviate the heat from having eaten spicy food. Thus did these chairs become popular in various food stalls as well. That said, while spicy food is delicious indeed, do remember to consume in moderation... ｜ 设置有扶手与靠背的石质座椅，可见于圣火竞技场内各处。起初，这些座椅是为了给参与比赛的选手、解说以及裁判们提供临时的休憩席位而设计。因此，工匠们特意选用了具有优良散热性能的石料，旨在为劳累之后的人们提供一丝清凉。不过，人们意外发现，这种座椅独特的「清凉坐感」似乎能缓解食用辣食后带来的燥热感，于是这种座椅也在各个食品店流行了起来。当然，辣味虽然可口，但也请量力而行…
- Go back to the Knights' headquarters and report to Kaeya ｜ 回骑士团向凯亚汇报
- It is recommended that you allocate time for these characters to <color=#f39001>fight on the field</color> as much as possible to fully utilize their strong suits. ｜ 推荐合理分配时间，使此类角色尽可能多地在<color=#f39001>场上战斗</color>，以充分发挥其优势。
- A dark-colored pastry. The Ajilenakh Nuts were first roasted and powdered before being sieved, added to a batter, mixed evenly, and then baked. The final product by no means looks impressive, but it exudes the fresh aroma of Ajilenakh Nuts, and it tastes better still with some jam. ｜ 乌漆墨黑的甜饼。先将枣椰烧制成粉状，过筛提纯，再加入面糊，搅拌均匀后烤熟。其貌不扬的成品带有淡淡的枣椰清香，搭配果酱尤为香甜。
- Hmph, you don't even have to say it. No one trusts a Fatuus here in Mondstadt. ｜ 哼，你不说我也知道。这蒙德城里谁能信任我这个愚人众。
- It appears evident that some accident occurred before they finished their conversation. A mixed blessing, as they say. ｜ 看起来，他们谈到一半，佩特莉可镇就出现了意外。这件事可以称得上是好坏参半。
- I see. You two must be close. ｜ 哦——原来如此，看来您与这位好友必然关系匪浅了。
- Diary Fragment ｜ 日志的残片
- This tavern sure has some good drinks... maybe I should take some back with me. ｜ 这酒馆里的酒还挺好喝的，要不要带一点回去呢…
- Huh? What's up? ｜ 欸，怎么了？
- Please forgive me for having doubted you. You have proven that you are a talented hunter. ｜ 请原谅我曾对您抱有怀疑…事实证明您是一个天生的猎手。
- Seriously, you were just like Seymour... He just said he would be "searching for data," and since then, he's just... not moved at all. ｜ #真是的，{NICKNAME}变得和西摩尔一样了…那家伙也是，说要搜索一下数据，就坐着一动不动了。
- Animal Behavior: Rishboland Tiger ｜ 动物行为·长鬓虎
- It's coming from that censer over there. This is definitely not your typical place to call home, but at least it smells nice! Hmm, maybe living here wouldn't be too bad after all... ｜ 是从那个香炉里传来的吧。虽说住在这么简陋的地方，但能沐浴在芬芳中冥想，似乎也是种不错的生活呢。
- And you certainly are such audiences, so they were always meant to be yours. Please wait here for me to fetch them. ｜ 既然如此，几位也与我有缘，这扇子理应送给你们！稍等片刻，我这就去取。
- Alright, I've marked the various locations out. I'm counting on you, alright? Ugh, I can't believe the divesuit's this badly damaged... How much Mora will I have to fork out? ｜ 好了，那些地方我都给您标好了，我可就倚仗您了。这潜水服居然破了这么大一道口子…这下得赔多少钱才行…

- If there was a mushroom you could devour to solve all problems, I'd be the first to chomp it down! ｜ 如果真的有吃下去就能解决所有麻烦事的蘑菇那我一定一口一个！
- No need to be so polite. You should visit again when you have the time. ｜ 不必客气，有空多来玩。
- I can protect them. ｜ 我可以护送你们。
- Wanmin's closed? Why, what happened? ｜ 停业？万民堂为什么突然停业了？

- Anyway, we can't just let things go on like this... We have to convince him to come back! ｜ 总觉得不能放任他这么下去…我们得把他劝回来！
- Let's end the shift. ｜ 就先这样结束吧。

- Huh? I thought I told you once before? Wangsheng Funeral Parlor was first founded to fight back against the vengeful wrath of gods defeated in war. ｜ 咦？我以前没跟你们说过吗——往生堂最初，就是为了对抗魔神死后的「怨念」才建立的。
- No, I'm just passing through. ｜ 不，只是偶然路过。

- Talent Level-Up material.\nIngenuity is the leaf-veins of the nation of wisdom.\nIngenuity is completed by harmonious conduct. What is done completes what is thought. Wisdom blooms where the mind, words, and practice converge. ｜ 天赋培养素材。\n「巧思」是智慧之国的叶脉。\n巧思成于谐和的品行。行为赋予思想完美形态，思、言、行的彼此印证，是令智慧之树绽放出花朵的忠实基干。
- I'm just glad you're not always tired. But I won't be satisfied with growing "ordinary" tea! ｜ 你过得不累，我倒是挺宽心的，但我自己种的茶叶才不能普普通通！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- The Knights of Favonius must continue to improve, striving for zero casualties and minimal resource consumption while eradicating potential invaders of Mondstadt and protecting everyone. For this purpose, there are no standards that are too high. ｜ 西风骑士团必须不断进步，争取以零伤亡，低物资消耗，消灭可能入侵蒙德的敌人，保护所有民众。为此，标准定得再高也不为过。

- After the inspection, we found both prototypes needed to be scrapped. They hadn't been maintained for a long time, plus... ｜ 而且检查之后发现，这两台试验机应该是彻底报废了，毕竟很长一段时间都没人维护，再加上…
- Hey, that's not fair. I'm the one who's been laboring hard all along and you didn't do anything! ｜ 什么啦，明明你们什么都没做，一直是我在干活吧！

- Looks like we should help them. ｜ 看来应该帮帮她们。
- Let's work together to give them the surprise of their lives. ｜ 就让我们好好配合，给他们一个「惊喜」吧。
- I always seem to forget that you're more cunning and less adorable than you look... Seems like my worries about upsetting you were unfounded. ｜ 你还是那个有趣但不怎么可爱的家伙…看来担心你会有烦恼果然没什么必要。
- At least we stopped it this time. ｜ 至少阻止了它的行动。
- Astrology reveals the truth unreservedly. But, not everyone is willing to accept their fate. ｜ 占星术，令真实彻底显现。但…并非所有人都愿接受属于自己的命运。

- As the sender of this gift envelope, how should you address yourself... ｜ 寄出这份祝柬的你，应当用何自称…
- I should be safe from the other Sisters here. Finally, somewhere to skive off in peace... ｜ 修女们应该找不到这里来吧，总算可以安心偷个懒了…
- Sushi's on the menu tonight! ｜ 揍翻海怪！

The only thing left now is to send him off. ｜ 原来狼哥的魂灵是被驱咒仪式吸引而来，在了解到狼哥并非恶鬼，只是关心老孟以及其他童年好友的生活现状之后，胡桃决定满足他的心愿，并为他举办一个欢送仪式。为了解开狼哥的心结，你从他的童年好友那里获得了信物，还获得了他们对狼哥的祝福。现在一切就绪，只待启程与送别。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for setting up a Book Lover's Study.\nA Liyue-style study chock-full of books. One may gain much by spending half a day here in peace and quiet.\nThey say that the commonly-seen style of study designs nowadays is largely derived from the Feiyun Commerce Guild manor, which was improved by its second young master to greatly increase the efficiency with which one may study and write.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「万卷书斋」的放置方法。\n卷藏颇丰的璃月书房，平心静气在此待上半天，就能得到不少收获。\n据说如今常见的书房陈设，大多效仿自飞云商会的宅邸，由飞云商会的二少爷所改进，显著提升了学习与写作的效率。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。

Venturing out into the universe and down into the abyss are the same in that both are braving the dark unknown. ｜ 相传通往天空岛之人，在神之眼中——在幻视中，看到的天梯也是如此螺旋的形态。我们走向宇宙，或者下到深渊。并没有差别，因为都是未知的漆黑。
- #Happy Lantern Rite, {NICKNAME}. How have you been recently? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，海灯节快乐呀，最近过得还好吗？
- ...! Watch out! ｜ …！危险！
- I don't have any problem with it. There are two more rounds, after all. Losing one isn't a major setback. ｜ 其实我倒是不在意，反正还有两场比赛，就算先失一局也没关系。
- YES! Let's go eat! ｜ 走走走，大吃一顿！
- The alchemist is adjusting the deck with his chin rested in one hand as he recommends his newly-set Adventure Challenge to you. ｜ 炼金学者支着下巴，一边进行牌局调整，一边向你推荐他新设置的冒险挑战牌局。
- One moment. I'll be right there. ｜ 稍等，马上来。
- My discoveries in the ruins only proved my judgment astute. I found a great many interesting things there, just so you know. ｜ 而在遗迹中的发现也更加印证了我的判断…我可是找到了不少有趣的东西呢。
- So? Anything in particular you want to do? ｜ 你呢，有没有什么特别想做的事情？
- This pendant has been with me for as long as I can remember. Why does it fit with your two pieces? ｜ 这条挂坠，自我记事起就在我的身边。为什么能和你的两块挂坠拼合？
- #{SPACE}Every level will increase <color=#B09057FF>ATK</color> by 2,000. ｜ 每一级会使其<color=#B09057FF>攻击力</color>提升2000。
- Regardless of whether you're interested in traveling with a caravan, or have some talent in architecture, you're welcome to consider becoming an employee. ｜ 无论您喜欢跟随车队船队四处旅行，还是有着建筑方面的才华，都可以考虑成为和记厅的雇员。
- Woooow, so high! I can see everything! ｜ 哇，好高好高！上面好漂亮！
- Feast of Boundless Joy ｜ 无边酣乐之筵
- Yep. With the Special Patrol, bright and early. ｜ 嗯，一大早就被特巡队护送走了。
- Let's do this for the Bija... ｜ 为了惟耶之实…
- Energy Regeneration|{param2:I} ｜ 恢复元素能量|{param2:I}点
- I am so glad to see Timaeus find his happiness... ｜ 能看到蒂玛乌斯找到属于自己的幸福，真为他高兴。
- Huh. Isn't he real busy and stuff? Paimon didn't think he'd have the time for that. ｜ 他不是应该很忙嘛，居然有空出来？真没想到。
- Filter ｜ 筛选
- I heard him say that the esteemed guest on the roof loves nothing more than a good plate of Almond Tofu, so I learned a thing or two about the dish from him. ｜ 听他说，客栈顶上的贵客最喜欢他做的杏仁豆腐，所以就找他请教了一番。
- Hmm? What are you two doing here? You must have a lot of free time on your hands to come all the way out here... ｜ 哦？怎么是你们两位？居然有闲心来这么远的地方闲逛…
- Hmph, and you took over the camps, stopped the Saghira Machines, and interrupted our experiment! ｜ 哼，你们还抢夺营地！关闭桑格吉拉光机！让我们的实验停滞！
- The reason I'm willing to bet on you is because of your special status. I think it'll bring me a lot of leads that can get me closer to the truth... Heh, so, got any news for me today? ｜ 愿意在你身上下注，是考虑到你身份特殊，应当能为我找来不少通往「真相」的线索。呵，今天带来什么消息了吗？
- Diluc ｜ 迪卢克
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- She could feel joy, sorrow, and everything in between. She could be as vain and conceited, or as meek and vulnerable as she wished... ｜ 她有着喜怒哀乐，该狂妄时就狂妄，该懦弱时就懦弱…
- She's a good friend of mine. She's lent me her aid several times in the past to resolve some difficult cases. ｜ 她和我关系不错，偶尔会帮我解决一些难题。
- Nervous An ｜ 小安
- Yeah — Leyla's his name. He got into some trouble during a clairvoyance session. ｜ 嗯，他叫勒拉，在一次暝视中出了岔子，变成了现在这个样子。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for setting up a Harvest Season Stall.\nEvery time the harvest season arrives, the people of the town will set stalls up to sell all manner of wares. Such things contain not only the harvested fruits, vegetables, and wheat, but also secondhand goods of good quality and hay rolls.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「收获时节的小镇摊位」的放置方法。\n每到收获时节，镇民们会在要道附近设置摊位，出售各种货物。不止刚刚收成的果蔬和小麦，还有成色不错的旧货和干草卷。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。
- Ah... that's sorted then. You two get some rest, we'll take it from here. Enjoy the Lantern Rite in peace! ｜ 好了，你们也别忙活了，接下来就交给我们吧，你们安心享受海灯节就是。
- Yes, well, Sumeru is the land of the God of Wisdom, where the quest for wisdom and knowledge is never-ending. ｜ 嗯，须弥是智慧之神的国度，他们对智慧与知识的探求是永无止境的。
- Obtain a stage score of {param2} ｜ 本关积分达到{param2}
- (Give up on communication) I don't like your hat. ｜ （放弃交流）我不喜欢你的帽子。
- Sorry for your loss... ｜ 节哀…
- Hmm. Well, while I'd love to accompany you all to Liyue Harbor, I'm afraid I still have my Knights of Favonius duties to attend to. ｜ 嗯，尽管很想和你们一起去璃月，但我身上还有骑士团的工作。
- Tales of Monstrous Madness ｜ 妖鬼狂言百物语
- An Honorary Knight, much renowned and loved by all. ｜ 你是声名远扬人见人爱的荣誉骑士。
- I do. ｜ 嗯。
- Before you continue questioning me, I ought to warn you... ｜ 在你继续没完没了地发问之前，我有必要提示你…
- Ah, is that so? Then I must be mistaken. ｜ 这样吗？那大概是我记错了吧。
- You actually managed to find this place. Congratulations. ｜ 没想到你们能找到这里来，做得不错嘛。
- Those heroic enough to be accepted into Celestia become one of the gods and continue to keep watch over their people from on high. ｜ 登上天空岛而被接纳的英雄会成为诸神的一员，在高天之上继续守护人民。
- #No, no! That was just a joke, heh... Don't scare Paimon like that, {NICKNAME}! ｜ 开玩笑，我开玩笑的啦，别说这么可怕的事…

- Well, to tell you the truth, this is a very difficult matter. Too much for adventurers alone to handle, I fear... ｜ 唉！实不相瞒，这次的事有些棘手。光是冒险家恐怕不够，所以…

### Part 019

- Ooh! Paimon's excited now! ｜ 哇哦！一下就期待起来了！
- About Viktor's wood... ｜ 关于维克多的木头…
- Well-Honed Performance ｜ 熟能生巧的表演
- <color=#C87D1DFF>After your character uses a Skill:</color> During this match, the DMG dealt by the character will be increased by 1 (Can stack up to 3 times, but 1 stack is lost at the end of each Round). ｜ <color=#C87D1DFF>我方角色使用技能后：</color>本场对局中，该角色造成的伤害+1。（最多可以叠加到+3，但是每回合结束时衰减1层）
- Go to the criminal's location ｜ 前往犯人所在地
- Extinguishing Precept ｜ 灭却之戒法
- According to the Akademiya's policies, we need to bring everything back. ｜ 按照教令院的规矩，需要把它们都带回去。
- "Read a book a while back called Heart's Desire, it was pretty good. There was this strange old shop in the story, I'm wondering if it was based on this fine establishment? If so, would that make Blanche the magical shopkeeper...?" ｜ 「之前看了一本叫《碎梦奇珍》的小说，还挺有趣的。里面提到了一家奇妙的杂货店，请问书里的店和贵店有关系吗？这么一想，布兰琪小姐似乎变得神通广大了呢！」
- They're doing great. Thank you for asking by the way, because they're doing great! ｜ 他们过得很好谢谢关心，他们过得很好！
- But most people are still not willing to take a risk on such a rare commodity. ｜ 这种不太常见的商品，大部分人还是不太敢冒险。
- Lavawalker's Wisdom ｜ 渡火者的智慧
- Her wish has been fulfilled. ｜ 她的愿望已经实现了。
- Darn it! How did you know? Paimon was certain no one saw her eating Little Miss Cake... Just kidding, Paimon actually stole the Blazed Meat Stew! ｜ 可恶，怎么会，明明我偷吃小蛋糕小姐的时候没有被任何人看到…才怪啦，我偷吃的是火焰炖肉。
- Lucky Dog's Goblet ｜ 幸运儿之杯
- Defeat the Commission Guard reinforcements ｜ 击退增援的奉行府护卫
- How long have you been tailing us? ｜ 什么时候？
- Desnos ｜ 德斯诺斯

- A lovely and lush Sakura Tree that has the purest "cherry color."\nIn daylight, the radiant crowns of these trees catch the sunlight. When the gentle wind blows through, its leaves fall like rain, scattering their light yet rich fragrance all around. Four parts elegance, three parts sweetness, two parts warmth, and one part tranquility, its aroma blend guides people into sweet sleep like pillows of Yumemiru Wood, allowing them to have sweet dreams for so long as they rest under the tree's shade. ｜ 楚丽郁杌的樱树，呈现出最为纯澈的「樱色」。\n天色明亮时，映照阳光的树冠就如绚烂的早霞；柔风吹卷时，樱色的花瓣则如雨飘落，浅淡而馥郁的香气飘散，四分淡雅，三分清甜，两分温馨与一分安宁相融，能如头枕梦见木般佑人安睡，让他们在树下小憩时沉入甜美的梦乡。

Thus did I, and the warriors under my command, march to war all across the land. ｜ 他们夺走了我们的土地，污染了纯净的水源，还想要用乐声来诱惑我们…\n他们建起高高的钟楼和城堡，魔王的旋律把我们的同胞都变成了奴隶。\n然而我们自由的枫丹人绝不接受暴君的统治！为了终结魔王的暴政，我和我麾下的勇士们四处征战。

- In the Boreal Flurry game mode, you will have to move and shoot various targets to score points. Locked-on targets will be <color=#FFCC33>marked out</color>, and if you crash directly into targets, a certain amount of points will be deducted.\nShooting will consume energy, and energy recovers gradually, so take care and control your shots! ｜ 在「北风闪尘吹流」玩法中，旅行者需要移动射击各种标靶，获取得分。被锁定的标靶将被<color=#FFCC33>框选标记</color>，如果角色直接撞击标靶，将扣除一定的得分。\n角色进行射击将消耗能量，能量将缓慢恢复，需要注意控制射击的节奏。

- Report back to Sumida ｜ 向墨田回报

- Boosts your Vaporize blessing. Choose between two diverging paths:\nVaporize: <color=#0075de>Rising Tide</color>: When triggering Vaporize on an opponent, unleash a Tidal Shock that deals Hydro DMG.\nVaporize: <color=#ef5534>Fledgling Flame</color>: When triggering Vaporize on an opponent, unleash a Blazing Explosion that deals Pyro DMG. ｜ 强化蒸发祝福，可选择以下两种分支：\n蒸发·<color=#0075de>初阶浪涌</color>：对敌人触发蒸发反应时，释放浪涌冲击，造成水元素伤害；\n蒸发·<color=#ef5534>初阶炽燃</color>：对敌人触发蒸发反应时，释放炽燃爆轰，造成火元素伤害。

- Thank you so much! Phew... I can finally relax a bit... ｜ 谢谢你，呼…我总算是安心点了…
- Well, I mean... Wouldn't you want to open one up yourself? ｜ 唔…你就不想亲手拆解一台来试试吗？
- Ayato, why did you give her such vague suggestions? Couldn't you just have told her what you'd do in her position? 'Cause Paimon's pretty sure you have an idea. ｜ 绫人，你没有办法给她更具体的建议吗？比如说直接告诉她怎么做，你肯定想到了吧？
- Unexpectedly, I was approached by Lord Sangemah Bay, who expressed interest in purchasing the condiments that were the results of my research. ｜ 没想到被鼎鼎有名的桑歌玛哈巴依老爷给看上了，她表示希望买断我研究出来的调料配方。

- ...It sounds like she still argues with Chuychu, though. Don't siblings usually stop fighting when they get older? ｜ …不过她还会和葵可吵架吗？我还以为长大之后，她们就不吵了呢。

- Least Favorite Food ｜ 讨厌的食物…

- ...Weak. ｜ …弱小。
- Look at me, talking to you like this. You can't understand me anyway, can you? It's fine. I swapped in some new parts, so you should be alright now. ｜ 瞧我，就算跟你这么说，你也听不懂吧？没关系，我帮你换了新的零件，现在你已经没事了。
- A special Jumpy Dumpty that resembles Mint Jelly! Whenever the Spark Knight and Dodoco go out on adventures on hot days, they eat some Mint Jelly chilled by Mist Flowers, which is super refreshing in a hot summer!\nThe explosion AoE is in the shape of a mint leaf — <color=#f39000>a thin cross</color>! ｜ 颜色很像薄荷果冻的特别蹦蹦！火花骑士和嘟嘟可在闷热的天气出门冒险时，就会吃冰雾花冷冻过的薄荷果冻，清凉解暑又满足！\n爆炸的范围也和薄荷叶子的形状一样，是<color=#f39000>窄窄的十字形</color>！
- The beep is a prompt tone for Akasha operations. We still hear it every night, even though we removed our Akasha Terminals. ｜ 「嘀——」的一声，是虚空进行操作的提示音，即便摘掉虚空终端也会在每天的夜晚听到。
- Ballads of Breeze ｜ 风物之歌
- You must be an outlander, right? An outlander is a guest here. If you are not in a hurry, why don't you come on in, drink some tea, and take a break? ｜ 看你的样子，是外面来的人吧。外人就是客，不着急的话，就在我这里喝喝茶，歇歇脚。
- Grainfruit Puffer ｜ 「粒果膨膨机」
- I know that all they want is to get my autograph, or to ask me how I'm doing, which isn't a bad thing. ｜ 他们虽然没有恶意，只是想要我签名，或者只是单纯地向我问好之类的。

- Zhiqiong ｜ 志琼
- You always have lots to say about "avant-garde." Did you have a teacher who particularly emphasized that? ｜ 一提到前卫这个词，你就滔滔不绝，难道以前被很严格的老师教导过？
- "Abracadabra" ｜ 「阿布拉卡达布拉」
- That guy at the café who's always telling the same story all day. ｜ 就是那个在咖啡馆整天念叨同一个故事的家伙。
- Wait, don't leave without me! I thought you were gonna let me be the taste tester! ｜ 等等我呀，我还要帮你试喝呢！
- Let me help you. ｜ 我来扶你吧。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- No. I truly am happy that the two of you are the first two friends I met since I became "me." For that, you have my thanks. ｜ 不对。我是很高兴，你们是我成为「我」后，最早认识的朋友。所以，谢谢。
- "I am truly grateful for your kindness, though I feel it is undeserved. Thank you, I am glad you enjoy my perfume. It is my great honor." ｜ 「承蒙您的错爱，很感谢您喜欢我调制的香水，这是我莫大的荣幸。」
- Actually, we have evidence. His name is Shinnojou. ｜ 证据嘛，就是新之丞。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:P}
- Yeah, but Chief Biram deserved something in return for his hard work. ｜ 庇兰的努力值得一份回报。
- With his achievements, he would have become a sage sooner or later. But he met with an accident during an expedition, and his research results were lost. ｜ 本来按他的成就迟早是要成为贤者的，结果却在一次外出考察中发生了意外，重要的学术成果也不知所踪。
- Uh, not yet... ｜ 唔，还是没有…
- You are right! Indeed, I am the culprit, but I only wanted to help this moronic excuse for an agent to sort out the case. ｜ 您说的没错，对，犯人就是我，但我也只是想帮助这位笨笨的探员梳理下案情。
- Great, so it wasn't just Paimon. ｜ 太好了，我们想一起去了。
- Report back to Manager Kuan ｜ 向阿宽回报
- When Dad put me back down, I looked up at him again, but now he had a scary look in his eyes... ｜ 当爸爸把我放下时，我的故事刚好结束，而我再仰头看，发现他的眼神有点让人害怕…
- Ugh... It's so strange and so against common sense that Paimon is at a loss for words... You were sounding kinda smart just a minute ago! ｜ 呃…太过奇怪也太过没有常识，以至于不知道该说什么…明明刚才好像还在讲什么大道理。
- Read ｜ 阅读
- It's such a satisfying feeling to just drop everything, go on a long trip, and see something new. ｜ 能像这样放下手头的事，出门远行，增长见闻，真惬意啊。
- I'd love to compare their signboards, should they prove quite idiosyncratic as well. ｜ 如果它们的招牌也很有特色的话，真想放在一起对比看看呀。
- I mean, the infirmary does make it easier for you to slack off. ｜ 你经常趁机去医务室偷懒也是事实啦。
- The words Sister Sorush said before the Sunyata Flower... "I shall be Simurgh's equal"... They encouraged me more than any teachings might. ｜ 斯露莎姐姐在「净觉花」前，发出「目标是比肩西摩格」的宣言时…比什么心得都能鼓舞我。
- It's pretty quiet around here thanks to the waterfall. Haha... The roar of the falls drowns out everything else, so you can't hear a thing. ｜ 在这里反而能平静一点，因为瀑布，呵呵…因为瀑布的声音充斥了耳朵，所以，就听不见别的东西了。
- More accurately, she's in the same boat as me — our ancestors both lived there. ｜ 准确地说，是和我一样，祖上曾经在清籁岛上居住过。
- I—I know! We passed by a small pond like that while gathering the pinecones! There was a little flower at the center of the pond... ｜ 我、我也记得！在我们之前采松果的时候，路过了这样的一片小水潭！水潭中间就有一朵小花…
- Katheryne from the Adventurers' Guild in Mondstadt informs you that a very peculiar stranger has come to the city. Following Katheryne's suggestion, you decide to contact that person and see if they accept your request... ｜ 从蒙德城冒险家协会的凯瑟琳小姐那里得知，蒙德城来了一位奇怪的陌生人。 在凯瑟琳小姐的建议下，你决定先去找那位陌生人，看他愿不愿意接受你的邀约…
- Are you running some sort of event here? ｜ 这里在举办什么活动吗？
- Oh, it's you two. Did Miss Navia invite you to come pay your respects to her father? ｜ 哦，是你们啊，是娜维娅小姐邀请你们来扫墓的吗？
- Unlocks at Ascension Phase 2 ｜ 突破等级「2」阶后开启
- Is this another pearl of wisdom based on your adventuring experience? ｜ 这也是你的冒险经验吗？
- The courtyard remains fragrant even in the bitterest winter. ｜ 在庭之椿，寒中清芬。
- I'm sorry I made you wait earlier. It was actually because I decided to swing by Ororon's place to look for clues. ｜ 我很抱歉今天来得比预期晚。是有原因的，我去了趟欧洛伦的住处，在那里找线索。
- Café Lutece ｜ 露泽咖啡厅
- An artificed Geovishap Hatchling that looks much the same as those normally encountered... ｜ 被拟想而出的「幼岩龙蜥」，看起来似乎和寻常所见的「幼岩龙蜥」并无太大差别…
- Complete "Autumn Winds, Scarlet Leaves" ｜ 完成「振袖秋风问红叶」剧情
- If what you said is true, then I'm doing the right thing. If not, at least Lumidouce Harbor will avoid disaster. Don't you understand that at the very least? ｜ 如果是真的，那我就管对了。如果是假的，至少柔灯港能少遭一次灾。你们这也不明白吗？
- And my job here is to keep it that way. ｜ 而我所要做的工作，就是让它继续正常下去。

Go back to Inazuma and look for her to see how her attempt proceeds. ｜ 距离上次与墨田的接触已经过了一段时间，此前她似乎说了会找一些别的接受过她委托的人来互通情报。到稻妻城去找墨田看看情况吧。

- That's right. As long as you follow the aqueducts newly built by our God King, a ship can sail beneath the high sea and reach the desert to the south. ｜ 是啊，只要沿着神王新修筑的水道，航船便可以一路驶向高海之下，直抵南方的沙漠。
- It certainly seems well-preserved. ｜ 看起来保存得相当完好。
- Farewell! Come back when you have time. Who knows, maybe you'd be interested in becoming one of us! ｜ 慢走，有空常来玩玩啊！说不定你也会对制茶工艺有兴趣，以后来干这行！
- Ores are pretty useful. You need them too, right? ｜ 矿石也算是挺有用的东西了，你也需要的吧。
- ...My machinations are just like the prophecy itself — they will only reveal themselves at the fated time. It is just that beings like yourselves are unable to perceive them as of yet. ｜ …就像预言，一切会在正确的时刻显现，你只是还无法看到那些事物而已。

- B—Boss! Chaussivert! Please forgive me, big man! ｜ …老、老大！肖西韦尔老大，饶了我，饶了我吧！
- And to pull it off like this... ｜ 居然能在众目睽睽之下…
- Marana's Avatar and those monsters are no match for you. There is no need to worry. ｜ 无留陀的化身，还有那些怪物，已经不是你的对手了。毋须担心。
- Excuse me, you are... ｜ 请问你是…
- Well, I've found out everything I could. Is there anything that stands out to you? ｜ #消息打听得差不多了，{NICKNAME}，你觉得有什么值得注意的吗？
- Motorized Autonomous Fonta Vending Machine: Modified ｜ 「机动自律型枫达专卖机·改」
- Demoiselle, please... If there is anything I can do, anything at all... ｜ 大小姐…我…不论有什么我能做的事，请尽管吩咐…
- But I don't feel that making it easier to learn is necessarily a good thing. ｜ 但我从来不觉得「降低学习成本」是件好事。
- You're right. Look at me, coming around here, criticizing your lifestyle choices. ｜ 随意评论主人的生活风格是不礼貌的。
- Please don't say that. ｜ 请不要这样说。
- No need to be alarmed, you two. We'll get to the bottom of this soon enough. ｜ 两位不用慌张，我们很快就能调查清楚发生了什么。
- This isn't your fault. ｜ 这不是你的问题。
- Really? Why, is there a problem? ｜ 哦？这里面有什么困难吗？
- Hmm... Paimon doesn't know what she's been through, but it seems like it would be hard to convince her to return. ｜ 唔…虽然不知道她到底经历了什么，但是看来很难说服她回化城郭了。
- No matter what happens or what the cost is, we must maintain good relations with you. I'm sure Mr. Choiseul feels the same way. ｜ 无论是出于任何立场，付出任何代价，我们都必须和您保持良好关系。我相信舒瓦瑟尔先生也这么想。
- A lightning-charged feather that still flickers with the wrath of the Thunderbird's cruel retribution. ｜ 带电的雷之羽，是雷之魔鸟降下残酷的报应。遗落的羽毛仍闪烁着它盛怒的雷光。

- Though the Mora he gave me was only enough for me to buy two bowls of Unagi Chazuke, he is my biggest and only supporter. I'd help him for free! ｜ 虽说每次打赏给我的摩拉只够买到两碗「鳗肉茶泡饭」，但他也是我最大的、唯一的金主，所以我会无偿帮助他！

- But this is the end of the path. She has to be here! ｜ 但是，这里就是道路的尽头，莉利丝公主一定在这里！
- Let's go have a look! Maybe the people here can help us! ｜ 我们去看看吧！这里的人，说不定能帮上忙呢！

- Yeah, you got it. And that should just about do it. ｜ 对对对，就是这样，这下就差不多了。
- Huh, a door? Hmm, wonder where it could lead... ｜ 这好像是通往什么地方的门？
- Yes, but I'm not. So, I had to hide here. I was thinking about the past as I waited for it to leave, and the next thing I knew, you two were standing in front of me. ｜ 嗯。但是，我没有那么强。所以，我只好躲在这里。一边想着过去的事情，一边等它走。回过神来，就看到你们。
- As usual, Ajaw brings chaos wherever he goes. ｜ 还是老样子，只要有阿乔的地方就会变得很吵。

- My bone collection... ｜ 收集的骨头…
- But just as Doushin Arataki is being overcome with righteous indignation, the sound of Miss Etsu's weeping brings his attention back to her. ｜ 但就在荒泷同心义愤填膺的时刻，悦小姐的哭声吸引了他的注意力。
- I'll keep that in mind. ｜ 我会注意的。
- I don't know how to make a lot of dishes, either, so I've long grown sick of my own cooking... ｜ 而且，我也只会做那么几道菜，老公他早就吃腻了吧…
- Sounds good. I hope you enjoy your time here! ｜ 好的，祝你们在「沃陆之邦」过得开心。

- Titu ｜ 蒂图
- Eh!? Wait! Don't go! ｜ 欸？不要走！
- Uhm... Thank you... I never noticed... *cough* *cough* Um, thanks. ｜ 唔…谢谢…我从来没注意过来着…咳咳，嗯，谢谢。
- Yeah, what's going on? Do you know Lyris, Caterpillar? ｜ 对啊对啊，这是怎么回事？卡特皮拉你认识莉利丝吗？
- V5.2 Saurian Hut Little Saurian Infiltration ｜ 5.2龙小屋小恐龙潜入
- It keeps looking over at that direction... ｜ 似乎很在意那边…
- Glad to hear it. Things are progressing very smoothly on my end. Many of the elders have heard of your heroic deeds, including the chief. They all speak very favorably of you. ｜ 那就好。我这边的进展也很顺利，不少长老都听说过您的事迹，包括首领在内，都对您表示了认可。
- Shrine Maiden ｜ 巫女
- It would render our search for the truth meaningless. I'd rather try and figure this out for myself... ｜ 这样就失去了追求真理的意义。唔，我还是想先自己思考…
- What an artist must do is capture the hallucination in detail and express it objectively. ｜ 而艺术家要做的，正是要精准地抓住这种幻觉，并将它客观呈现出来。
- Find and break the four Seals ｜ 寻找并解除四处封印

- Ooh! Sounds like it could be helpful! ｜ 哦！听起来是一本很实用的书呢。

- A device made by the ancestors of the modern-day people of Natlan using Phlogiston Engraving to imitate the techniques of those who made the Spiritways.\nInteract with it to create Spiritways or cause unstable ones to manifest. ｜ 纳塔先民模仿游隙灵道创造者的技术，用燃素刻录制作的装置。\n进行交互后，就能生成游隙灵道，或者令不稳定的游隙灵道得以显现。
- Weapon Ascension Material.\nAndrius once declared war upon Decarabian, but failed to even scratch the capital of the Lord of the Tower. If it were not for the song of freedom that shattered the city in an instant, Decarabian's dream would have gone on forever. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n「安德留斯」曾经对高塔的孤王宣战，却也无法损伤王都分毫。若不是「自由」高歌的瞬间让这座城市土崩瓦解，这一切都会继续永远之梦。
- The remainder of the construction work is then carried out at that altitude. Once everything is ready, we release the iron tethers and allow the Jade Chamber to rise to its target altitude. ｜ 之后的修建工作会在上方完成。一切就绪后，我们便收起铁索，让群玉阁飞到它该有的高度…
- In any case, I really must thank you again for coming to our rescue. May I ask, what are the two— no, three of you... ｜ 哈，好吧，再次感谢你们的援助，请问二位、不，三位的尊姓大名…
- The two of you went after her once. ｜ 她曾被你们追捕过。

- Lisa's Elemental Burst <color=#FFE14BFF>Lightning Rose</color> automatically deals damage to opponents in a wide area. ｜ 丽莎的<color=#FFE14BFF>元素爆发</color>技能能召唤出蔷薇雷光，自动攻击大范围内的敌人
- Breakfast also isn't usually so lavish. Hence my surprise when we got here. ｜ 通常来说，早点也不会有这么精致与丰盛，所以我来到这里的时候才会有点惊讶。
- I may be a simple nameless Pari, but I don't give away secrets easily. When I found out the truth, I drove him away. ｜ 虽说我不过是个无名花灵，但也不会轻易透露秘密。发现真相之后，我赶走了他。

- Those bumbling fools... How've they lost another load of packages? I told them not to mess about when they're out delivering things... ｜ 这群冒失鬼。怎么又丢失了好几份快件。都说了在送东西的时候不要玩那些花里胡哨的动作…
- And you're here now, so even if you're gonna leave eventually, I wanna make sure you at least leave with fond memories. ｜ 你已经来了，就算最后还是要走，我也要让你留下一个好的印象。

- I want to know the reasoning behind why you arranged the roads and buildings like this... ｜ 我想知道一下你是出于什么设计思路安排了这样的道路体系，还有这些房屋间距…

- However, the Spikey Fish King has heard of Dodoco's power and courage and came out to fight in a rage! Judging by its rotund body, it sure is hard to defeat! A careful strategy is neded. - Well, too bad. I'm just a wounded soldier. There's nothing I can do for you. ｜ 可惜呀，我不过一介伤兵，没什么能招待你的。

- This text is also known as "Hleobranto Innamorato." The author of the first edition claims to have based this tale on a legendary story known throughout Khaenri'ah, but there are none left who can verify this. It is an anthological work produced over several generations at this point. ｜ 本书又称《热恋中的赫雷贝里》，初版作者自称改编自坎瑞亚家喻户晓的传奇故事，但是世上已经没有人可以佐证这点了。现在已经是数代人的集体创作了。

- Fully-Charged Aimed Shot|{param6:P} ｜ 满蓄力瞄准射击|{param6:P}
- Its body remains fighting fit thanks to the perverse power of the Abyss, but time has been less kind to its soul... It was ground to a pulp long ago! ｜ 它的肉体与战斗本能被深渊的诡力保存，但它的灵魂早就被五百年的时间磨为了齑粉！
- Hey Katheryne! Got any new commissions for us today? Also... how come you look so happy to see us? What have you done!? ｜ 凯瑟琳小姐，今天有什么委托吗？还有…你今天见到我们怎么好像格外开心的样子？
- Yes, I'm very happy to have met him. However, his core is aging rapidly, so he will go into hibernation mode soon... *sigh* His body parts can be replaced, but not his core... ｜ 嗯，很高兴能认识他。不过他的核心老化很严重，很快就要进入休眠状态了…唉，他的机器身体可以更换，但核心不能换…
- I consider myself a bard of the old school, so of course I'm here to get some inspiration. ｜ 我是老派吟游诗人嘛，当然是来这里寻找灵感。
- A machine with terrifying destructive capabilities. When characters enter and maintain the Nightsoul's Blessing state, the Secret Source Automaton: Configuration Device will start progressing through its Adaptive Countermeasures. Once those are complete, the Configuration Device will start preparing its Boltsphere Cannon. During this time, the Configuration Device will start up its Accretion Mechanism to dig into solid Phlogiston and collect Phlogiston. The Accretion Mechanism will generate an energy field. If you wish to destroy the Mechanism and interrupt the charging of the Boltsphere Cannon, <color=#F39001>you must first climb the solid Phlogiston and enter the energy field.</color> ｜ 具备强大的摧毁与破坏的机能的机械体。在角色进入和维持「夜魂加持」状态时，秘源机兵·构型械会积累「应战对策」的进度，进度积累满后，将开始准备「球状雷炮」，过程中，秘源机兵·构型械会启动「汲聚械」开掘固态燃素并汲取燃素。「汲聚械」自身会产生力场，如果想要破坏「汲聚械」以打断「球状雷炮」的蓄能，<color=#F39001>就得先攀上固态燃素进入力场内才行。</color>
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P}+{param2:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}+{param2:F1P}
- The feather of an exotic bird rarely seen on this continent. ｜ 异国的奇妙鸟类的羽毛，在这片大陆上非常罕见。
- Then you shouldn't have promoted us like that from the start. Also, I never agreed to you hyping me up as a "renowned performance artist" over the loudspeaker, either... ｜ 那请一开始就不要这样介绍，还有，用洛氏扩音机宣传的时候称呼我为「著名表演艺术家」这件事我也没同意过…
- Contains a random artifact of the "Nighttime Whispers in the Echoing Woods" series. ｜ 装有一件随机的「回声之林夜话」圣遗物。
- (*sigh* It's all just a dream...) ｜ （只是梦而已，唉…）
- You and Shinobu split up to find Akira as soon as possible. ｜ 为了尽快找到阿晃，你与久岐忍开始分头行动…
- Huh? Hang on, Paimon can kinda hear a voice... It's calling for "Vacher," right? ｜ 欸，等等，我好像也稍微能听到一点点，一个在喊「瓦谢」的声音，对吧？
- More Aranara names! Aradashan, Arasata, Arasaha, and... ｜ 兰那罗的名字又变多了，兰提沙，兰沙陀，兰沙诃和…
- We have come on behalf of the Tanit tribe to see you, to ask that you show forth your great might and aid us in finding the place where Nabu Malikata slumbers... ｜ 我们代表塔尼特部族前来拜见您，唯望您能施展能力，助我们找寻到娜布·玛莉卡塔的沉眠之处…
- I'm fine, thanks to Diona and the Traveler. Otherwise, things might have ended very differently. ｜ 没事，多亏了小迪奥娜和这位旅行者，要不然非得耽误事不可。
- The Shades of Tokoyo only show up during Evernight. ｜ 「常世之灵」仅在常夜里出现。
- That way, ordinary people traveling outside will not be helpless when faced with beasts like Rishboland Tigers or Spinocrocodiles. ｜ 这样就算是普通人外出游历，面对长鬓虎、棘冠鳄这样的野兽也不至于束手无策。
- Then, let's sneak up on them! If they're the ones looking to cause trouble during the Sabzeruz Festival, we should catch them in the act! ｜ 那我们赶快躲起来！如果是想要在花神诞祭上捣乱的坏人，就当场抓他们个现行！
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- Please adjust camera angle to take a suitable photo to bring back to Zicheng ｜ 需要将镜头转至正确角度，拍摄合适的画片带给子澄
- You saw how everything would play out. ｜ 事情都被你算到了。
- There's no commission I can't complete! ｜ 没有我完不成的委托。
- Ehrrr? ｜ 嗯唔？
- As for the future... ｜ 关于以后…
- Awaken the Residual Pari in the Fravashi Trees ｜ 唤醒「灵谷木」中的残灵
- It's my turn now, right? Attack! ｜ 那么接下来轮到我的回合了吧？攻击！
- These volcanic caves aren't very stable, so watch out for falling rocks. ｜ 岩浆活动形成的洞穴果然不太稳定，大家当心落石。
- I'm no expert on obscure materials... Orban may know something though, he comes across all sorts of materials in the process of forging weaponry. ｜ 我对这类材料并不是太了解…但乌尔班为了锻造武器经手过许多材料，也许他会知道些什么。
- "Missiles"? I do not know this strange word... As I said, I pay no heed to the contraptions of humans. ｜ 「导弹」？不…我已经说了，我不关心人类的造物，不懂这些奇怪的词。
- Rich Ore Reserve ｜ 矿物富集点
- Shunsuiken 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段瞬水剑伤害|{param3:F1P}
- 3-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- #Next time {NICKNAME} can come play with Dusky Ming. ｜ #下次，就换{NICKNAME}{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SISTERA]}再来和小冥一起玩吧。
- I feel like you're making this sound more mysterious than it actually is. ｜ 故弄玄虚。
- Justice is blind to our backgrounds, my friend. That just makes me someone trying to do the right thing. But you? The weasel who does the tiger's bidding may be less powerful than his master, but he is no less guilty. ｜ 正义和身份可没什么关系，你只不过是个狐假虎威的小家丁，不是一样在作恶吗？
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- The Scions of the Canopy really have advantages when it comes to high-altitude work. Gah, I'm so envious! ｜ 从高空作业的角度来说，「悬木人」的优势很明显，真羡慕他们！
- Listen to the machine... ｜ 聆听机器…
- Hmm? Oh... Yes, these are mine. But I didn't like what I'd written, so I scrapped them. Tossed them into the river. ｜ 什么？哦…这确实是我的，这些都是我写的废稿，本来就是丢到河里去销毁的。
- What mein Fräulein means is that it took us a long time to reach this place. She couldn't bear to leave you all here, even though she did not wish to confront this mirage. ｜ 小姐的意思是，我们花了不少时间才找到这里。虽说不愿面对这处幻境，但也不能抛下各位。
- *panting*... I thought I was a goner for sure... ｜ 呼…呼…我还以为这回肯定要交代了…
- Settings ｜ 设置
- Emotional support! ｜ 感情支持！
- #You should hide, Nara {NICKNAME} and Paimon! Big Iron Chunks are big and hard, some even shoot fire out of their eyes! Very dangerous! ｜ #那菈{NICKNAME}和派蒙，你们快躲起来，「大大铁块」，又大又坚硬，有的眼睛还会冒火，危险危险！
- If my friend espies a treasure chest, they will absolutely find a way to open it. ｜ ——绝不会漏过任何一个视线之内的宝箱。
- Sounds like you're ready to stop running from your true calling. ｜ 看来你没有那么抗拒了呢。
- Character Story 4 ｜ 角色故事4
- Ah, when will Linorea's temper improve? ｜ 莉诺蕾娅这家伙…到底什么时候能改改脾气…
- Ascend 3 characters to Phase 2 ｜ 将任意三个角色突破到2阶
- Close, but not quite. ｜ 可惜了，就差一点点。
- Judging by the topography, I'd say that this is some place on Seirai Island... ｜ 这张图上的地形，看起来像是清籁岛的某处呢…
- #I'm sure no one else will hear of what happened today, am I right, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #我相信今天的事，不会有别人知道，{NICKNAME}，对不对？
- Okay, okay... ｜ 知道啦。
- "We must ensure the remaining members can evacuate safely. Be wary of those who vanish at night, or return from places devoid of light." ｜ 「必须得，让剩下的人安全撤离，得小心防备那些突然在夜晚消失的，或是那些自无光之处重新归来的人。」
- It's a rare ore — so rare that you won't even necessarily find one in the mines. I've only seen two or three such stones for all my years here at The Chasm. It's such a gorgeous gemstone with beauty beyond imagination. ｜ 那是一种即使在矿区也很少出现的稀有矿物，在层岩巨渊这么多年我也只看过两三枚，那可真是常人想象不到的瑰丽宝石啊。
- Yup! Do you know where we can find the Gear Sky Ladder? ｜ 没错，你知道齿轮云梯在哪里坐吗？
- You're taking a break, remember? ｜ 现在可是你的休息时间。
- Give me some time to get ready. ｜ 我要准备一下…
- Nothing else stands out in this area. All that's left is that building. Come on. ｜ 这周围好像的确没什么值得注意的，剩下的就是那间屋子了。
- The player is not inside the open world. ｜ 玩家未处于大世界
- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I've heard that Albert, being the leader of Barbara's fan club...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> ...Sometimes gets bumps and bruises on purpose so he can go to the Cathedral to see her.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon feels the Knights of Favonius should keep a closer watch on weirdos like that.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> But it seems that a month later, Albert discovered that Bennett was managing to see Barbara far more than he was.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Well... Bennett does have the natural advantage when it comes to getting injured, after all.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> What is this, a "let's bother Barbara" contest? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我听说，艾伯特先生作为芭芭拉粉丝团的团长…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>经常故意弄出些磕磕碰碰的伤，就为了去教堂见芭芭拉一面。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我觉得西风骑士团需要重点关注这种家伙。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>可是一个月下来，艾伯特发现…跟芭芭拉见面的次数，被班尼特远远超越了。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>毕竟在受伤方面，班尼特有天然的优势…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>这是什么「给芭芭拉小姐添麻烦」的比赛吗！
- Yup, let's try to save this Wolfgang guy, shall we? ｜ 嗯，要是能帮到这个叫「沃尔夫冈」的冒险家就好了！
- Atocpan ｜ 安饶之野
- All powers under heaven, rise and fall of land and sea... ｜ 天动万象，山海化形…
- #I didn't think I'd see you here, {NICKNAME}. Where's Paimon, though? I don't see her. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，没想到会在这里遇到你。派蒙没在你身边吗？
- No Minor Affix restrictions ｜ 不限制追加属性
- One possibility is that the information in their brains could be extracted into Knowledge Capsules. ｜ 有一种可能，这些人的大脑会被用于提取罐装知识。
- "Oh, and she taught me a nursery rhyme, too. Umm... I think it goes like this:" ｜ 「对了，她还教了我一首童谣，我想想…好像是…」
- Have you got anything? ｜ 想好了吗？
- Go inside ｜ 进入屋内
- #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}
- Heh! If Granna wants to join the Marechaussee Phantom someday, I guess I need to do my best too... Well, just a little bit... ｜ 哎呀，如果嘉莱娜以后想要加入「逐影庭」的话，我也要加油了…啊，就稍微加一点吧…
- She hailed from an ancient assembly of powerful women, each of whom used a single letter to signify themselves. ｜ 一个古老的女性集会，每个成员都以字母作为代号。

- But... ｜ 可是…
- Feelings About Ascension: Climax ｜ 突破的感受·转
- You got him a teacher? Oh, Paimon would love to see him get scolded for bad behavior! ｜ 教育？有点想看它被老师狠狠教训的样子！
- Woof, woof! ｜ 汪汪！
- Let's all take a seat. ｜ 你也坐你也坐。
- Hehe, ask away. As a Kshahrewar researcher who specializes in studying ruin machines, I've been investigating this big guy over here for years. ｜ 哼哼，尽管问吧。我可是专攻遗迹机关的妙论派学者，研究这个大家伙已经有些年头了。
- Hey, look at that! My favorite melon's a fast learner! Also, I hear you're gonna be taking the stage tonight! Itching for a little competition, huh? ｜ 矮堇瓜，你倒是学得很快嘛！我还听说，今晚你也打算要上台，和本大爷掰掰手腕？
- You wouldn't believe how much I've missed Melissa's Grilled Fish — I dreamed about it every time I had to get a Welfare Meal down there underneath the sea! ｜ 你们知道吗，我有多么想念玫莉莎亲手做的烤鱼，那真是我在下面日思夜想的食物了！
- Defeat all opponents and protect the Ley Line Monolith. ｜ 消灭所有魔物，守护地脉镇石完整。
- No problem! ｜ 没问题！
- Talk to the Fatuus guarding the entrance ｜ 与守门的愚人众交谈
- Huh? Did I miss something? ｜ 我怎么没发现？
- Go Mondstadt! Liyue! ｜ 想去蒙德！璃月！

- Moment of the Pact ｜ 结契之刻
- We met them both just a while back! ｜ 我们不久前才见到他们哦！
- But your gifts are more than enough already... ｜ 已经足够了…
- You put the Driftyball in the pool. ｜ 将「漂流球」放在水塘里。
- Sorry, my father is always like that. ｜ 对不起，我父亲总是那个样子。
- A thief has no right to criticize the methods of the Knights of Fav— Wait, what are you... ｜ 身为盗贼就不要随便评论骑士的智慧…喂，等等，你想干什么？

- Defeat 15 opponents during an alchemical transmutation. ｜ 在一场炼金中，打倒15只魔物。
- As Grand Master Varka's expedition party was getting ready to leave Mondstadt, I—I lost a keepsake from Glory and then fell behind when they set off... ｜ 法尔伽大团长的远征队还没离开蒙德的时候…我就因为弄丢了葛罗丽的信物而掉队了。
- Why don't you two go adventuring together? ｜ 不如你俩结伴冒险吧…
- Oh, don't tell anyone about this, or they'll call me in for a little... chat... ｜ 哎，你可不要和别人说啊，不然我准要被叫去谈话了…
- But as long as you can still wake up, you can still move forward with your life. ｜ 但只要能醒过来，什么时候都不算晚。
- Arama, Araja! What are you doing here? ｜ 兰罗摩、兰拉迦！你们怎么在这里呀？
- Have a chit-chat. ｜ 闲聊。
- Not yet unlocked ｜ 尚未解锁
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Missing Furnishing(s) ｜ 缺少摆设
- Annotations in Free-Spirited Handwriting ｜ 字迹豪迈的批注
- A mysterious ship has dropped anchor outside Liyue Harbor. The ship appears to be quite luxurious, all the more reason to hop right on board... ｜ 在璃月港的海边停着一艘神秘的船，看起来十分华贵。而你却冒冒失失地直接闯了进去…
- Gliding Medal - Day 3, Tier 3 ｜ 飞行第3日第三档勋章

- Curling Tongue and Moving ｜ 卷舌移动
- Recreated Nemesis ｜ 寮中重现的敌方头目
- Alright! That's a wrap — wow, we sure wound up writing a lot... ｜ 好！完成了，不知不觉居然写了这么多…
- I'd never met either of you before today, and out of nowhere you suddenly rope me into betting over a coin toss, and now you're accusing me of owing you one million Mora... ｜ 我刚遇到你们没多久，不知道怎么回事就被带着猜硬币，输了之后两个人合起伙来说我输了一百万…
- Hold DMG|{param2:P} ｜ 长按伤害|{param2:P}
- I knew I was right about you. You have outperformed all of our previous candidates. ｜ 我果然没有看错人，您的表现比先前的几个候选人都好得多。

- ... ｜ ……
